33/* Duration (seconds) of the "pressed" visual flash applied to a button when
34 * it is activated through its bound keyboard shortcut. Long enough for the
35 * user to perceive a press, short enough to feel snappy. */
36#define N_GUI_KEY_PRESS_FLASH_SEC 0.12
37
38/* INTERNAL HELPERS */
39
41static double _clamp(double v, double lo, double hi) {
42 if (v < lo) return lo;
43 if (v > hi) return hi;
44 return v;
45}
46
50static double _slider_snap_value(double val, double min_val, double max_val, double step) {
51 if (step <= 0.0) step = 1.0;
52 double steps = round((val - min_val) / step);
53 double snapped = min_val + steps * step;
54 if (snapped < min_val) snapped = min_val;
55 if (snapped > max_val) snapped = max_val;
56 return snapped;
57}
58
61N_GUI_TEXT_DIMS n_gui_get_text_dims(ALLEGRO_FONT* font, const char* text) {
62 N_GUI_TEXT_DIMS d = {0, 0, 0, 0};
63 if (font && text) al_get_text_dimensions(font, text, &d.x, &d.y, &d.w, &d.h);
64 return d;
65}
66
68static int _is_focusable_type(int type) {
69 return type == N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA ||
70 type == N_GUI_TYPE_SLIDER ||
71 type == N_GUI_TYPE_CHECKBOX ||
72 type == N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX ||
73 type == N_GUI_TYPE_RADIOLIST ||
74 type == N_GUI_TYPE_COMBOBOX ||
75 type == N_GUI_TYPE_SCROLLBAR ||
76 type == N_GUI_TYPE_DROPMENU;
77}
78
80static N_GUI_WINDOW* _find_focused_window(N_GUI_CTX* ctx) {
81 if (ctx->focused_widget_id < 0) return NULL;
82 list_foreach(wnode, ctx->windows) {
83 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
84 if (!win || !(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN)) continue;
85 list_foreach(wgn, win->widgets) {
86 const N_GUI_WIDGET* w = (const N_GUI_WIDGET*)wgn->ptr;
87 if (w && w->id == ctx->focused_widget_id) return win;
88 }
89 }
90 return NULL;
91}
92
95static void _normalize_crlf(char* s) {
96 if (!s) return;
97 char* dst = s;
98 for (char* src = s; *src; src++) {
99 if (*src != '\r') *dst++ = *src;
100 }
101 *dst = '\0';
102}
103
108static float _text_w(ALLEGRO_FONT* font, const char* text) {
109 if (font && text) return (float)al_get_text_width(font, text);
110 return 0.0f;
111}
112
114static float _win_tbh(N_GUI_WINDOW* win) {
115 return (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_FRAMELESS) ? 0.0f : win->titlebar_h;
116}
117
119static int _point_in_rect(float px, float py, float rx, float ry, float rw, float rh) {
120 return (px >= rx && px <= rx + rw && py >= ry && py <= ry + rh);
121}
122
134static float _scrollbar_calc_scroll(float mouse, float track_start, float track_length, float viewport, float content, float thumb_min) {
135 float ratio = viewport / content;
136 if (ratio > 1.0f) ratio = 1.0f;
137 float thumb = ratio * track_length;
138 if (thumb < thumb_min) thumb = thumb_min;
139 float max_scroll = content - viewport;
140 float track_range = track_length - thumb;
141 if (track_range <= 0 || max_scroll <= 0) return 0;
142 float pos_ratio = (mouse - track_start - thumb / 2.0f) / track_range;
143 if (pos_ratio < 0) pos_ratio = 0;
144 if (pos_ratio > 1) pos_ratio = 1;
145 return pos_ratio * max_scroll;
146}
147
157static int _scrollbar_calc_scroll_int(float mouse, float track_start, float track_length, int visible_items, int total_items, float thumb_min) {
158 int max_off = total_items - visible_items;
159 if (max_off <= 0) return 0;
160 float scroll = _scrollbar_calc_scroll(mouse, track_start, track_length,
161 (float)visible_items, (float)total_items, thumb_min);
162 int offset = (int)(scroll + 0.5f);
163 if (offset < 0) offset = 0;
164 if (offset > max_off) offset = max_off;
165 return offset;
166}
167
176static N_GUI_WINDOW* _find_widget_window(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int wgt_id, float* ox, float* oy) {
177 list_foreach(wnode, ctx->windows) {
178 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
179 if (!(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN)) continue;
180 list_foreach(wgn, win->widgets) {
181 if (((N_GUI_WIDGET*)wgn->ptr)->id == wgt_id) {
182 *ox = win->x - win->scroll_x;
183 *oy = win->y + _win_tbh(win) - win->scroll_y;
184 return win;
185 }
186 }
187 }
188 *ox = 0;
189 *oy = 0;
190 return NULL;
191}
192
194static void _destroy_widget(void* ptr) {
195 if (!ptr) return;
196 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = (N_GUI_WIDGET*)ptr;
197 if (w->data) {
198 /* free inner allocations for types that have them */
199 if (w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX) {
200 N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* ld = (N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)w->data;
201 FreeNoLog(ld->items);
202 } else if (w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_RADIOLIST) {
203 N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA* rd = (N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA*)w->data;
204 FreeNoLog(rd->items);
205 } else if (w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_COMBOBOX) {
206 N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA* cd = (N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA*)w->data;
207 FreeNoLog(cd->items);
208 } else if (w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_DROPMENU) {
209 N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA* dd = (N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)w->data;
210 FreeNoLog(dd->entries);
211 } else if (w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA) {
212 N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* td = (N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA*)w->data;
213 FreeNoLog(td->text);
214 }
215 FreeNoLog(w->data);
216 }
217 FreeNoLog(w);
218}
219
221static void _destroy_window(void* ptr) {
222 if (!ptr) return;
223 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)ptr;
224 if (win->widgets) {
225 list_destroy(&win->widgets);
226 }
227 FreeNoLog(win);
228}
229
231static LIST_NODE* _find_window_node(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
232 __n_assert(ctx, return NULL);
233 __n_assert(ctx->windows, return NULL);
234 list_foreach(node, ctx->windows) {
235 const N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (const N_GUI_WINDOW*)node->ptr;
236 if (win && win->id == window_id) return node;
237 }
238 return NULL;
239}
240
242static void _register_widget(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, N_GUI_WIDGET* w) {
243 __n_assert(ctx, return);
244 __n_assert(w, return);
245 char key[32];
246 snprintf(key, sizeof(key), "%d", w->id);
247 ht_put_ptr(ctx->widgets_by_id, key, w, NULL, NULL);
248}
249
251static int _items_grow(N_GUI_LISTITEM** items, const size_t* nb, size_t* cap) {
252 if (*nb >= *cap) {
253 size_t new_cap = (*cap == 0) ? 8 : (*cap) * 2;
254 if (new_cap < *cap) return 0; /* overflow */
255 N_GUI_LISTITEM* tmp = NULL;
256 Malloc(tmp, N_GUI_LISTITEM, new_cap);
257 if (!tmp) return 0;
258 if (*items && *nb > 0) {
259 memcpy(tmp, *items, (*nb) * sizeof(N_GUI_LISTITEM));
260 }
261 FreeNoLog(*items);
262 *items = tmp;
263 *cap = new_cap;
264 }
265 return 1;
266}
267
269static N_GUI_WIDGET* _new_widget(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int type, float x, float y, float w, float h) {
270 __n_assert(ctx, return NULL);
271 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = NULL;
272 Malloc(wgt, N_GUI_WIDGET, 1);
273 __n_assert(wgt, return NULL);
274 wgt->id = ctx->next_widget_id++;
275 wgt->type = type;
276 wgt->x = x;
277 wgt->y = y;
278 wgt->w = w;
279 wgt->h = h;
280 wgt->state = N_GUI_STATE_IDLE;
281 wgt->visible = 1;
282 wgt->enabled = 1;
283 wgt->theme = ctx->default_theme;
284 wgt->font = NULL;
285 wgt->data = NULL;
286 return wgt;
287}

289/* THEME */
290
295N_GUI_THEME n_gui_default_theme(void) {
296 N_GUI_THEME t;
297 t.bg_normal = al_map_rgba(50, 50, 60, 230);
298 t.bg_hover = al_map_rgba(70, 70, 85, 240);
299 t.bg_active = al_map_rgba(90, 90, 110, 250);
300 t.border_normal = al_map_rgba(120, 120, 140, 255);
301 t.border_hover = al_map_rgba(160, 160, 180, 255);
302 t.border_active = al_map_rgba(200, 200, 220, 255);
303 t.text_normal = al_map_rgba(220, 220, 220, 255);
304 t.text_hover = al_map_rgba(255, 255, 255, 255);
305 t.text_active = al_map_rgba(255, 255, 255, 255);
306 t.border_thickness = 1.0f;
307 t.corner_rx = 4.0f;
308 t.corner_ry = 4.0f;
309 t.selection_color = al_map_rgba(50, 100, 200, 120);
310 return t;
311}
312
329N_GUI_THEME n_gui_make_theme(
330 ALLEGRO_COLOR bg,
331 ALLEGRO_COLOR bg_hover,
332 ALLEGRO_COLOR bg_active,
333 ALLEGRO_COLOR border,
334 ALLEGRO_COLOR border_hover,
335 ALLEGRO_COLOR border_active,
336 ALLEGRO_COLOR text,
337 ALLEGRO_COLOR text_hover,
338 ALLEGRO_COLOR text_active,
339 float border_thickness,
340 float corner_rx,
341 float corner_ry) {
342 N_GUI_THEME t;
343 t.bg_normal = bg;
344 t.bg_hover = bg_hover;
345 t.bg_active = bg_active;
346 t.border_normal = border;
347 t.border_hover = border_hover;
348 t.border_active = border_active;
349 t.text_normal = text;
350 t.text_hover = text_hover;
351 t.text_active = text_active;
352 t.border_thickness = border_thickness;
353 t.corner_rx = corner_rx;
354 t.corner_ry = corner_ry;
355 t.selection_color = al_map_rgba(50, 100, 200, 120);
356 return t;
357}
358
362static ALLEGRO_COLOR _color_with_alpha(ALLEGRO_COLOR c, float a) {
363 c.a = a;
364 return c;
365}
366
372N_GUI_THEME n_gui_default_tb_btn_theme(void) {
373 N_GUI_THEME t;
374 t.bg_normal = al_map_rgba(0, 0, 0, 0);
375 t.bg_hover = al_map_rgba(255, 255, 255, 40);
376 t.bg_active = al_map_rgba(255, 255, 255, 80);
377 t.border_normal = al_map_rgba(0, 0, 0, 0);
378 t.border_hover = al_map_rgba(0, 0, 0, 0);
379 t.border_active = al_map_rgba(0, 0, 0, 0);
380 t.text_normal = al_map_rgba(200, 200, 200, 255);
381 t.text_hover = al_map_rgba(255, 255, 255, 255);
382 t.text_active = al_map_rgba(255, 255, 255, 255);
383 t.border_thickness = 0;
384 t.corner_rx = 2.0f;
385 t.corner_ry = 2.0f;
386 t.selection_color = al_map_rgba(0, 0, 0, 0);
387 return t;
388}
389
395N_GUI_THEME n_gui_default_tb_close_theme(void) {
396 N_GUI_THEME t = n_gui_default_tb_btn_theme();
397 t.bg_hover = al_map_rgba(232, 17, 35, 220);
398 t.bg_active = al_map_rgba(200, 10, 25, 255);
399 return t;
400}
401
402void n_gui_set_default_theme(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, N_GUI_THEME theme) {
403 if (!ctx) return;
404 ctx->default_theme = theme;
405
406 /* Derive scrollbar colors from the theme so they stay in sync */
407 ctx->style.scrollbar_track_color =
408 _color_with_alpha(theme.bg_normal, 0.78f);
409 ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_color =
410 _color_with_alpha(theme.border_normal, 0.86f);
411 ctx->style.global_scrollbar_track_color =
412 _color_with_alpha(theme.bg_active, 0.78f);
413 ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_color =
414 _color_with_alpha(theme.border_normal, 0.86f);
415 ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_border_color =
416 _color_with_alpha(theme.text_normal, 0.50f);
417
418 /* Derive titlebar button glyph colors from the theme */
419 ctx->default_tb_btn_theme.text_normal = _color_with_alpha(theme.text_normal, 0.80f);
420 ctx->default_tb_btn_theme.text_hover = theme.text_hover;
421 ctx->default_tb_btn_theme.text_active = theme.text_active;
422 ctx->default_tb_close_theme.text_normal = _color_with_alpha(theme.text_normal, 0.80f);
423 ctx->default_tb_close_theme.text_hover = theme.text_hover;
424 ctx->default_tb_close_theme.text_active = theme.text_active;
425}
426
427/* STYLE DEFAULTS */
428
432N_GUI_STYLE n_gui_default_style(void) {
433 N_GUI_STYLE s;
434
435 /* tooltips */
436 s.tooltip_delay = 0.6f;
437 s.tooltip_bg = al_map_rgba(28, 30, 36, 240);
438 s.tooltip_border = al_map_rgb(110, 115, 130);
439 s.tooltip_fg = al_map_rgb(225, 225, 230);
440
441 /* window chrome */
442 s.titlebar_h = 28.0f;
443 s.min_win_w = 120.0f;
444 s.min_win_h = 60.0f;
445 s.title_padding = 8.0f;
446 s.title_max_w_reserve = 16.0f;
447
448 /* titlebar buttons */
449 s.tb_btn_size = 0.0f;
450 s.tb_btn_spacing = 2.0f;
451 s.tb_btn_right_margin = 4.0f;
452 s.tb_btn_glyph_thickness = 1.5f;
453
454 /* window auto-scrollbar */
455 s.scrollbar_size = 12.0f;
456 s.scrollbar_thumb_min = 16.0f;
457 s.scrollbar_thumb_padding = 2.0f;
458 s.scrollbar_thumb_corner_r = 3.0f;
459 s.scrollbar_track_color = al_map_rgba(40, 40, 50, 200);
460 s.scrollbar_thumb_color = al_map_rgba(120, 120, 140, 220);
461
462 /* global display scrollbar */
463 s.global_scrollbar_size = 14.0f;
464 s.global_scrollbar_thumb_min = 20.0f;
465 s.global_scrollbar_thumb_padding = 2.0f;
466 s.global_scrollbar_thumb_corner_r = 4.0f;
467 s.global_scrollbar_border_thickness = 1.0f;
468 s.global_scrollbar_track_color = al_map_rgba(30, 30, 40, 200);
469 s.global_scrollbar_thumb_color = al_map_rgba(100, 100, 120, 220);
470 s.global_scrollbar_thumb_border_color = al_map_rgba(140, 140, 160, 255);
471
472 /* resize grip */
473 s.grip_size = 12.0f;
474 s.grip_line_thickness = 1.0f;
475 s.grip_color = al_map_rgba(160, 160, 180, 200);
476
477 /* slider */
478 s.slider_track_size = 6.0f;
479 s.slider_track_corner_r = 3.0f;
480 s.slider_track_border_thickness = 1.0f;
481 s.slider_handle_min_r = 4.0f;
482 s.slider_handle_edge_offset = 2.0f;
483 s.slider_handle_border_thickness = 1.5f;
484 s.slider_value_label_offset = 8.0f;
485
486 /* text area */
487 s.textarea_padding = 4.0f;
488 s.textarea_cursor_width = 2.0f;
489 s.textarea_cursor_blink_period = 1.0f;
490
491 /* checkbox */
492 s.checkbox_max_size = 20.0f;
493 s.checkbox_mark_margin = 4.0f;
494 s.checkbox_mark_thickness = 2.0f;
495 s.checkbox_label_gap = 10.0f;
496 s.checkbox_label_offset = 6.0f;
497
498 /* radio list */
499 s.radio_circle_min_r = 4.0f;
500 s.radio_circle_border_thickness = 1.5f;
501 s.radio_inner_offset = 3.0f;
502 s.radio_label_gap = 6.0f;
503
504 /* list items */
505 s.listbox_default_item_height = 20.0f;
506 s.radiolist_default_item_height = 22.0f;
507 s.combobox_max_visible = 6;
508 s.dropmenu_max_visible = 12;
509 s.item_text_padding = 6.0f;
510 s.item_selection_inset = 1.0f;
511 s.item_height_pad = 4.0f;
512
513 /* dropdown arrow */
514 s.dropdown_arrow_reserve = 16.0f;
515 s.dropdown_arrow_thickness = 1.5f;
516 s.dropdown_arrow_half_h = 3.0f;
517 s.dropdown_arrow_half_w = 5.0f;
518 s.dropdown_border_thickness = 1.0f;
519
520 /* label */
521 s.label_padding = 4.0f;
522 s.link_underline_thickness = 1.0f;
523 s.link_color_normal = al_map_rgba(80, 140, 220, 255);
524 s.link_color_hover = al_map_rgba(120, 180, 255, 255);
525
526 /* scroll step */
527 s.scroll_step = 20.0f;
528 s.global_scroll_step = 30.0f;
529
530 /* combobox auto-width cap */
531 s.combobox_max_dropdown_width = 0.0f; /* 0 = clamp to display width */
532
533 return s;
534}
535
536/* CONTEXT */
537
543N_GUI_CTX* n_gui_new_ctx(ALLEGRO_FONT* default_font) {
544 __n_assert(default_font, return NULL);
545 N_GUI_CTX* ctx = NULL;
546 Malloc(ctx, N_GUI_CTX, 1);
547 __n_assert(ctx, return NULL);
548 ctx->windows = new_generic_list(UNLIMITED_LIST_ITEMS);
549 if (!ctx->windows) {
550 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_gui_new_ctx: failed to allocate window list");
551 Free(ctx);
552 return NULL;
553 }
554 ctx->widgets_by_id = new_ht(256);
555 if (!ctx->widgets_by_id) {
556 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_gui_new_ctx: failed to allocate widget hash table");
557 list_destroy(&ctx->windows);
558 Free(ctx);
559 return NULL;
560 }
561 ctx->next_widget_id = 1;
562 ctx->next_window_id = 1;
563 ctx->default_font = default_font;
564 ctx->default_theme = n_gui_default_theme();
565 ctx->default_tb_btn_theme = n_gui_default_tb_btn_theme();
566 ctx->default_tb_close_theme = n_gui_default_tb_close_theme();
567 ctx->focused_widget_id = -1;
568 ctx->tooltip_widget_id = -1;
569 ctx->tooltip_armed_at = 0.0;
570 ctx->tooltip_anchor_x = -10000;
571 ctx->tooltip_anchor_y = -10000;
572 ctx->mouse_x = 0;
573 ctx->mouse_y = 0;
574 ctx->mouse_b1 = 0;
575 ctx->mouse_b1_prev = 0;
576 ctx->open_combobox_id = -1;
577 ctx->scrollbar_drag_widget_id = -1;
578 ctx->open_dropmenu_id = -1;
579 ctx->display_w = 0;
580 ctx->display_h = 0;
581 ctx->global_scroll_x = 0;
582 ctx->global_scroll_y = 0;
583 ctx->gui_bounds_w = 0;
584 ctx->gui_bounds_h = 0;
585 ctx->dpi_scale = 1.0f;
586 ctx->virtual_w = 0;
587 ctx->virtual_h = 0;
588 ctx->gui_scale = 1.0f;
589 ctx->gui_offset_x = 0;
590 ctx->gui_offset_y = 0;
591 ctx->global_vscroll_drag = 0;
592 ctx->global_hscroll_drag = 0;
593 ctx->style = n_gui_default_style();
594 ctx->display = NULL;
595 ctx->selected_label_id = -1;
596 ctx->resize_mode = N_GUI_RESIZE_VIRTUAL;
597 ctx->ref_display_w = 0.0f;
598 ctx->ref_display_h = 0.0f;
599 ctx->pending_layout = NULL;
600 ctx->pending_layout_count = 0;
601 return ctx;
602}
603
608void n_gui_destroy_ctx(N_GUI_CTX** ctx) {
609 __n_assert(ctx && *ctx, return);
610 if ((*ctx)->windows) {
611 list_destroy(&(*ctx)->windows);
612 }
613 if ((*ctx)->widgets_by_id) {
614 destroy_ht(&(*ctx)->widgets_by_id);
615 }
616 FreeNoLog((*ctx)->pending_layout);
617 Free((*ctx));
618}
619
620/* ADAPTIVE RESIZE HELPERS */
621
623static void _n_gui_window_capture_normalized(const N_GUI_CTX* ctx, N_GUI_WINDOW* win) {
624 float dw = ctx->ref_display_w;
625 float dh = ctx->ref_display_h;
626 if (dw <= 0) dw = ctx->display_w;
627 if (dh <= 0) dh = ctx->display_h;
628 if (dw <= 0 || dh <= 0) return;
629
630 win->norm_x = win->x / dw;
631 win->norm_y = win->y / dh;
632 win->norm_w = win->w / dw;
633 win->norm_h = win->h / dh;
634
635 /* capture widget normalized coords relative to window */
636 if (win->resize_policy == N_GUI_WIN_RESIZE_SCALE && win->w > 0 && win->h > 0) {
637 list_foreach(wnode, win->widgets) {
638 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = (N_GUI_WIDGET*)wnode->ptr;
639 wgt->norm_x = wgt->x / win->w;
640 wgt->norm_y = wgt->y / win->h;
641 wgt->norm_w = wgt->w / win->w;
642 wgt->norm_h = wgt->h / win->h;
643 }
644 }
645}
646
648static void _n_gui_widget_capture_normalized(const N_GUI_WINDOW* win, N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt) {
649 if (win->w > 0 && win->h > 0) {
650 wgt->norm_x = wgt->x / win->w;
651 wgt->norm_y = wgt->y / win->h;
652 wgt->norm_w = wgt->w / win->w;
653 wgt->norm_h = wgt->h / win->h;
654 }
655}
656
657/* WINDOW MANAGEMENT */
658
659static void _sort_windows_by_zorder(N_GUI_CTX* ctx);
660
665int n_gui_add_window(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, const char* title, float x, float y, float w, float h) {
666 __n_assert(ctx, return -1);
667 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = NULL;
668 Malloc(win, N_GUI_WINDOW, 1);
669 __n_assert(win, return -1);
670 win->id = ctx->next_window_id++;
671 if (title) {
672 strncpy(win->title, title, N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1);
673 win->title[N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1] = '\0';
674 } else {
675 win->title[0] = '\0';
676 }
677 win->x = x;
678 win->y = y;
679 win->w = w;
680 win->h = h;
681 win->titlebar_h = ctx->style.titlebar_h;
682 win->state = N_GUI_WIN_OPEN;
683 win->widgets = new_generic_list(UNLIMITED_LIST_ITEMS);
684 if (!win->widgets) {
685 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_gui_add_window: failed to allocate widget list");
686 Free(win);
687 return -1;
688 }
689 win->theme = ctx->default_theme;
690 win->font = NULL;
691 win->drag_ox = 0;
692 win->drag_oy = 0;
693 win->min_w = ctx->style.min_win_w;
694 win->min_h = ctx->style.min_win_h;
695 win->flags = 0;
696 win->scroll_x = 0.0f;
697 win->scroll_y = 0.0f;
698 win->content_w = 0.0f;
699 win->content_h = 0.0f;
700 win->z_order = N_GUI_ZORDER_NORMAL;
701 win->z_value = 0;
702 win->autofit_flags = 0;
703 win->autofit_border = 0.0f;
704 win->autofit_origin_x = x;
705 win->autofit_origin_y = y;
706 win->resize_policy = N_GUI_WIN_RESIZE_NONE;
707 win->norm_x = 0.0f;
708 win->norm_y = 0.0f;
709 win->norm_w = 0.0f;
710 win->norm_h = 0.0f;
711 memset(&win->tb_buttons, 0, sizeof(N_GUI_TB_BUTTONS));
712 win->tb_buttons.btn_theme = ctx->default_tb_btn_theme;
713 win->tb_buttons.close_theme = ctx->default_tb_close_theme;
714 /* Cross-session restore for lazily-created windows: if the loaded layout
715 * carried a position for a window that did NOT exist at load time (so it
716 * couldn't be matched then), apply that saved (x,y) the first time a
717 * window with this title is created. Consume-once so subsequent
718 * destroy+recreate rebuilds keep the caller's (possibly user-dragged)
719 * position instead of snapping back to the file. Only position is
720 * applied, size/state stay caller-driven. */
721 if (ctx->pending_layout && win->title[0]) {
722 for (int i = 0; i < ctx->pending_layout_count; i++) {
723 if (!ctx->pending_layout[i].consumed &&
724 strncmp(ctx->pending_layout[i].title, win->title, N_GUI_ID_MAX) == 0) {
725 win->x = ctx->pending_layout[i].x;
726 win->y = ctx->pending_layout[i].y;
727 if (ctx->display_w > 0.0f && (win->x < 0.0f || win->x > ctx->display_w)) win->x = 0.0f;
728 if (ctx->display_h > 0.0f && (win->y < 0.0f || win->y > ctx->display_h)) win->y = 0.0f;
729 ctx->pending_layout[i].consumed = 1;
730 break;
731 }
732 }
733 }
734 list_push(ctx->windows, win, _destroy_window);
735 if (ctx->resize_mode == N_GUI_RESIZE_ADAPTIVE) {
736 _n_gui_window_capture_normalized(ctx, win);
737 }
738 /* Re-sort so z-order groups hold from the moment of creation: without
739 * this, a freshly added NORMAL window sits at the list tail and is
740 * drawn ABOVE every ALWAYS_ON_TOP window until some later
741 * raise/lower/set_zorder call happens to re-sort the list. The sort is
742 * stable, so the new window still lands on top of its own group. */
743 _sort_windows_by_zorder(ctx);
744 return win->id;
745}
746
750N_GUI_WINDOW* n_gui_get_window(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
751 LIST_NODE* node = _find_window_node(ctx, window_id);
752 if (node) return (N_GUI_WINDOW*)node->ptr;
753 return NULL;
754}
755
759void n_gui_close_window(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
760 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
761 if (win) win->state &= ~N_GUI_WIN_OPEN;
762}
763
767void n_gui_open_window(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
768 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
769 if (win) win->state |= N_GUI_WIN_OPEN;
770}
771
775void n_gui_minimize_window(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
776 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
777 if (win) win->state ^= N_GUI_WIN_MINIMISED;
778}
779
787void n_gui_maximize_window(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
788 __n_assert(ctx, return);
789 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
790 if (!win) return;
791
792 if (win->state & N_GUI_WIN_MAXIMISED) {
793 /* restore */
794 win->x = win->tb_buttons.restore_x;
795 win->y = win->tb_buttons.restore_y;
796 win->w = win->tb_buttons.restore_w;
797 win->h = win->tb_buttons.restore_h;
798 win->state &= ~N_GUI_WIN_MAXIMISED;
799 } else {
800 /* save current geometry */
801 win->tb_buttons.restore_x = win->x;
802 win->tb_buttons.restore_y = win->y;
803 win->tb_buttons.restore_w = win->w;
804 win->tb_buttons.restore_h = win->h;
805 /* clear minimised */
806 win->state &= ~N_GUI_WIN_MINIMISED;
807 /* expand to display/virtual size */
808 win->x = 0;
809 win->y = 0;
810 win->w = (ctx->virtual_w > 0) ? ctx->virtual_w : ctx->display_w;
811 win->h = (ctx->virtual_h > 0) ? ctx->virtual_h : ctx->display_h;
812 win->state |= N_GUI_WIN_MAXIMISED;
813 }
814 if (ctx->resize_mode == N_GUI_RESIZE_ADAPTIVE) {
815 _n_gui_window_capture_normalized(ctx, win);
816 }
817}
818
823int n_gui_window_is_maximised(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
824 __n_assert(ctx, return 0);
825 const N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
826 if (!win) return 0;
827 return (win->state & N_GUI_WIN_MAXIMISED) ? 1 : 0;
828}
829
833void n_gui_window_set_close_callback(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, void (*on_close)(int, void*), void* user_data) {
834 __n_assert(ctx, return);
835 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
836 if (!win) return;
837 win->tb_buttons.on_close = on_close;
838 win->tb_buttons.on_close_user_data = user_data;
839}

848void n_gui_window_set_content_draw_callback(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, void (*on_content_draw)(int, void*), void* user_data) {
849 __n_assert(ctx, return);
850 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
851 if (!win) return;
852 win->on_content_draw = on_content_draw;
853 win->on_content_draw_data = user_data;
854}
855
859void n_gui_window_set_minimize_callback(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, void (*on_minimize)(int, void*), void* user_data) {
860 __n_assert(ctx, return);
861 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
862 if (!win) return;
863 win->tb_buttons.on_minimize = on_minimize;
864 win->tb_buttons.on_minimize_user_data = user_data;
865}
866
870void n_gui_window_set_maximize_callback(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, void (*on_maximize)(int, void*), void* user_data) {
871 __n_assert(ctx, return);
872 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
873 if (!win) return;
874 win->tb_buttons.on_maximize = on_maximize;
875 win->tb_buttons.on_maximize_user_data = user_data;

877
881void n_gui_window_set_tb_btn_theme(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, N_GUI_THEME theme) {
882 __n_assert(ctx, return);
883 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
884 if (!win) return;
885 win->tb_buttons.btn_theme = theme;
886}
887
891void n_gui_window_set_tb_close_theme(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, N_GUI_THEME theme) {
892 __n_assert(ctx, return);
893 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
894 if (!win) return;
895 win->tb_buttons.close_theme = theme;
896}
897
901void n_gui_window_set_tb_button_bitmaps(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, int btn_type, ALLEGRO_BITMAP* normal, ALLEGRO_BITMAP* hover, ALLEGRO_BITMAP* active) {
902 __n_assert(ctx, return);
903 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
904 if (!win) return;
905 if (btn_type == N_GUI_TB_BTN_MINIMIZE) {
906 win->tb_buttons.minimize_bitmap = normal;
907 win->tb_buttons.minimize_hover_bitmap = hover;
908 win->tb_buttons.minimize_active_bitmap = active;
909 } else if (btn_type == N_GUI_TB_BTN_MAXIMIZE) {
910 win->tb_buttons.maximize_bitmap = normal;
911 win->tb_buttons.maximize_hover_bitmap = hover;
912 win->tb_buttons.maximize_active_bitmap = active;
913 } else if (btn_type == N_GUI_TB_BTN_CLOSE) {
914 win->tb_buttons.close_bitmap = normal;
915 win->tb_buttons.close_hover_bitmap = hover;
916 win->tb_buttons.close_active_bitmap = active;
917 }
918}
919
920/* Return the group ordinal for a window's z-order:
921 * 0 = ALWAYS_BEHIND, 1 = FIXED, 2 = NORMAL, 3 = ALWAYS_ON_TOP, 4 = POPUP.
922 * Ordering is ALWAYS_BEHIND -> FIXED -> NORMAL -> ALWAYS_ON_TOP -> POPUP. */
923static int _zorder_group(const N_GUI_WINDOW* w) {
924 if (!w) return 2; /* treat NULL as NORMAL */
925 switch (w->z_order) {
926 case N_GUI_ZORDER_ALWAYS_BEHIND:
927 return 0;
928 case N_GUI_ZORDER_FIXED:
929 return 1;
930 case N_GUI_ZORDER_ALWAYS_ON_TOP:
931 return 3;
932 case N_GUI_ZORDER_POPUP:
933 return 4;
934 default:
935 return 2;
936 }
937}
938
944static void _sort_windows_by_zorder(N_GUI_CTX* ctx) {
945 if (!ctx || !ctx->windows || ctx->windows->nb_items < 2) return;
946
947 /* Sort by (group, z_value) so that group ordering is always respected:
948 * ALWAYS_BEHIND windows always precede FIXED, which always precede NORMAL,
949 * which always precede ALWAYS_ON_TOP, regardless of z_value magnitude.
950 * Within the FIXED group, windows are ordered by z_value (lower = behind).
951 * Within the same (group, z_value), list order is preserved (stable sort). */
952
953 /* collect into array for stable sort */
954 int n = (int)ctx->windows->nb_items;
955 N_GUI_WINDOW** arr = NULL;
956 Malloc(arr, N_GUI_WINDOW*, (size_t)n);
957 if (!arr) return;
958
959 int idx = 0;
960 list_foreach(node, ctx->windows) {
961 arr[idx++] = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)node->ptr;
962 }
963
964 /* stable insertion sort by (group, z_value) */
965 for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) {
966 N_GUI_WINDOW* tmp = arr[i];
967 int gi = _zorder_group(tmp);
968 int j = i - 1;
969 while (j >= 0) {
970 int gj = _zorder_group(arr[j]);
971 /* z_value secondary sort applies only within the FIXED group (ordinal 1) */
972 if (gj > gi || (gj == gi && gi == 1 && arr[j]->z_value > tmp->z_value)) {
973 arr[j + 1] = arr[j];
974 j--;
975 } else {
976 break;
977 }
978 }
979 arr[j + 1] = tmp;
980 }
981
982 /* rebuild list in sorted order */
983 /* detach all nodes without destroying windows */
984 while (ctx->windows->nb_items > 0) {
985 LIST_NODE* node = ctx->windows->start;
986 node->destroy_func = NULL;
987 remove_list_node_f(ctx->windows, node);
988 }
989 for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
990 list_push(ctx->windows, arr[i], _destroy_window);
991 }
992 Free(arr);
993}
994
1002void n_gui_raise_window(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
1003 __n_assert(ctx, return);
1004 LIST_NODE* node = _find_window_node(ctx, window_id);
1005 if (!node) return;
1006 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)node->ptr;
1007 /* only NORMAL and POPUP windows can be freely raised (within their group) */
1008 if (win->z_order != N_GUI_ZORDER_NORMAL && win->z_order != N_GUI_ZORDER_POPUP) return;
1009 /* remove from list without destroying, then push to end */
1010 node->destroy_func = NULL;
1011 remove_list_node_f(ctx->windows, node);
1012 list_push(ctx->windows, win, _destroy_window);
1013 _sort_windows_by_zorder(ctx);
1014}
1015
1020void n_gui_lower_window(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
1021 __n_assert(ctx, return);
1022 LIST_NODE* node = _find_window_node(ctx, window_id);
1023 if (!node) return;
1024 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)node->ptr;
1025 if (win->z_order != N_GUI_ZORDER_NORMAL) return;
1026 node->destroy_func = NULL;
1027 remove_list_node_f(ctx->windows, node);
1028 list_unshift(ctx->windows, win, _destroy_window);
1029 _sort_windows_by_zorder(ctx);
1030}
1031
1039int n_gui_get_topmost_open_window(const N_GUI_CTX* ctx) {
1040 __n_assert(ctx, return -1);
1041 if (!ctx->windows) return -1;
1042 for (const LIST_NODE* node = ctx->windows->end; node; node = node->prev) {
1043 const N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (const N_GUI_WINDOW*)node->ptr;
1044 if (win && (win->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN)
1045 && !(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_MINIMISED)) {
1046 return win->id;
1047 }
1048 }
1049 return -1;
1050}
1051
1060void n_gui_focus_window(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
1061 __n_assert(ctx, return);
1062 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
1063 if (!win) return;
1064 n_gui_raise_window(ctx, window_id);
1065 int target = -1;
1066 if (win->widgets) {
1067 list_foreach(node, win->widgets) {
1068 const N_GUI_WIDGET* w = (const N_GUI_WIDGET*)node->ptr;
1069 if (w && w->visible && w->enabled && _is_focusable_type(w->type)) {
1070 target = w->id;
1071 break;
1072 }
1073 }
1074 }
1075 n_gui_set_focus(ctx, target);
1076}
1077
1082void n_gui_window_set_zorder(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, int z_mode, int z_value) {
1083 __n_assert(ctx, return);
1084 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
1085 if (!win) return;
1086 if (z_mode != N_GUI_ZORDER_NORMAL && z_mode != N_GUI_ZORDER_ALWAYS_ON_TOP &&
1087 z_mode != N_GUI_ZORDER_ALWAYS_BEHIND && z_mode != N_GUI_ZORDER_FIXED &&
1088 z_mode != N_GUI_ZORDER_POPUP) {
1089 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_gui_window_set_zorder: unknown z_mode %d for window %d (expected N_GUI_ZORDER_NORMAL, N_GUI_ZORDER_ALWAYS_ON_TOP, N_GUI_ZORDER_ALWAYS_BEHIND, N_GUI_ZORDER_FIXED, or N_GUI_ZORDER_POPUP), falling back to N_GUI_ZORDER_NORMAL", z_mode, window_id);
1090 z_mode = N_GUI_ZORDER_NORMAL;
1091 }
1092 win->z_order = z_mode;
1093 win->z_value = z_value;
1094 _sort_windows_by_zorder(ctx);
1095}
1096
1100int n_gui_window_get_zorder(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
1101 __n_assert(ctx, return N_GUI_ZORDER_NORMAL);
1102 const N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
1103 if (!win) return N_GUI_ZORDER_NORMAL;
1104 return win->z_order;
1105}
1106
1110int n_gui_window_get_zvalue(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
1111 __n_assert(ctx, return 0);
1112 const N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
1113 if (!win) return 0;
1114 return win->z_value;
1115}
1116
1121int n_gui_add_window_auto(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, const char* title, float x, float y) {
1122 /* start with minimum size, will be expanded by n_gui_window_autosize */
1123 return n_gui_add_window(ctx, title, x, y, ctx->style.min_win_w, ctx->style.min_win_h);
1124}
1125
1129void n_gui_toggle_window(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
1130 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
1131 if (win) win->state ^= N_GUI_WIN_OPEN;
1132}
1133
1138int n_gui_window_is_open(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
1139 const N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
1140 if (win) return (win->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN) ? 1 : 0;
1141 return 0;
1142}
1143
1147void n_gui_window_set_flags(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, int flags) {
1148 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
1149 if (win) win->flags = flags;
1150}
1151
1156int n_gui_window_get_flags(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
1157 const N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
1158 if (win) return win->flags;
1159 return 0;
1160}
1161
1166void n_gui_window_autosize(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
1167 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
1168 if (!win || !win->widgets) return;
1169
1170 float max_right = 0.0f;
1171 float max_bottom = 0.0f;
1172 float pad = 20.0f;
1173
1174 list_foreach(node, win->widgets) {
1175 const N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = (const N_GUI_WIDGET*)node->ptr;
1176 if (!wgt) continue;
1177 float r = wgt->x + wgt->w;
1178 float b = wgt->y + wgt->h;
1179 if (r > max_right) max_right = r;
1180 if (b > max_bottom) max_bottom = b;
1181 }
1182
1183 float new_w = max_right + pad;
1184 float new_h = max_bottom + pad + _win_tbh(win);
1185 if (new_w < win->min_w) new_w = win->min_w;
1186 if (new_h < win->min_h) new_h = win->min_h;
1187 win->w = new_w;
1188 win->h = new_h;
1189}
1190
1195void n_gui_window_set_autofit(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, int autofit_flags, float border) {
1196 __n_assert(ctx, return);
1197 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
1198 if (!win) {
1199 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_gui_window_set_autofit: window %d not found", window_id);
1200 return;
1201 }
1202 win->autofit_flags = autofit_flags;
1203 win->autofit_border = border;
1204 /* capture current position as the insertion point for centering */
1205 win->autofit_origin_x = win->x;
1206 win->autofit_origin_y = win->y;
1207}
1208
1214void n_gui_window_apply_autofit(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
1215 __n_assert(ctx, return);
1216 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
1217 if (!win) return;
1218 if (win->autofit_flags == 0) return;
1219 if (!win->widgets) return;
1220
1221 /* compute content bounding box from visible widgets */
1222 float max_right = 0.0f;
1223 float max_bottom = 0.0f;
1224 list_foreach(node, win->widgets) {
1225 const N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = (const N_GUI_WIDGET*)node->ptr;
1226 if (!wgt || !wgt->visible) continue;
1227 float r = wgt->x + wgt->w;
1228 float b = wgt->y + wgt->h;
1229 if (r > max_right) max_right = r;
1230 if (b > max_bottom) max_bottom = b;
1231 }
1232
1233 float border = win->autofit_border;
1234 float tbh = _win_tbh(win);
1235
1236 int center = (win->autofit_flags & N_GUI_AUTOFIT_CENTER) ? 1 : 0;
1237
1238 /* apply width adjustment */
1239 if (win->autofit_flags & N_GUI_AUTOFIT_W) {
1240 float needed_w = max_right + border * 2.0f;
1241 if (needed_w < win->min_w) needed_w = win->min_w;
1242 if (center) {
1243 win->x = win->autofit_origin_x - needed_w / 2.0f;
1244 } else if (win->autofit_flags & N_GUI_AUTOFIT_EXPAND_LEFT) {
1245 win->x -= (needed_w - win->w);
1246 }
1247 win->w = needed_w;
1248 }
1249
1250 /* apply height adjustment */
1251 if (win->autofit_flags & N_GUI_AUTOFIT_H) {
1252 float needed_h = max_bottom + border * 2.0f + tbh;
1253 if (needed_h < win->min_h) needed_h = win->min_h;
1254 if (center) {
1255 win->y = win->autofit_origin_y - needed_h / 2.0f;
1256 } else if (win->autofit_flags & N_GUI_AUTOFIT_EXPAND_UP) {
1257 win->y -= (needed_h - win->h);
1258 }
1259 win->h = needed_h;
1260 }
1261
1262 /* update content extents for scrollbar calculations */
1263 win->content_w = max_right;
1264 win->content_h = max_bottom;
1265}
1266
1268static void _window_update_content_size(N_GUI_WINDOW* win, ALLEGRO_FONT* default_font) {
1269 if (!win || !win->widgets) return;
1270 float max_right = 0.0f;
1271 float max_bottom = 0.0f;
1272 list_foreach(node, win->widgets) {
1273 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = (N_GUI_WIDGET*)node->ptr;
1274 if (!wgt || !wgt->visible) continue;
1275 float r = wgt->x + wgt->w;
1276 float b = wgt->y + wgt->h;
1277 /* for labels in auto-scrollbar windows, use actual text pixel width
1278 * so that horizontal scrollbar appears when text overflows */
1279 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LABEL && (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_AUTO_SCROLLBAR)) {
1280 const N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* lb = (const N_GUI_LABEL_DATA*)wgt->data;
1281 if (lb && lb->text[0] && lb->align != N_GUI_ALIGN_JUSTIFIED) {
1282 ALLEGRO_FONT* font = wgt->font ? wgt->font : default_font;
1283 if (font) {
1284 float tw = _text_w(font, lb->text);
1285 float text_r = wgt->x + tw + 8.0f; /* small padding */
1286 if (text_r > r) r = text_r;
1287 }
1288 }
1289 }
1290 if (r > max_right) max_right = r;
1291 if (b > max_bottom) max_bottom = b;
1292 }
1293 win->content_w = max_right;
1294 win->content_h = max_bottom;
1295}
1296
1297/* WIDGET CREATION */
1298
1303int n_gui_add_button(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, const char* label, float x, float y, float w, float h, int shape, void (*on_click)(int, void*), void* user_data) {
1304 __n_assert(ctx, return -1);
1305 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
1306 __n_assert(win, return -1);
1307
1308 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = _new_widget(ctx, N_GUI_TYPE_BUTTON, x, y, w, h);
1309 __n_assert(wgt, return -1);
1310
1311 N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA* bd = NULL;
1312 Malloc(bd, N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA, 1);
1313 __n_assert(bd, Free(wgt); return -1);
1314 if (label) {
1315 strncpy(bd->label, label, N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1);
1316 bd->label[N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1] = '\0';
1317 }
1318 bd->bitmap = NULL;
1319 bd->bitmap_hover = NULL;
1320 bd->bitmap_active = NULL;
1321 bd->shape = shape;
1322 bd->toggle_mode = 0;
1323 bd->toggled = 0;
1324 bd->keycode = 0;
1325 bd->key_modifiers = 0;
1326 bd->on_click = on_click;
1327 bd->user_data = user_data;
1328 wgt->data = bd;
1329 wgt->norm_x = 0.0f;
1330 wgt->norm_y = 0.0f;
1331 wgt->norm_w = 0.0f;
1332 wgt->norm_h = 0.0f;
1333
1334 list_push(win->widgets, wgt, _destroy_widget);
1335 _n_gui_widget_capture_normalized(win, wgt);
1336 _register_widget(ctx, wgt);
1337 return wgt->id;
1338}
1339
1344int n_gui_add_button_bitmap(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, const char* label, float x, float y, float w, float h, ALLEGRO_BITMAP* normal, ALLEGRO_BITMAP* hover, ALLEGRO_BITMAP* active, void (*on_click)(int, void*), void* user_data) {
1345 int id = n_gui_add_button(ctx, window_id, label, x, y, w, h, N_GUI_SHAPE_BITMAP, on_click, user_data);
1346 if (id < 0) return -1;
1347 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, id);
1348 if (wgt && wgt->data) {
1349 N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA* bd = (N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA*)wgt->data;
1350 bd->bitmap = normal;
1351 bd->bitmap_hover = hover;
1352 bd->bitmap_active = active;
1353 }
1354 return id;
1355}
1356
1372int n_gui_add_toggle_button(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, const char* label, float x, float y, float w, float h, int shape, int initial_state, void (*on_click)(int, void*), void* user_data) {
1373 int id = n_gui_add_button(ctx, window_id, label, x, y, w, h, shape, on_click, user_data);
1374 if (id < 0) return -1;
1375 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, id);
1376 if (wgt && wgt->data) {
1377 N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA* bd = (N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA*)wgt->data;
1378 bd->toggle_mode = 1;
1379 bd->toggled = initial_state ? 1 : 0;
1380 }
1381 return id;
1382}
1383
1388int n_gui_button_is_toggled(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
1389 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1390 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_BUTTON && w->data) {
1391 return ((N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA*)w->data)->toggled;
1392 }
1393 return 0;
1394}
1395
1400void n_gui_button_set_label(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, const char* label) {
1401 if (!label) return;
1402 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1403 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_BUTTON && w->data) {
1404 N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA* bd = (N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA*)w->data;
1405 snprintf(bd->label, sizeof(bd->label), "%s", label);
1406 }
1407}
1408
1419void n_gui_set_widget_tooltip(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, const char* text) {
1420 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1421 if (!w) return;
1422 snprintf(w->tooltip, sizeof(w->tooltip), "%s", text ? text : "");
1423}
1424
1437int n_gui_tooltip_pending(N_GUI_CTX* ctx) {
1438 if (!ctx || ctx->style.tooltip_delay <= 0.0f || ctx->tooltip_widget_id < 0) return 0;
1439 return (al_get_time() - ctx->tooltip_armed_at >= (double)ctx->style.tooltip_delay) ? 2 : 1;
1440}
1441
1443static int _tooltip_widget_at(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, float px, float py) {
1444 int found = -1;
1445 /* ctx->windows is ordered back to front: the last hit wins */
1446 list_foreach(wnode, ctx->windows) {
1447 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
1448 if (!win || !(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN)) continue;
1449 float ox = win->x - win->scroll_x;
1450 float oy = win->y + _win_tbh(win) - win->scroll_y;
1451 list_foreach(wgn, win->widgets) {
1452 const N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = (N_GUI_WIDGET*)wgn->ptr;
1453 if (!wgt || !wgt->visible || !wgt->tooltip[0]) continue;
1454 if (_point_in_rect(px, py, ox + wgt->x, oy + wgt->y, wgt->w, wgt->h))
1455 found = wgt->id;
1456 }
1457 }
1458 return found;
1459}
1460
1477void n_gui_button_set_state_bitmaps(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, ALLEGRO_BITMAP* normal, ALLEGRO_BITMAP* hover, ALLEGRO_BITMAP* active) {
1478 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1479 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_BUTTON && w->data) {
1480 N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA* bd = (N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA*)w->data;
1481 bd->shape = N_GUI_SHAPE_BITMAP;
1482 bd->bitmap = normal;
1483 bd->bitmap_hover = hover;
1484 bd->bitmap_active = active;
1485 }
1486}
1487
1491void n_gui_button_set_toggled(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int toggled) {
1492 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1493 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_BUTTON && w->data) {
1494 ((N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA*)w->data)->toggled = toggled ? 1 : 0;
1495 }
1496}
1497
1504void n_gui_button_set_toggle_mode(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int toggle_mode) {
1505 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1506 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_BUTTON && w->data) {
1507 N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA* bd = (N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA*)w->data;
1508 bd->toggle_mode = toggle_mode ? 1 : 0;
1509 if (!bd->toggle_mode) bd->toggled = 0;
1510 }
1511}
1512
1523void n_gui_button_set_keycode(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int keycode, int modifiers) {
1524 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1525 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_BUTTON && w->data) {
1526 N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA* bd = (N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA*)w->data;
1527 bd->keycode = keycode;
1528 bd->key_modifiers = modifiers & N_GUI_KEY_MOD_MASK;
1529 }
1530}
1531
1533void n_gui_button_set_keycode_focused(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int keycode, int modifiers, const int* sources, int source_count) {
1534 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1535 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_BUTTON && w->data) {
1536 N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA* bd = (N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA*)w->data;
1537 bd->keycode = keycode;
1538 bd->key_modifiers = modifiers & N_GUI_KEY_MOD_MASK;
1539 bd->key_focus_only = 1;
1540 int count = source_count < N_GUI_KEY_SOURCES_MAX ? source_count : N_GUI_KEY_SOURCES_MAX;
1541 for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
1542 bd->key_sources[i] = sources[i];
1543 }
1544 if (count < N_GUI_KEY_SOURCES_MAX) {
1545 bd->key_sources[count] = -1;
1546 }
1547 }
1548}
1549
1554int n_gui_add_slider(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, float x, float y, float w, float h, double min_val, double max_val, double initial, int mode, void (*on_change)(int, double, void*), void* user_data) {
1555 __n_assert(ctx, return -1);
1556 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
1557 __n_assert(win, return -1);
1558
1559 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = _new_widget(ctx, N_GUI_TYPE_SLIDER, x, y, w, h);
1560 __n_assert(wgt, return -1);
1561
1562 N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA* sd = NULL;
1563 Malloc(sd, N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA, 1);
1564 __n_assert(sd, Free(wgt); return -1);
1565 if (mode == N_GUI_SLIDER_PERCENT) {
1566 sd->min_val = 0.0;
1567 sd->max_val = 100.0;
1568 } else {
1569 sd->min_val = min_val;
1570 sd->max_val = max_val;
1571 }
1572 sd->step = 0.0; /* 0 = no step constraint (treated as continuous, snaps with step=1 only when explicitly set) */
1573 sd->value = _clamp(initial, sd->min_val, sd->max_val);
1574 sd->mode = mode;
1575 sd->orientation = N_GUI_SLIDER_H;
1576 sd->on_change = on_change;
1577 sd->user_data = user_data;
1578 sd->value_format[0] = '\0'; /* empty = legacy defaults */
1579 sd->value_visible = 1; /* built-in readout on by default */
1580 wgt->data = sd;
1581 wgt->norm_x = 0.0f;
1582 wgt->norm_y = 0.0f;
1583 wgt->norm_w = 0.0f;
1584 wgt->norm_h = 0.0f;
1585
1586 list_push(win->widgets, wgt, _destroy_widget);
1587 _n_gui_widget_capture_normalized(win, wgt);
1588 _register_widget(ctx, wgt);
1589 return wgt->id;
1590}
1591
1596int n_gui_add_vslider(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, float x, float y, float w, float h, double min_val, double max_val, double initial, int mode, void (*on_change)(int, double, void*), void* user_data) {
1597 int id = n_gui_add_slider(ctx, window_id, x, y, w, h, min_val, max_val, initial, mode, on_change, user_data);
1598 if (id < 0) return -1;
1599 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, id);
1600 if (wgt && wgt->data) {
1601 ((N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA*)wgt->data)->orientation = N_GUI_SLIDER_V;
1602 }
1603 return id;
1604}
1605
1610int n_gui_add_textarea(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, float x, float y, float w, float h, int multiline, size_t char_limit, void (*on_change)(int, const char*, void*), void* user_data) {
1611 __n_assert(ctx, return -1);
1612 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
1613 __n_assert(win, return -1);
1614
1615 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = _new_widget(ctx, N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA, x, y, w, h);
1616 __n_assert(wgt, return -1);
1617
1618 N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* td = NULL;
1619 Malloc(td, N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA, 1);
1620 __n_assert(td, Free(wgt); return -1);
1621 memset(td, 0, sizeof(*td));
1622 td->char_limit = (char_limit > 0) ? char_limit : N_GUI_TEXT_MAX - 1;
1623 td->text_alloc = td->char_limit + 1;
1624 Malloc(td->text, char, td->text_alloc);
1625 __n_assert(td->text, Free(td); Free(wgt); return -1);
1626 td->text[0] = '\0';
1627 td->text_len = 0;
1628 td->multiline = multiline;
1629 td->cursor_pos = 0;
1630 td->sel_start = 0;
1631 td->sel_end = 0;
1632 td->scroll_y = 0;
1633 td->scroll_x = 0.0f;
1634 td->cursor_time = 0.0;
1635 td->bg_bitmap = NULL;
1636 td->mask_char = '\0';
1637 td->on_change = on_change;
1638 td->user_data = user_data;
1639 wgt->data = td;
1640 wgt->norm_x = 0.0f;
1641 wgt->norm_y = 0.0f;
1642 wgt->norm_w = 0.0f;
1643 wgt->norm_h = 0.0f;
1644
1645 list_push(win->widgets, wgt, _destroy_widget);
1646 _n_gui_widget_capture_normalized(win, wgt);
1647 _register_widget(ctx, wgt);
1648 return wgt->id;
1649}

1677 wgt->norm_h = 0.0f;
1678

1681 _register_widget(ctx, wgt);
1682 return wgt->id;
1683}

1894int n_gui_add_label(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, const char* text, float x, float y, float w, float h, int align) {
1895 __n_assert(ctx, return -1);
1896 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
1897 __n_assert(win, return -1);
1898
1899 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = _new_widget(ctx, N_GUI_TYPE_LABEL, x, y, w, h);
1900 __n_assert(wgt, return -1);
1901
1902 N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* lb = NULL;
1903 Malloc(lb, N_GUI_LABEL_DATA, 1);
1904 __n_assert(lb, Free(wgt); return -1);
1905 lb->text[0] = '\0';
1906 if (text) {
1907 strncpy(lb->text, text, N_GUI_TEXT_MAX - 1);
1908 lb->text[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX - 1] = '\0';
1909 _normalize_crlf(lb->text); /* normalize CRLF for Allegro5 compatibility */
1910 }
1911 lb->link[0] = '\0';
1912 lb->align = align;
1913 lb->scroll_y = 0.0f;
1914 lb->sel_start = -1;
1915 lb->sel_end = -1;
1916 lb->sel_dragging = 0;
1917 lb->on_link_click = NULL;
1918 lb->user_data = NULL;
1919 wgt->data = lb;
1920 wgt->norm_x = 0.0f;
1921 wgt->norm_y = 0.0f;
1922 wgt->norm_w = 0.0f;
1923 wgt->norm_h = 0.0f;
1924
1925 list_push(win->widgets, wgt, _destroy_widget);
1926 _n_gui_widget_capture_normalized(win, wgt);
1927 _register_widget(ctx, wgt);
1928 return wgt->id;
1929}

1935int n_gui_add_label_link(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, const char* text, const char* link, float x, float y, float w, float h, int align, void (*on_link_click)(int, const char*, void*), void* user_data) {
1936 int wid = n_gui_add_label(ctx, window_id, text, x, y, w, h, align);
1937 if (wid < 0) return -1;
1938 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, wid);
1939 if (wgt && wgt->data) {
1940 N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* lb = (N_GUI_LABEL_DATA*)wgt->data;
1941 if (link) {
1942 strncpy(lb->link, link, N_GUI_TEXT_MAX - 1);
1943 lb->link[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX - 1] = '\0';
1944 }
1945 lb->on_link_click = on_link_click;
1946 lb->user_data = user_data;
1947 }
1948 return wid;
1949}
1950
1951/* WIDGET ACCESS */
1952
1956N_GUI_WIDGET* n_gui_get_widget(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
1957 __n_assert(ctx, return NULL);
1958 char key[32];
1959 snprintf(key, sizeof(key), "%d", widget_id);
1960 void* ptr = NULL;
1961 if (ht_get_ptr(ctx->widgets_by_id, key, &ptr) == TRUE && ptr) {
1962 return (N_GUI_WIDGET*)ptr;
1963 }
1964 return NULL;
1965}
1966
1970void n_gui_set_widget_theme(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, N_GUI_THEME theme) {
1971 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1972 if (w) w->theme = theme;
1973}
1974
1984void n_gui_reset_all_widget_themes(N_GUI_CTX* ctx) {
1985 if (!ctx || !ctx->windows) return;
1986 list_foreach(wnode, ctx->windows) {
1987 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
1988 if (!win) continue;
1989 win->theme = ctx->default_theme;
1990 win->tb_buttons.btn_theme = ctx->default_tb_btn_theme;
1991 win->tb_buttons.close_theme = ctx->default_tb_close_theme;
1992 if (!win->widgets) continue;
1993 list_foreach(wgn, win->widgets) {
1994 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = (N_GUI_WIDGET*)wgn->ptr;
1995 if (w) w->theme = ctx->default_theme;
1996 }
1997 }
1998}
1999
2003void n_gui_set_widget_visible(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int visible) {
2004 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2005 if (w) w->visible = visible;
2006}
2007
2012void n_gui_set_widget_enabled(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int enabled) {
2013 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2014 if (w) w->enabled = enabled;
2015}
2016
2021int n_gui_is_widget_enabled(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
2022 const N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2023 if (w) return w->enabled;
2024 return 0;
2025}
2026
2033void n_gui_set_focus(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
2034 __n_assert(ctx, return);
2035
2036 /* clear focus from previously focused widget */
2037 if (ctx->focused_widget_id >= 0) {
2038 N_GUI_WIDGET* prev = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->focused_widget_id);
2039 if (prev) prev->state &= ~N_GUI_STATE_FOCUSED;
2040 }
2041
2042 if (widget_id < 0) {
2043 ctx->focused_widget_id = -1;
2044 return;
2045 }
2046
2047 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2048 if (!wgt) {
2049 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_gui_set_focus: widget %d not found", widget_id);
2050 ctx->focused_widget_id = -1;
2051 return;
2052 }
2053
2054 ctx->focused_widget_id = widget_id;
2055 wgt->state |= N_GUI_STATE_FOCUSED;
2056
2057 /* reset cursor blink timer for textareas */
2058 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA && wgt->data) {
2059 N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* td = (N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA*)wgt->data;
2060 td->cursor_time = al_get_time();
2061 }
2062
2063 /* raise the parent window */
2064 list_foreach(wnode, ctx->windows) {
2065 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
2066 if (!win || !win->widgets) continue;
2067 list_foreach(wgnode, win->widgets) {
2068 const N_GUI_WIDGET* w = (const N_GUI_WIDGET*)wgnode->ptr;
2069 if (w && w->id == widget_id) {
2070 if (win->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN) {
2071 n_gui_raise_window(ctx, win->id);
2072 }
2073 return;
2074 }
2075 }
2076 }
2077}
2078
2079/* slider helpers */
2080
2087double n_gui_slider_get_value(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
2088 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2089 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SLIDER && w->data) {
2090 return ((N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA*)w->data)->value;
2091 }
2092 return 0.0;
2093}
2094
2101void n_gui_slider_set_value(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, double value) {
2102 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2103 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SLIDER && w->data) {
2104 N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA* sd = (N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA*)w->data;
2105 if (sd->step > 0.0)
2106 sd->value = _slider_snap_value(value, sd->min_val, sd->max_val, sd->step);
2107 else
2108 sd->value = _clamp(value, sd->min_val, sd->max_val);
2109 }
2110}
2111
2119void n_gui_slider_set_range(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, double min_val, double max_val) {
2120 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2121 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SLIDER && w->data) {
2122 N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA* sd = (N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA*)w->data;
2123 sd->min_val = min_val;
2124 sd->max_val = max_val;
2125 if (sd->step > 0.0)
2126 sd->value = _slider_snap_value(sd->value, min_val, max_val, sd->step);
2127 else
2128 sd->value = _clamp(sd->value, min_val, max_val);
2129 }
2130}
2131
2139void n_gui_slider_set_step(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, double step) {
2140 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2141 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SLIDER && w->data) {
2142 N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA* sd = (N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA*)w->data;
2143 sd->step = step;
2144 if (step > 0.0) {
2145 sd->value = _slider_snap_value(sd->value, sd->min_val, sd->max_val, step);
2146 }
2147 }
2148}
2149
2150void n_gui_slider_set_value_format(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, const char* fmt) {
2151 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2152 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_SLIDER || !w->data) return;
2153 N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA* sd = (N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA*)w->data;
2154 if (!fmt || !fmt[0]) {
2155 sd->value_format[0] = '\0';
2156 } else {
2157 /* snprintf truncates safely at the buffer bound. */
2158 snprintf(sd->value_format, sizeof(sd->value_format), "%s", fmt);
2159 }
2160}
2161
2162void n_gui_slider_set_value_visible(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int visible) {
2163 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2164 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_SLIDER || !w->data) return;
2165 N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA* sd = (N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA*)w->data;
2166 sd->value_visible = visible ? 1 : 0;
2167}
2168
2169/* textarea helpers */
2170
2177const char* n_gui_textarea_get_text(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
2178 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2179 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA && w->data) {
2180 return ((N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA*)w->data)->text;
2181 }
2182 return "";
2183}
2184
2191void n_gui_textarea_set_text(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, const char* text) {
2192 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2193 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA && w->data) {
2194 N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* td = (N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA*)w->data;
2195 if (text) {
2196 strncpy(td->text, text, td->char_limit);
2197 td->text[td->char_limit] = '\0';
2198 _normalize_crlf(td->text); /* normalize CRLF for Allegro5 compatibility */
2199 td->text_len = strlen(td->text);
2200 td->cursor_pos = td->text_len;
2201 } else {
2202 td->text[0] = '\0';
2203 td->text_len = 0;
2204 td->cursor_pos = 0;
2205 }
2206 td->scroll_x = 0.0f;
2207 }
2208}
2209
2210/* checkbox helpers */
2211
2218int n_gui_checkbox_is_checked(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
2219 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2220 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_CHECKBOX && w->data) {
2221 return ((N_GUI_CHECKBOX_DATA*)w->data)->checked;
2222 }
2223 return 0;
2224}
2225
2232void n_gui_checkbox_set_checked(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int checked) {
2233 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2234 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_CHECKBOX && w->data) {
2235 ((N_GUI_CHECKBOX_DATA*)w->data)->checked = checked ? 1 : 0;
2236 }
2237}
2238
2239/* scrollbar helpers */
2240
2247double n_gui_scrollbar_get_pos(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
2248 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2249 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SCROLLBAR && w->data) {
2250 return ((N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_DATA*)w->data)->scroll_pos;
2251 }
2252 return 0.0;
2253}
2254
2261void n_gui_scrollbar_set_pos(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, double pos) {
2262 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2263 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SCROLLBAR && w->data) {
2264 N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_DATA* sb = (N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_DATA*)w->data;
2265 double max_scroll = sb->content_size - sb->viewport_size;
2266 if (max_scroll < 0) max_scroll = 0;
2267 sb->scroll_pos = _clamp(pos, 0, max_scroll);
2268 }
2269}
2270
2278void n_gui_scrollbar_set_sizes(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, double content_size, double viewport_size) {
2279 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2280 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SCROLLBAR && w->data) {
2281 N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_DATA* sb = (N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_DATA*)w->data;
2282 sb->content_size = content_size > 0 ? content_size : 1;
2283 sb->viewport_size = viewport_size > 0 ? viewport_size : 1;
2284 double max_scroll = sb->content_size - sb->viewport_size;
2285 if (max_scroll < 0) max_scroll = 0;
2286 sb->scroll_pos = _clamp(sb->scroll_pos, 0, max_scroll);
2287 }
2288}
2289
2290/* listbox helpers */
2291
2299int n_gui_listbox_add_item(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, const char* text) {
2300 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2301 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX || !w->data) return -1;
2302 N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* ld = (N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)w->data;
2303 if (!_items_grow(&ld->items, &ld->nb_items, &ld->items_capacity)) return -1;
2304 N_GUI_LISTITEM* item = &ld->items[ld->nb_items];
2305 item->text[0] = '\0';
2306 if (text) {
2307 strncpy(item->text, text, N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1);
2308 item->text[N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1] = '\0';
2309 }
2310 item->selected = 0;
2311 ld->nb_items++;
2312 return (int)(ld->nb_items - 1);
2313}
2314
2322int n_gui_listbox_remove_item(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int index) {
2323 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2324 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX || !w->data) return -1;
2325 N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* ld = (N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)w->data;
2326 if (index < 0 || (size_t)index >= ld->nb_items) return -1;
2327 if ((size_t)index < ld->nb_items - 1) {
2328 memmove(&ld->items[index], &ld->items[index + 1],
2329 (ld->nb_items - (size_t)index - 1) * sizeof(N_GUI_LISTITEM));
2330 }
2331 ld->nb_items--;
2332 /* clamp scroll_offset after removal */
2333 if (ld->nb_items == 0) {
2334 ld->scroll_offset = 0;
2335 } else if (ld->scroll_offset > 0 && (size_t)ld->scroll_offset >= ld->nb_items) {
2336 ld->scroll_offset = (int)(ld->nb_items - 1);
2337 }
2338 return 0;
2339}
2340
2346void n_gui_listbox_clear(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
2347 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2348 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX && w->data) {
2349 N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* ld = (N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)w->data;
2350 ld->nb_items = 0;
2351 ld->scroll_offset = 0;
2352 }
2353}
2354
2361int n_gui_listbox_get_count(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
2362 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2363 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX && w->data) {
2364 return (int)((N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)w->data)->nb_items;
2365 }
2366 return 0;
2367}
2368
2376const char* n_gui_listbox_get_item_text(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int index) {
2377 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2378 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX && w->data) {
2379 N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* ld = (N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)w->data;
2380 if (index >= 0 && (size_t)index < ld->nb_items) {
2381 return ld->items[index].text;
2382 }
2383 }
2384 return "";
2385}
2386
2393int n_gui_listbox_get_selected(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
2394 const N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2395 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX && w->data) {
2396 const N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* ld = (const N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)w->data;
2397 for (size_t i = 0; i < ld->nb_items; i++) {
2398 if (ld->items[i].selected) return (int)i;
2399 }
2400 }
2401 return -1;
2402}
2403
2411int n_gui_listbox_is_selected(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int index) {
2412 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2413 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX && w->data) {
2414 N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* ld = (N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)w->data;
2415 if (index >= 0 && (size_t)index < ld->nb_items) {
2416 return ld->items[index].selected;
2417 }
2418 }
2419 return 0;
2420}
2421
2429void n_gui_listbox_set_selected(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int index, int selected) {
2430 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2431 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX || !w->data) return;
2432 N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* ld = (N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)w->data;
2433 if (index < 0 || (size_t)index >= ld->nb_items) return;
2434 if (ld->selection_mode == N_GUI_SELECT_SINGLE && selected) {
2435 for (size_t i = 0; i < ld->nb_items; i++) ld->items[i].selected = 0;
2436 }
2437 ld->items[index].selected = selected ? 1 : 0;
2438}
2439
2440int n_gui_listbox_get_scroll_offset(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
2441 const N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2442 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX || !w->data) return 0;
2443 const N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* ld = (const N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)w->data;
2444 return ld->scroll_offset;
2445}
2446
2447void n_gui_listbox_set_scroll_offset(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int offset) {
2448 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2449 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX || !w->data) return;
2450 N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* ld = (N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)w->data;
2451 int max_offset = (int)ld->nb_items - (int)(w->h / ld->item_height);
2452 if (max_offset < 0) max_offset = 0;
2453 if (offset < 0) offset = 0;
2454 if (offset > max_offset) offset = max_offset;
2455 ld->scroll_offset = offset;
2456}
2457
2458/* radiolist helpers */
2459
2467int n_gui_radiolist_add_item(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, const char* text) {
2468 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2469 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_RADIOLIST || !w->data) return -1;
2470 N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA* rd = (N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA*)w->data;
2471 if (!_items_grow(&rd->items, &rd->nb_items, &rd->items_capacity)) return -1;
2472 N_GUI_LISTITEM* item = &rd->items[rd->nb_items];
2473 item->text[0] = '\0';
2474 if (text) {
2475 strncpy(item->text, text, N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1);
2476 item->text[N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1] = '\0';
2477 }
2478 item->selected = 0;
2479 rd->nb_items++;
2480 return (int)(rd->nb_items - 1);
2481}
2482
2488void n_gui_radiolist_clear(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
2489 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2490 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_RADIOLIST && w->data) {
2491 N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA* rd = (N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA*)w->data;
2492 rd->nb_items = 0;
2493 rd->selected_index = -1;
2494 rd->scroll_offset = 0;
2495 }
2496}
2497
2504int n_gui_radiolist_get_selected(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
2505 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2506 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_RADIOLIST && w->data) {
2507 return ((N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA*)w->data)->selected_index;
2508 }
2509 return -1;
2510}
2511
2518void n_gui_radiolist_set_selected(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int index) {
2519 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2520 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_RADIOLIST && w->data) {
2521 N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA* rd = (N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA*)w->data;
2522 if (index >= -1 && (index == -1 || (size_t)index < rd->nb_items)) {
2523 rd->selected_index = index;
2524 }
2525 }
2526}
2527
2528/* combobox helpers */
2529
2535void n_gui_combobox_clear(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
2536 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2537 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_COMBOBOX || !w->data) return;
2538 N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA* cd = (N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA*)w->data;
2539 if (cd->items && cd->nb_items > 0) {
2540 memset(cd->items, 0, cd->nb_items * sizeof(N_GUI_LISTITEM));
2541 }
2542 cd->nb_items = 0;
2543 cd->selected_index = -1;
2544 cd->scroll_offset = 0;
2545 cd->is_open = 0;
2546}
2547
2548int n_gui_combobox_add_item(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, const char* text) {
2549 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2550 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_COMBOBOX || !w->data) return -1;
2551 N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA* cd = (N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA*)w->data;
2552 if (!_items_grow(&cd->items, &cd->nb_items, &cd->items_capacity)) return -1;
2553 N_GUI_LISTITEM* item = &cd->items[cd->nb_items];
2554 item->text[0] = '\0';
2555 if (text) {
2556 strncpy(item->text, text, N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1);
2557 item->text[N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1] = '\0';
2558 }
2559 item->selected = 0;
2560 cd->nb_items++;
2561 return (int)(cd->nb_items - 1);
2562}
2563
2570int n_gui_combobox_get_selected(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
2571 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2572 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_COMBOBOX && w->data) {
2573 return ((N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA*)w->data)->selected_index;
2574 }
2575 return -1;
2576}
2577
2578const char* n_gui_combobox_get_item_text(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int index) {
2579 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2580 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_COMBOBOX && w->data) {
2581 N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA* cd = (N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA*)w->data;
2582 if (index >= 0 && (size_t)index < cd->nb_items) {
2583 return cd->items[index].text;
2584 }
2585 }
2586 return "";
2587}
2588
2595void n_gui_combobox_set_selected(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int index) {
2596 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2597 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_COMBOBOX && w->data) {
2598 N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA* cd = (N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA*)w->data;
2599 if (index >= -1 && (index == -1 || (size_t)index < cd->nb_items)) {
2600 cd->selected_index = index;
2601 }
2602 }
2603}
2604
2605/* image helpers */
2606
2613void n_gui_image_set_bitmap(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, ALLEGRO_BITMAP* bitmap) {
2614 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2615 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_IMAGE && w->data) {
2616 ((N_GUI_IMAGE_DATA*)w->data)->bitmap = bitmap;
2617 }
2618}
2619
2620/* label helpers */
2621
2628void n_gui_label_set_text(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, const char* text) {
2629 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2630 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LABEL && w->data) {
2631 N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* lb = (N_GUI_LABEL_DATA*)w->data;
2632 if (text) {
2633 strncpy(lb->text, text, N_GUI_TEXT_MAX - 1);
2634 lb->text[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX - 1] = '\0';
2635 _normalize_crlf(lb->text); /* normalize CRLF for Allegro5 compatibility */
2636 } else {
2637 lb->text[0] = '\0';
2638 }
2639 }
2640}
2641
2648void n_gui_label_set_link(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, const char* link) {
2649 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2650 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LABEL && w->data) {
2651 N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* lb = (N_GUI_LABEL_DATA*)w->data;
2652 if (link) {
2653 strncpy(lb->link, link, N_GUI_TEXT_MAX - 1);
2654 lb->link[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX - 1] = '\0';
2655 } else {
2656 lb->link[0] = '\0';
2657 }
2658 }
2659}
2660
2661/* DROPDOWN MENU */
2662
2664static int _dropmenu_entries_grow(N_GUI_DROPMENU_ENTRY** entries, const size_t* nb, size_t* cap) {
2665 if (*nb >= *cap) {
2666 size_t new_cap = (*cap == 0) ? 8 : (*cap) * 2;
2667 if (new_cap < *cap) return 0; /* overflow */
2668 N_GUI_DROPMENU_ENTRY* tmp = NULL;
2669 Malloc(tmp, N_GUI_DROPMENU_ENTRY, new_cap);
2670 if (!tmp) return 0;
2671 if (*entries && *nb > 0) {
2672 memcpy(tmp, *entries, (*nb) * sizeof(N_GUI_DROPMENU_ENTRY));
2673 }
2674 FreeNoLog(*entries);
2675 *entries = tmp;
2676 *cap = new_cap;
2677 }
2678 return 1;
2679}
2680
2685int n_gui_add_dropmenu(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, const char* label, float x, float y, float w, float h, void (*on_open)(int, void*), void* on_open_user_data) {
2686 __n_assert(ctx, return -1);
2687 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
2688 __n_assert(win, return -1);
2689
2690 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = _new_widget(ctx, N_GUI_TYPE_DROPMENU, x, y, w, h);
2691 __n_assert(wgt, return -1);
2692
2693 N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA* dd = NULL;
2694 Malloc(dd, N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA, 1);
2695 __n_assert(dd, Free(wgt); return -1);
2696 dd->label[0] = '\0';
2697 if (label) {
2698 strncpy(dd->label, label, N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1);
2699 dd->label[N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1] = '\0';
2700 }
2701 dd->entries = NULL;
2702 dd->nb_entries = 0;
2703 dd->entries_capacity = 0;
2704 dd->is_open = 0;
2705 dd->scroll_offset = 0;
2706 dd->max_visible = ctx->style.dropmenu_max_visible;
2707 dd->item_height = h;
2708 dd->on_open = on_open;
2709 dd->on_open_user_data = on_open_user_data;
2710 dd->panel_bitmap = NULL;
2711 dd->item_hover_bitmap = NULL;
2712 dd->flags = 0;
2713 wgt->data = dd;
2714 wgt->norm_x = 0.0f;
2715 wgt->norm_y = 0.0f;
2716 wgt->norm_w = 0.0f;
2717 wgt->norm_h = 0.0f;
2718
2719 list_push(win->widgets, wgt, _destroy_widget);
2720 _n_gui_widget_capture_normalized(win, wgt);
2721 _register_widget(ctx, wgt);
2722 return wgt->id;
2723}
2724
2728void n_gui_dropmenu_set_flags(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int flags) {
2729 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2730 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_DROPMENU || !w->data) return;
2731 N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA* dd = (N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)w->data;
2732 dd->flags = flags;
2733}
2734
2739int n_gui_dropmenu_add_entry(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, const char* text, int tag, void (*on_click)(int, int, int, void*), void* user_data) {
2740 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2741 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_DROPMENU || !w->data) return -1;
2742 N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA* dd = (N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)w->data;
2743 if (!_dropmenu_entries_grow(&dd->entries, &dd->nb_entries, &dd->entries_capacity)) return -1;
2744 N_GUI_DROPMENU_ENTRY* e = &dd->entries[dd->nb_entries];
2745 memset(e, 0, sizeof(*e));
2746 if (text) {
2747 strncpy(e->text, text, N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1);
2748 e->text[N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1] = '\0';
2749 }
2750 e->is_dynamic = 0;
2751 e->tag = tag;
2752 e->on_click = on_click;
2753 e->user_data = user_data;
2754 dd->nb_entries++;
2755 return (int)(dd->nb_entries - 1);
2756}
2757
2762int n_gui_dropmenu_add_dynamic_entry(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, const char* text, int tag, void (*on_click)(int, int, int, void*), void* user_data) {
2763 int idx = n_gui_dropmenu_add_entry(ctx, widget_id, text, tag, on_click, user_data);
2764 if (idx < 0)
2765 return idx;
2766
2767 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2768 if (!w) {
2769 n_log(LOG_ERR, "Invalid NULL widget for ctx %p widget_id %d", ctx, widget_id);
2770 return -1;
2771 }
2772
2773 N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA* dd = (N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)w->data;
2774 if (!dd) {
2775 n_log(LOG_ERR, "Widget has NULL data for ctx %p widget_id %d", ctx, widget_id);
2776 return -1;
2777 }
2778
2779 dd->entries[idx].is_dynamic = 1;
2780
2781 return idx;
2782}
2783
2787void n_gui_dropmenu_clear_dynamic(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
2788 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2789 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_DROPMENU || !w->data) return;
2790 N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA* dd = (N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)w->data;
2791 /* compact: keep only non-dynamic entries */
2792 size_t write = 0;
2793 for (size_t i = 0; i < dd->nb_entries; i++) {
2794 if (!dd->entries[i].is_dynamic) {
2795 if (write != i) {
2796 dd->entries[write] = dd->entries[i];
2797 }
2798 write++;
2799 }
2800 }
2801 dd->nb_entries = write;
2802 /* clamp scroll_offset after removal */
2803 if (dd->nb_entries == 0) {
2804 dd->scroll_offset = 0;
2805 } else {
2806 int max_vis = dd->max_visible > 0 ? dd->max_visible : 8;
2807 int dm_max = (int)dd->nb_entries - max_vis;
2808 if (dm_max < 0) dm_max = 0;
2809 if (dd->scroll_offset > dm_max) dd->scroll_offset = dm_max;
2810 }
2811}
2812
2816void n_gui_dropmenu_clear(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
2817 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2818 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_DROPMENU || !w->data) return;
2819 N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA* dd = (N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)w->data;
2820 dd->nb_entries = 0;
2821 dd->scroll_offset = 0;
2822}
2823
2827void n_gui_dropmenu_set_entry_text(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int index, const char* text) {
2828 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2829 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_DROPMENU || !w->data) return;
2830 N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA* dd = (N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)w->data;
2831 if (index < 0 || (size_t)index >= dd->nb_entries) return;
2832 if (text) {
2833 strncpy(dd->entries[index].text, text, N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1);
2834 dd->entries[index].text[N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1] = '\0';
2835 }
2836}
2837
2841int n_gui_dropmenu_get_count(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
2842 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2843 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_DROPMENU && w->data) {
2844 return (int)((N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)w->data)->nb_entries;
2845 }
2846 return 0;
2847}

3020
3021/* DRAWING - individual widget renderers */
3022
3025static void _draw_bitmap_scaled(ALLEGRO_BITMAP* bmp, float dx, float dy, float dw, float dh, int mode) {
3026 float bw = (float)al_get_bitmap_width(bmp);
3027 float bh = (float)al_get_bitmap_height(bmp);
3028 if (mode == N_GUI_IMAGE_STRETCH) {
3029 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(bmp, 0, 0, bw, bh, dx, dy, dw, dh, 0);
3030 } else if (mode == N_GUI_IMAGE_CENTER) {
3031 al_draw_bitmap(bmp, dx + (dw - bw) / 2.0f, dy + (dh - bh) / 2.0f, 0);
3032 } else {
3033 /* N_GUI_IMAGE_FIT: maintain aspect ratio */
3034 float sx = dw / bw;
3035 float sy = dh / bh;
3036 float s = (sx < sy) ? sx : sy;
3037 float rw = bw * s;
3038 float rh = bh * s;
3039 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(bmp, 0, 0, bw, bh, dx + (dw - rw) / 2.0f, dy + (dh - rh) / 2.0f, rw, rh, 0);
3040 }
3041}
3042
3046static ALLEGRO_BITMAP* _select_state_bitmap(int state, ALLEGRO_BITMAP* normal_bmp, ALLEGRO_BITMAP* hover_bmp, ALLEGRO_BITMAP* active_bmp) {
3047 if ((state & N_GUI_STATE_ACTIVE) && active_bmp) return active_bmp;
3048 if ((state & N_GUI_STATE_HOVER) && hover_bmp) return hover_bmp;
3049 if (normal_bmp) return normal_bmp;
3050 return NULL;
3051}
3052
3058static void _set_clipping_rect_transformed(int wx, int wy, int ww, int wh) {
3059 /* Transform all 4 corners from world space to screen space so that the
3060 * axis-aligned bounding box is computed correctly for any affine transform
3061 * (including negative scaling, rotation, or shear). */
3062 const ALLEGRO_TRANSFORM* tf = al_get_current_transform();
3063 float cx[4], cy[4];
3064 cx[0] = (float)wx;
3065 cy[0] = (float)wy;
3066 cx[1] = (float)(wx + ww);
3067 cy[1] = (float)wy;
3068 cx[2] = (float)wx;
3069 cy[2] = (float)(wy + wh);
3070 cx[3] = (float)(wx + ww);
3071 cy[3] = (float)(wy + wh);
3072 for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++)
3073 al_transform_coordinates(tf, &cx[i], &cy[i]);
3074
3075 float min_x = cx[0], max_x = cx[0];
3076 float min_y = cy[0], max_y = cy[0];
3077 for (int i = 1; i < 4; i++) {
3078 if (cx[i] < min_x) min_x = cx[i];
3079 if (cx[i] > max_x) max_x = cx[i];
3080 if (cy[i] < min_y) min_y = cy[i];
3081 if (cy[i] > max_y) max_y = cy[i];
3082 }
3083
3084 int new_x = (int)min_x;
3085 int new_y = (int)min_y;
3086 int new_w = (int)(max_x - min_x);
3087 int new_h = (int)(max_y - min_y);
3088
3089 /* intersect with the current (parent) clipping rectangle */
3090 int pcx, pcy, pcw, pch;
3091 al_get_clipping_rectangle(&pcx, &pcy, &pcw, &pch);
3092
3093 int right = new_x + new_w;
3094 int bottom = new_y + new_h;
3095 int prev_right = pcx + pcw;
3096 int prev_bottom = pcy + pch;
3097
3098 if (new_x < pcx) new_x = pcx;
3099 if (new_y < pcy) new_y = pcy;
3100 if (right > prev_right) right = prev_right;
3101 if (bottom > prev_bottom) bottom = prev_bottom;
3102
3103 new_w = right - new_x;
3104 new_h = bottom - new_y;
3105 if (new_w < 0) new_w = 0;
3106 if (new_h < 0) new_h = 0;
3107
3108 al_set_clipping_rectangle(new_x, new_y, new_w, new_h);
3109}
3110
3113static void _draw_text_truncated(ALLEGRO_FONT* font, ALLEGRO_COLOR color, float x, float y, float max_w, const char* text) {
3114 if (!font || !text || !text[0]) return;
3115 float tw = _text_w(font, text);
3116 if (tw <= max_w) {
3117 al_draw_text(font, color, x, y, 0, text);
3118 return;
3119 }
3120 /* find how many chars fit + "...", stepping one UTF-8 sequence at a
3121 * time so a multi-byte codepoint is never measured or kept halfway */
3122 float ellipsis_w = _text_w(font, "...");
3123 float avail = max_w - ellipsis_w;
3124 if (avail < 0) avail = 0;
3125 size_t len = strlen(text);
3126 char buf[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
3127 size_t fit = 0;
3128 size_t i = 0;
3129 while (i < len) {
3130 size_t step = 1;
3131 unsigned char lead = (unsigned char)text[i];
3132 if ((lead & 0xE0) == 0xC0)
3133 step = 2;
3134 else if ((lead & 0xF0) == 0xE0)
3135 step = 3;
3136 else if ((lead & 0xF8) == 0xF0)
3137 step = 4;
3138 if (i + step > len || i + step > (size_t)(N_GUI_TEXT_MAX - 5)) break;
3139 memcpy(buf + i, text + i, step);
3140 buf[i + step] = '\0';
3141 float cw = _text_w(font, buf);
3142 if (cw > avail) break;
3143 fit = i + step;
3144 i += step;
3145 }
3146 buf[fit] = '.';
3147 buf[fit + 1] = '.';
3148 buf[fit + 2] = '.';
3149 buf[fit + 3] = '\0';
3150 al_draw_text(font, color, x, y, 0, buf);
3151}
3152
3157static void _draw_text_justified(ALLEGRO_FONT* font, ALLEGRO_COLOR color, float x, float y, float max_w, float max_h, const char* text) {
3158 if (!font || !text || !text[0]) return;
3159
3160 /* split text into words */
3161 char buf[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
3162 snprintf(buf, N_GUI_TEXT_MAX, "%s", text);
3163
3164 char* words[256];
3165 float word_widths[256];
3166 int nwords = 0;
3167 char* tok = strtok(buf, " \t");
3168 while (tok && nwords < 256) {
3169 words[nwords] = tok;
3170 word_widths[nwords] = _text_w(font, tok);
3171 nwords++;
3172 tok = strtok(NULL, " \t");
3173 }
3174 if (nwords == 0) return;
3175 if (nwords == 1) {
3176 _draw_text_truncated(font, color, x, y, max_w, text);
3177 return;
3178 }
3179
3180 float fh = (float)al_get_font_line_height(font);
3181 float space_w = _text_w(font, " ");
3182 float cy = y;
3183 int line_start = 0;
3184
3185 while (line_start < nwords) {
3186 /* stop if there is no vertical space for another line */
3187 if (cy + fh > y + max_h + 0.5f) break;
3188
3189 /* pack as many words as fit on this line with minimum (single-space) gaps */
3190 float line_words_w = word_widths[line_start];
3191 int line_end = line_start + 1;
3192 for (int i = line_start + 1; i < nwords; i++) {
3193 float test_w = line_words_w + space_w + word_widths[i];
3194 if (test_w > max_w) break;
3195 line_words_w = test_w;
3196 line_end = i + 1;
3197 }
3198
3199 int words_on_line = line_end - line_start;
3200 int is_last_line = (line_end >= nwords);
3201
3202 if (words_on_line == 1) {
3203 /* single word: truncate with "..." if it exceeds the line width */
3204 if (word_widths[line_start] > max_w) {
3205 _draw_text_truncated(font, color, x, cy, max_w, words[line_start]);
3206 } else {
3207 al_draw_text(font, color, x, cy, 0, words[line_start]);
3208 }
3209 } else if (is_last_line) {
3210 /* last line: left-align with normal spacing */
3211 float cx = x;
3212 for (int i = line_start; i < line_end; i++) {
3213 al_draw_text(font, color, cx, cy, 0, words[i]);
3214 cx += word_widths[i] + space_w;
3215 }
3216 } else {
3217 /* full line: justify by distributing extra space between words */
3218 float total_word_w = 0;
3219 for (int i = line_start; i < line_end; i++) total_word_w += word_widths[i];
3220 float total_space = max_w - total_word_w;
3221 if (total_space < 0) total_space = 0;
3222 float gap = total_space / (float)(words_on_line - 1);
3223 float cx = x;
3224 for (int i = line_start; i < line_end; i++) {
3225 al_draw_text(font, color, cx, cy, 0, words[i]);
3226 cx += word_widths[i] + gap;
3227 }
3228 }
3229
3230 line_start = line_end;
3231 cy += fh;
3232 }
3233}
3234
3236static int _utf8_char_len(unsigned char c) {
3237 if (c < 0x80) return 1;
3238 if ((c & 0xE0) == 0xC0) return 2;
3239 if ((c & 0xF0) == 0xE0) return 3;
3240 if ((c & 0xF8) == 0xF0) return 4;
3241 return 1; /* invalid byte, treat as single byte */
3242}
3243
3246static float _textarea_content_height(const N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* td, ALLEGRO_FONT* font, float widget_w, float pad) {
3247 if (!font || td->text_len == 0) return 0;
3248 float fh = (float)al_get_font_line_height(font);
3249 float cx = 0;
3250 float cy = fh; /* at least one line */
3251 for (size_t i = 0; i < td->text_len;) {
3252 if (td->text[i] == '\n') {
3253 cx = 0;
3254 cy += fh;
3255 i++;
3256 continue;
3257 }
3258 int clen = _utf8_char_len((unsigned char)td->text[i]);
3259 if (i + (size_t)clen > td->text_len) clen = (int)(td->text_len - i);
3260 char ch[5];
3261 memcpy(ch, &td->text[i], (size_t)clen);
3262 ch[clen] = '\0';
3263 float cw = _text_w(font, ch);
3264 if (cx + cw > widget_w - pad * 2) {
3265 cx = 0;
3266 cy += fh;
3267 }
3268 cx += cw;
3269 i += (size_t)clen;
3270 }
3271 return cy;
3272}
3273
3279void n_gui_textarea_scroll_to_bottom(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
3280 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
3281 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA || !w->data) return;
3282 N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* td = (N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA*)w->data;
