3283 if (!td->multiline || td->text_len == 0) return;
3284
3285 float pad = ctx->style.textarea_padding;
3286 ALLEGRO_FONT* font = w->font ? w->font : ctx->default_font;
3287 float view_h = w->h - pad * 2;
3288 float ch = _textarea_content_height(td, font, w->w, pad);
3289 float max_sy = ch - view_h;
3290 if (max_sy < 0) max_sy = 0;
3291 td->scroll_y = (int)max_sy;
3292} /* n_gui_textarea_scroll_to_bottom */
3293
3301void n_gui_textarea_set_selection(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, size_t start, size_t end) {
3302 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
3303 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA || !w->data) return;
3304 N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* td = (N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA*)w->data;
3305 if (start > td->text_len) start = td->text_len;
3306 if (end > td->text_len) end = td->text_len;
3307 td->sel_start = start;
3308 td->sel_end = end;
3309 td->cursor_pos = end;
3310} /* n_gui_textarea_set_selection */
3311
3318void n_gui_textarea_scroll_to_offset(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, size_t byte_offset) {
3319 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
3320 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA || !w->data) return;
3321 N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* td = (N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA*)w->data;
3322 if (!td->multiline || td->text_len == 0) return;
3323
3324 float pad = ctx->style.textarea_padding;
3325 ALLEGRO_FONT* font = w->font ? w->font : ctx->default_font;
3326 if (!font) return;
3327 float fh = (float)al_get_font_line_height(font);
3328 float view_h = w->h - pad * 2;
3329
3330 /* Account for scrollbar width, matching the draw function logic:
3331 first check if scrollbar is needed, then use the narrower width */
3332 float content_h_initial = _textarea_content_height(td, font, w->w, pad);
3333 float sb_size = (content_h_initial > view_h) ? ctx->style.scrollbar_size : 0;
3334 float text_area_w = w->w - sb_size;
3335
3336 /* compute pixel Y of the target byte offset using line-wrap logic
3337 with the same text_area_w the draw function will use */
3338 float cx = 0;
3339 float cy = 0;
3340 size_t target = (byte_offset <= td->text_len) ? byte_offset : td->text_len;
3341 for (size_t i = 0; i < target && i < td->text_len;) {
3342 if (td->text[i] == '\n') {
3343 cx = 0;
3344 cy += fh;
3345 i++;
3346 continue;
3347 }
3348 int clen = _utf8_char_len((unsigned char)td->text[i]);
3349 if (i + (size_t)clen > td->text_len) clen = (int)(td->text_len - i);
3350 char ch[5];
3351 memcpy(ch, &td->text[i], (size_t)clen);
3352 ch[clen] = '\0';
3353 float cw = _text_w(font, ch);
3354 if (cx + cw > text_area_w - pad * 2) {
3355 cx = 0;
3356 cy += fh;
3357 }
3358 cx += cw;
3359 i += (size_t)clen;
3360 }
3361
3362 /* recompute content_h with the same text_area_w for consistent max_sy */
3363 float content_h = _textarea_content_height(td, font, text_area_w, pad);
3364 float max_sy = content_h - view_h;
3365 if (max_sy < 0) max_sy = 0;
3366 float ideal = cy - view_h / 2 + fh / 2;
3367 if (ideal < 0) ideal = 0;
3368 if (ideal > max_sy) ideal = max_sy;
3369 td->scroll_y = (int)ideal;
3370 td->scroll_from_wheel = 0;
3371} /* n_gui_textarea_scroll_to_offset */
3372
3379size_t n_gui_textarea_get_text_length(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
3380 const N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
3381 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA || !w->data) return 0;
3382 const N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* td = (const N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA*)w->data;
3383 return td->text_len;
3384} /* n_gui_textarea_get_text_length */
3385
3389static int _justified_char_at_pos(const char* text, ALLEGRO_FONT* font, float max_w, float text_x, float text_y, float scroll_y, float click_mx, float click_my) {
3390 if (!font || !text || !text[0]) return -1;
3391
3392 /* split text into words, tracking their byte offsets in original text */
3393 size_t text_len = strlen(text);
3394 char buf[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
3395 snprintf(buf, N_GUI_TEXT_MAX, "%s", text);
3396
3397 /* word start byte offsets in original text */
3398 int word_starts[256];
3399 int word_lens[256]; /* byte lengths */
3400 float word_widths[256];
3401 int nwords = 0;
3402
3403 size_t i = 0;
3404 while (i < text_len && nwords < 256) {
3405 /* skip whitespace */
3406 while (i < text_len && (text[i] == ' ' || text[i] == '\t')) i++;
3407 if (i >= text_len) break;
3408 size_t ws = i;
3409 while (i < text_len && text[i] != ' ' && text[i] != '\t') i++;
3410 int wlen = (int)(i - ws);
3411 word_starts[nwords] = (int)ws;
3412 word_lens[nwords] = wlen;
3413 char tmp[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
3414 memcpy(tmp, &text[ws], (size_t)wlen);
3415 tmp[wlen] = '\0';
3416 word_widths[nwords] = _text_w(font, tmp);
3417 nwords++;
3418 }
3419 if (nwords == 0) return 0;
3420
3421 float fh = (float)al_get_font_line_height(font);
3422 float space_w = _text_w(font, " ");
3423 float cy = text_y - scroll_y;
3424 float click_y_content = click_my;
3425
3426 /* find the target line */
3427 int line_start = 0;
3428 while (line_start < nwords) {
3429 float line_words_w = word_widths[line_start];
3430 int line_end = line_start + 1;
3431 for (int j = line_start + 1; j < nwords; j++) {
3432 float test_w = line_words_w + space_w + word_widths[j];
3433 if (test_w > max_w) break;
3434 line_words_w = test_w;
3435 line_end = j + 1;
3436 }
3437
3438 int words_on_line = line_end - line_start;
3439 int is_last_line = (line_end >= nwords);
3440
3441 if (click_y_content >= cy && click_y_content < cy + fh) {
3442 /* this is the target line - find character */
3443 float click_x_rel = click_mx - text_x;
3444 if (click_x_rel < 0) return word_starts[line_start];
3445
3446 /* compute gap for this line */
3447 float gap = space_w;
3448 if (!is_last_line && words_on_line > 1) {
3449 float total_word_w = 0;
3450 for (int j = line_start; j < line_end; j++) total_word_w += word_widths[j];
3451 float total_space = max_w - total_word_w;
3452 if (total_space < 0) total_space = 0;
3453 gap = total_space / (float)(words_on_line - 1);
3454 }
3455
3456 /* walk through words on this line */
3457 float cx = 0;
3458 for (int j = line_start; j < line_end; j++) {
3459 /* check within this word */
3460 if (click_x_rel >= cx && click_x_rel < cx + word_widths[j]) {
3461 /* find character within word */
3462 float wx = 0;
3463 int best_off = 0;
3464 float best_dist = click_x_rel - cx;
3465 if (best_dist < 0) best_dist = -best_dist;
3466 for (int k = 0; k < word_lens[j];) {
3467 int clen = _utf8_char_len((unsigned char)text[word_starts[j] + k]);
3468 if (k + clen > word_lens[j]) clen = word_lens[j] - k;
3469 char ch[5];
3470 memcpy(ch, &text[word_starts[j] + k], (size_t)clen);
3471 ch[clen] = '\0';
3472 float cw = _text_w(font, ch);
3473 wx += cw;
3474 float dist = (click_x_rel - cx) - wx;
3475 if (dist < 0) dist = -dist;
3476 if (dist < best_dist) {
3477 best_dist = dist;
3478 best_off = k + clen;
3479 }
3480 k += clen;
3481 }
3482 return word_starts[j] + best_off;
3483 }
3484 /* check in gap between words */
3485 if (j < line_end - 1 && click_x_rel >= cx + word_widths[j] && click_x_rel < cx + word_widths[j] + gap) {
3486 /* in the gap: snap to end of current word or start of next */
3487 float mid = cx + word_widths[j] + gap / 2.0f;
3488 if (click_x_rel < mid)
3489 return word_starts[j] + word_lens[j];
3490 else
3491 return word_starts[j + 1];
3492 }
3493 cx += word_widths[j] + gap;
3494 }
3495 /* past end of line */
3496 return word_starts[line_end - 1] + word_lens[line_end - 1];
3497 }
3498
3499 cy += fh;
3500 line_start = line_end;
3501 }
3502 /* below all text: return end */
3503 return (int)text_len;
3504}
3505
3508static void _draw_justified_selection(ALLEGRO_FONT* font, float x, float y, float max_w, float max_h, const char* text, int sel_start, int sel_end, ALLEGRO_COLOR sel_color) {
3509 if (!font || !text || !text[0] || sel_start == sel_end) return;
3510 int slo = sel_start < sel_end ? sel_start : sel_end;
3511 int shi = sel_start < sel_end ? sel_end : sel_start;
3512 size_t text_len = strlen(text);
3513 if ((size_t)slo > text_len) slo = (int)text_len;
3514 if ((size_t)shi > text_len) shi = (int)text_len;
3515
3516 /* split into words with byte offsets */
3517 int word_starts[256], word_lens[256];
3518 float word_widths[256];
3519 int nwords = 0;
3520 size_t i = 0;
3521 while (i < text_len && nwords < 256) {
3522 while (i < text_len && (text[i] == ' ' || text[i] == '\t')) i++;
3523 if (i >= text_len) break;
3524 size_t ws = i;
3525 while (i < text_len && text[i] != ' ' && text[i] != '\t') i++;
3526 int wlen = (int)(i - ws);
3527 word_starts[nwords] = (int)ws;
3528 word_lens[nwords] = wlen;
3529 char tmp[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
3530 memcpy(tmp, &text[ws], (size_t)wlen);
3531 tmp[wlen] = '\0';
3532 word_widths[nwords] = _text_w(font, tmp);
3533 nwords++;
3534 }
3535 if (nwords == 0) return;
3536
3537 float fh = (float)al_get_font_line_height(font);
3538 float space_w = _text_w(font, " ");
3539 float cy = y;
3540 int line_start = 0;
3541
3542 while (line_start < nwords) {
3543 if (cy + fh > y + max_h + 0.5f) break;
3544 float line_words_w = word_widths[line_start];
3545 int line_end = line_start + 1;
3546 for (int j = line_start + 1; j < nwords; j++) {
3547 float test_w = line_words_w + space_w + word_widths[j];
3548 if (test_w > max_w) break;
3549 line_words_w = test_w;
3550 line_end = j + 1;
3551 }
3552 int words_on_line = line_end - line_start;
3553 int is_last_line = (line_end >= nwords);
3554
3555 /* compute gap for this line */
3556 float gap = space_w;
3557 if (!is_last_line && words_on_line > 1) {
3558 float total_word_w = 0;
3559 for (int j = line_start; j < line_end; j++) total_word_w += word_widths[j];
3560 float total_space = max_w - total_word_w;
3561 if (total_space < 0) total_space = 0;
3562 gap = total_space / (float)(words_on_line - 1);
3563 }
3564
3565 /* walk words and draw selection rects where overlapping */
3566 float cx = x;
3567 for (int j = line_start; j < line_end; j++) {
3568 int ws2 = word_starts[j];
3569 int we = ws2 + word_lens[j];
3570 /* check if selection overlaps this word */
3571 if (slo < we && shi > ws2) {
3572 /* find pixel range within the word */
3573 float sx1 = 0, sx2 = word_widths[j];
3574 if (slo > ws2) {
3575 char tmp2[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
3576 int off = slo - ws2;
3577 memcpy(tmp2, &text[ws2], (size_t)off);
3578 tmp2[off] = '\0';
3579 sx1 = _text_w(font, tmp2);
3580 }
3581 if (shi < we) {
3582 char tmp2[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
3583 int off = shi - ws2;
3584 memcpy(tmp2, &text[ws2], (size_t)off);
3585 tmp2[off] = '\0';
3586 sx2 = _text_w(font, tmp2);
3587 }
3588 al_draw_filled_rectangle(cx + sx1, cy, cx + sx2, cy + fh, sel_color);
3589 }
3590 /* also highlight the gap (space) between words if selected */
3591 if (j < line_end - 1) {
3592 int gap_start = we; /* byte after word end */
3593 int gap_end = word_starts[j + 1]; /* byte of next word start */
3594 if (slo < gap_end && shi > gap_start) {
3595 al_draw_filled_rectangle(cx + word_widths[j], cy,
3596 cx + word_widths[j] + gap, cy + fh, sel_color);
3597 }
3598 }
3599 cx += word_widths[j] + gap;
3600 }
3601
3602 cy += fh;
3603 line_start = line_end;
3604 }
3605}
3606
3609static float _label_content_height(const char* text, ALLEGRO_FONT* font, float max_w) {
3610 if (!font || !text || !text[0]) return 0;
3611 float fh = (float)al_get_font_line_height(font);
3612 float space_w = _text_w(font, " ");
3613
3614 char buf[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
3615 snprintf(buf, N_GUI_TEXT_MAX, "%s", text);
3616
3617 float word_widths[256];
3618 int nwords = 0;
3619 const char* tok = strtok(buf, " \t");
3620 while (tok && nwords < 256) {
3621 word_widths[nwords] = _text_w(font, tok);
3622 nwords++;
3623 tok = strtok(NULL, " \t");
3624 }
3625 if (nwords == 0) return 0;
3626 if (nwords == 1) return fh;
3627
3628 int line_start = 0;
3629 int nlines = 0;
3630 while (line_start < nwords) {
3631 float line_words_w = word_widths[line_start];
3632 int line_end = line_start + 1;
3633 for (int i = line_start + 1; i < nwords; i++) {
3634 float test_w = line_words_w + space_w + word_widths[i];
3635 if (test_w > max_w) break;
3636 line_words_w = test_w;
3637 line_end = i + 1;
3638 }
3639 nlines++;
3640 line_start = line_end;
3641 }
3642 return (float)nlines * fh;
3643}
3644
3649static void _draw_widget_vscrollbar(float area_x, float area_y, float area_w, float view_h, float content_h, float scroll_y, N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
3650 float sb_size = style->scrollbar_size;
3651 float sb_x = area_x + area_w - sb_size;
3652
3653 /* track */
3654 al_draw_filled_rectangle(sb_x, area_y, sb_x + sb_size, area_y + view_h,
3655 style->scrollbar_track_color);
3656
3657 /* thumb */
3658 float ratio = view_h / content_h;
3659 if (ratio > 1.0f) ratio = 1.0f;
3660 float thumb_h = ratio * view_h;
3661 if (thumb_h < style->scrollbar_thumb_min) thumb_h = style->scrollbar_thumb_min;
3662 float max_scroll = content_h - view_h;
3663 float pos_ratio = (max_scroll > 0) ? scroll_y / max_scroll : 0;
3664 float thumb_y = area_y + pos_ratio * (view_h - thumb_h);
3665 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(sb_x + style->scrollbar_thumb_padding, thumb_y,
3666 sb_x + sb_size - style->scrollbar_thumb_padding,
3667 thumb_y + thumb_h,
3668 style->scrollbar_thumb_corner_r, style->scrollbar_thumb_corner_r,
3669 style->scrollbar_thumb_color);
3670}
3671
3676static float _min_thickness(float requested) {
3677 const ALLEGRO_TRANSFORM* tf = al_get_current_transform();
3678 /* length of each axis basis vector gives the true scale for that axis */
3679 float sx = hypotf(tf->m[0][0], tf->m[0][1]);
3680 float sy = hypotf(tf->m[1][0], tf->m[1][1]);
3681 /* use the larger component to avoid overly thick lines on the minor axis */
3682 float scale = (sx > sy) ? sx : sy;
3683 if (scale < 0.01f) scale = 0.01f;
3684 /* ensure the line is at least 1 physical pixel */
3685 float min_t = 1.0f / scale;
3686 return (requested > min_t) ? requested : min_t;
3687}
3688
3690static ALLEGRO_COLOR _bg_for_state(const N_GUI_THEME* t, int state) {
3691 if (state & N_GUI_STATE_ACTIVE) return t->bg_active;
3692 if (state & N_GUI_STATE_HOVER) return t->bg_hover;
3693 return t->bg_normal;
3694}
3695
3696static ALLEGRO_COLOR _border_for_state(const N_GUI_THEME* t, int state) {
3697 if (state & N_GUI_STATE_ACTIVE) return t->border_active;
3698 if (state & N_GUI_STATE_HOVER) return t->border_hover;
3699 return t->border_normal;
3700}
3701
3702static ALLEGRO_COLOR _text_for_state(const N_GUI_THEME* t, int state) {
3703 if (state & N_GUI_STATE_ACTIVE) return t->text_active;
3704 if (state & N_GUI_STATE_HOVER) return t->text_hover;
3705 return t->text_normal;
3706}
3707
3712static void _draw_themed_rect(N_GUI_THEME* t, int state, float x, float y, float w, float h, int rounded) {
3713 ALLEGRO_COLOR bg = _bg_for_state(t, state);
3714 ALLEGRO_COLOR bd = _border_for_state(t, state);
3715 float thickness = _min_thickness(t->border_thickness);
3716 float ht = thickness * 0.5f;
3717 if (rounded) {
3718 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(x + ht, y + ht, x + w - ht, y + h - ht, t->corner_rx, t->corner_ry, bg);
3719 al_draw_rounded_rectangle(x + ht, y + ht, x + w - ht, y + h - ht, t->corner_rx, t->corner_ry, bd, thickness);
3720 } else {
3721 al_draw_filled_rectangle(x, y, x + w, y + h, bg);
3722 al_draw_rectangle(x + ht, y + ht, x + w - ht, y + h - ht, bd, thickness);
3723 }
3724}
3725
3727static void _draw_button(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, float ox, float oy, ALLEGRO_FONT* default_font, const N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
3728 N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA* bd = (N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA*)wgt->data;
3729 float ax = ox + wgt->x;
3730 float ay = oy + wgt->y;
3731 ALLEGRO_FONT* font = wgt->font ? wgt->font : default_font;
3732
3733 /* For toggle buttons, use the active visual state when toggled on */
3734 int draw_state = wgt->state;
3735 if (bd->toggle_mode && bd->toggled) {
3736 draw_state |= N_GUI_STATE_ACTIVE;
3737 }
3738 /* Flash the pressed visual when a keybind trigger is still within its
3739 * visual-feedback window, so a keyboard-activated button looks pressed
3740 * just like a mouse-clicked one. */
3741 if (bd->key_press_until > 0.0 && al_get_time() < bd->key_press_until) {
3742 draw_state |= N_GUI_STATE_ACTIVE;
3743 }
3744
3745 if (bd->shape == N_GUI_SHAPE_BITMAP && bd->bitmap) {
3746 ALLEGRO_BITMAP* bmp = bd->bitmap;
3747 if ((draw_state & N_GUI_STATE_ACTIVE) && bd->bitmap_active)
3748 bmp = bd->bitmap_active;
3749 else if ((draw_state & N_GUI_STATE_HOVER) && bd->bitmap_hover)
3750 bmp = bd->bitmap_hover;
3751 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(bmp, 0, 0,
3752 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(bmp), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(bmp),
3753 ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h, 0);
3754 } else {
3755 int rounded = (bd->shape == N_GUI_SHAPE_ROUNDED) ? 1 : 0;
3756 _draw_themed_rect(&wgt->theme, draw_state, ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h, rounded);
3757 }
3758
3759 if (font && bd->label[0]) {
3760 ALLEGRO_COLOR tc = _text_for_state(&wgt->theme, draw_state);
3761 int bbx = 0, bby = 0, bbw = 0, bbh = 0;
3762 al_get_text_dimensions(font, bd->label, &bbx, &bby, &bbw, &bbh);
3763 float tw = (float)bbw;
3764 float th = (float)bbh;
3765 float pad = style->label_padding;
3766 float max_text_w = wgt->w - pad * 2.0f;
3767 if (tw > max_text_w) {
3768 _draw_text_truncated(font, tc, ax + pad, ay + (wgt->h - th) / 2.0f - (float)bby, max_text_w, bd->label);
3769 } else {
3770 al_draw_text(font, tc, ax + (wgt->w - tw) / 2.0f - (float)bbx, ay + (wgt->h - th) / 2.0f - (float)bby, 0, bd->label);
3771 }
3772 }
3773}
3774
3776static void _draw_slider(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, float ox, float oy, ALLEGRO_FONT* default_font, N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
3777 N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA* sd = (N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA*)wgt->data;
3778 float ax = ox + wgt->x;
3779 float ay = oy + wgt->y;
3780 ALLEGRO_FONT* font = wgt->font ? wgt->font : default_font;
3781
3782 double range = sd->max_val - sd->min_val;
3783 double ratio = (range > 0) ? (sd->value - sd->min_val) / range : 0;
3784
3785 if (sd->orientation == N_GUI_SLIDER_V) {
3786 /* vertical slider */
3787 float track_w = style->slider_track_size;
3788 float track_x = ax + (wgt->w - track_w) / 2.0f;
3789 if (sd->track_bitmap) {
3790 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(sd->track_bitmap, 0, 0,
3791 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(sd->track_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(sd->track_bitmap),
3792 track_x, ay, track_w, wgt->h, 0);
3793 } else {
3794 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(track_x, ay, track_x + track_w, ay + wgt->h, style->slider_track_corner_r, style->slider_track_corner_r, wgt->theme.bg_normal);
3795 al_draw_rounded_rectangle(track_x, ay, track_x + track_w, ay + wgt->h, style->slider_track_corner_r, style->slider_track_corner_r, wgt->theme.border_normal, _min_thickness(style->slider_track_border_thickness));
3796 }
3797
3798 /* fill from bottom up */
3799 float fill_h = (float)(ratio * (double)wgt->h);
3800 if (sd->fill_bitmap) {
3801 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(sd->fill_bitmap, 0, 0,
3802 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(sd->fill_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(sd->fill_bitmap),
3803 track_x, ay + wgt->h - fill_h, track_w, fill_h, 0);
3804 } else {
3805 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(track_x, ay + wgt->h - fill_h, track_x + track_w, ay + wgt->h, style->slider_track_corner_r, style->slider_track_corner_r, wgt->theme.bg_active);
3806 }
3807
3808 /* handle */
3809 float hy = ay + wgt->h - fill_h;
3810 float handle_r = wgt->w / 2.0f - style->slider_handle_edge_offset;
3811 if (handle_r < style->slider_handle_min_r) handle_r = style->slider_handle_min_r;
3812 ALLEGRO_BITMAP* hbmp = _select_state_bitmap(wgt->state, sd->handle_bitmap, sd->handle_hover_bitmap, sd->handle_active_bitmap);
3813 if (hbmp) {
3814 float hd = handle_r * 2.0f;
3815 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(hbmp, 0, 0,
3816 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(hbmp), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(hbmp),
3817 ax + wgt->w / 2.0f - handle_r, hy - handle_r, hd, hd, 0);
3818 } else {
3819 ALLEGRO_COLOR hc = _bg_for_state(&wgt->theme, wgt->state);
3820 ALLEGRO_COLOR hb = _border_for_state(&wgt->theme, wgt->state);
3821 al_draw_filled_circle(ax + wgt->w / 2.0f, hy, handle_r, hc);
3822 al_draw_circle(ax + wgt->w / 2.0f, hy, handle_r, hb, _min_thickness(style->slider_handle_border_thickness));
3823 }
3824
3825 /* value label, respects value_visible + value_format */
3826 if (font && sd->value_visible) {
3827 char val_str[32];
3828 if (sd->value_format[0]) {
3829 /* caller-supplied printf format stored in value_format, intentional non-literal */
3830#pragma GCC diagnostic push
3831#pragma GCC diagnostic ignored "-Wformat-nonliteral"
3832 snprintf(val_str, sizeof(val_str), sd->value_format, sd->value);
3833#pragma GCC diagnostic pop
3834 } else if (sd->mode == N_GUI_SLIDER_PERCENT) {
3835 snprintf(val_str, sizeof(val_str), "%.0f%%", sd->value);
3836 } else {
3837 snprintf(val_str, sizeof(val_str), "%.1f", sd->value);
3838 }
3839 int vbbx = 0, vbby = 0, vbbw = 0, vbbh = 0;
3840 al_get_text_dimensions(font, val_str, &vbbx, &vbby, &vbbw, &vbbh);
3841 al_draw_text(font, wgt->theme.text_normal, ax + (wgt->w - (float)vbbw) / 2.0f - (float)vbbx, ay + wgt->h + (float)style->slider_value_label_offset, 0, val_str);
3842 }
3843 return;
3844 }
3845
3846 /* horizontal slider (original) */
3847
3848 /* track */
3849 float track_h = style->slider_track_size;
3850 float track_y = ay + (wgt->h - track_h) / 2.0f;
3851 if (sd->track_bitmap) {
3852 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(sd->track_bitmap, 0, 0,
3853 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(sd->track_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(sd->track_bitmap),
3854 ax, track_y, wgt->w, track_h, 0);
3855 } else {
3856 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(ax, track_y, ax + wgt->w, track_y + track_h, style->slider_track_corner_r, style->slider_track_corner_r, wgt->theme.bg_normal);
3857 al_draw_rounded_rectangle(ax, track_y, ax + wgt->w, track_y + track_h, style->slider_track_corner_r, style->slider_track_corner_r, wgt->theme.border_normal, _min_thickness(style->slider_track_border_thickness));
3858 }
3859
3860 /* fill */
3861 float fill_w = (float)(ratio * (double)wgt->w);
3862 if (sd->fill_bitmap) {
3863 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(sd->fill_bitmap, 0, 0,
3864 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(sd->fill_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(sd->fill_bitmap),
3865 ax, track_y, fill_w, track_h, 0);
3866 } else {
3867 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(ax, track_y, ax + fill_w, track_y + track_h, style->slider_track_corner_r, style->slider_track_corner_r, wgt->theme.bg_active);
3868 }
3869
3870 /* handle */
3871 float hx = ax + fill_w;
3872 float handle_r = wgt->h / 2.0f - style->slider_handle_edge_offset;
3873 if (handle_r < style->slider_handle_min_r) handle_r = style->slider_handle_min_r;
3874 ALLEGRO_BITMAP* hbmp = _select_state_bitmap(wgt->state, sd->handle_bitmap, sd->handle_hover_bitmap, sd->handle_active_bitmap);
3875 if (hbmp) {
3876 float hd = handle_r * 2.0f;
3877 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(hbmp, 0, 0,
3878 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(hbmp), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(hbmp),
3879 hx - handle_r, ay + wgt->h / 2.0f - handle_r, hd, hd, 0);
3880 } else {
3881 ALLEGRO_COLOR hc = _bg_for_state(&wgt->theme, wgt->state);
3882 ALLEGRO_COLOR hb = _border_for_state(&wgt->theme, wgt->state);
3883 al_draw_filled_circle(hx, ay + wgt->h / 2.0f, handle_r, hc);
3884 al_draw_circle(hx, ay + wgt->h / 2.0f, handle_r, hb, _min_thickness(style->slider_handle_border_thickness));
3885 }
3886
3887 /* value label, respects value_visible + value_format */
3888 if (font && sd->value_visible) {
3889 char val_str[32];
3890 if (sd->value_format[0]) {
3891 /* caller-supplied printf format stored in value_format, intentional non-literal */
3892#pragma GCC diagnostic push
3893#pragma GCC diagnostic ignored "-Wformat-nonliteral"
3894 snprintf(val_str, sizeof(val_str), sd->value_format, sd->value);
3895#pragma GCC diagnostic pop
3896 } else if (sd->mode == N_GUI_SLIDER_PERCENT) {
3897 snprintf(val_str, sizeof(val_str), "%.0f%%", sd->value);
3898 } else {
3899 snprintf(val_str, sizeof(val_str), "%.1f", sd->value);
3900 }
3901 int sbbx = 0, sbby = 0, sbbw = 0, sbbh = 0;
3902 al_get_text_dimensions(font, val_str, &sbbx, &sbby, &sbbw, &sbbh);
3903 float th = (float)sbbh;
3904 al_draw_text(font, wgt->theme.text_normal, ax + wgt->w + style->slider_value_label_offset, ay + (wgt->h - th) / 2.0f - (float)sbby, 0, val_str);
3905 }
3906}
3907
3911static size_t _textarea_pos_from_mouse(const N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* td, ALLEGRO_FONT* font, float mx, float my, float ax, float ay, float widget_w, float widget_h, float pad, float scrollbar_size) {
3912 if (!font || td->text_len == 0) return 0;
3913 float fh = (float)al_get_font_line_height(font);
3914
3915 if (!td->multiline) {
3916 float click_x = mx - (ax + pad) + td->scroll_x;
3917 if (click_x < 0) click_x = 0;
3918 /* build display text for width calculation (masked if mask_char set) */
3919 char display[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
3920 if (td->mask_char) {
3921 size_t n = td->text_len;
3922 if (n >= N_GUI_TEXT_MAX) n = N_GUI_TEXT_MAX - 1;
3923 memset(display, td->mask_char, n);
3924 display[n] = '\0';
3925 } else {
3926 memcpy(display, td->text, td->text_len);
3927 display[td->text_len] = '\0';
3928 }
3929 size_t best = 0;
3930 float best_dist = click_x;
3931 char ctmp[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
3932 for (size_t ci = 0; ci < td->text_len;) {
3933 int clen = _utf8_char_len((unsigned char)td->text[ci]);
3934 if (ci + (size_t)clen > td->text_len) clen = (int)(td->text_len - ci);
3935 size_t pos = ci + (size_t)clen;
3936 memcpy(ctmp, display, pos);
3937 ctmp[pos] = '\0';
3938 float tw = _text_w(font, ctmp);
3939 float dist = click_x - tw;
3940 if (dist < 0) dist = -dist;
3941 if (dist < best_dist) {
3942 best_dist = dist;
3943 best = pos;
3944 } else {
3945 break;
3946 }
3947 ci += (size_t)clen;
3948 }
3949 return best;
3950 }
3951
3952 /* multiline */
3953 float view_h = widget_h - pad * 2;
3954 float content_h = _textarea_content_height(td, font, widget_w, pad);
3955 float sb_size = (content_h > view_h) ? scrollbar_size : 0.0f;
3956 float text_area_w = widget_w - sb_size;
3957 float avail_w = text_area_w - pad * 2;
3958 float click_x_rel = mx - (ax + pad);
3959 float click_y_content = my - (ay + pad) + (float)td->scroll_y;
3960 if (click_x_rel < 0) click_x_rel = 0;
3961 if (click_y_content < 0) click_y_content = 0;
3962 int target_line = (int)(click_y_content / fh);
3963
3964 float cur_cx = 0;
3965 int cur_line = 0;
3966 size_t best_pos = 0;
3967 float best_dist = click_x_rel;
3968 int found_line = (target_line == 0) ? 1 : 0;
3969
3970 for (size_t ci = 0; ci < td->text_len;) {
3971 if (cur_line > target_line) break;
3972 if (td->text[ci] == '\n') {
3973 if (cur_line == target_line) break;
3974 cur_cx = 0;
3975 cur_line++;
3976 if (cur_line == target_line) {
3977 found_line = 1;
3978 best_pos = ci + 1;
3979 best_dist = click_x_rel;
3980 }
3981 ci++;
3982 continue;
3983 }
3984 int clen = _utf8_char_len((unsigned char)td->text[ci]);
3985 if (ci + (size_t)clen > td->text_len) clen = (int)(td->text_len - ci);
3986 char ch2[5];
3987 memcpy(ch2, &td->text[ci], (size_t)clen);
3988 ch2[clen] = '\0';
3989 float cw = _text_w(font, ch2);
3990 if (cur_cx + cw > avail_w) {
3991 if (cur_line == target_line) break;
3992 cur_cx = 0;
3993 cur_line++;
3994 if (cur_line == target_line) {
3995 found_line = 1;
3996 best_pos = ci;
3997 best_dist = click_x_rel;
3998 }
3999 }
4000 if (cur_line == target_line) {
4001 float dist = click_x_rel - (cur_cx + cw);
4002 if (dist < 0) dist = -dist;
4003 if (dist < best_dist) {
4004 best_dist = dist;
4005 best_pos = ci + (size_t)clen;
4006 }
4007 }
4008 cur_cx += cw;
4009 ci += (size_t)clen;
4010 }
4011 if (!found_line) best_pos = td->text_len;
4012 return best_pos;
4013}
4014
4016static int _textarea_has_selection(const N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* td) {
4017 return td->sel_start != td->sel_end;
4018}
4019
4021static void _textarea_sel_range(const N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* td, size_t* lo, size_t* hi) {
4022 if (td->sel_start <= td->sel_end) {
4023 *lo = td->sel_start;
4024 *hi = td->sel_end;
4025 } else {
4026 *lo = td->sel_end;
4027 *hi = td->sel_start;
4028 }
4029}
4030
4032static void _draw_textarea(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, float ox, float oy, ALLEGRO_FONT* default_font, N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
4033 N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* td = (N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA*)wgt->data;
4034 float ax = ox + wgt->x;
4035 float ay = oy + wgt->y;
4036 ALLEGRO_FONT* font = wgt->font ? wgt->font : default_font;
4037
4038 int focused = (wgt->state & N_GUI_STATE_FOCUSED) ? 1 : 0;
4039 int hovered = (wgt->state & N_GUI_STATE_HOVER) ? 1 : 0;
4040
4041 /* background, focused wins over hover wins over normal */
4042 if (td->bg_bitmap) {
4043 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(td->bg_bitmap, 0, 0,
4044 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(td->bg_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(td->bg_bitmap),
4045 ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h, 0);
4046 } else {
4047 ALLEGRO_COLOR bg = wgt->theme.bg_normal;
4048 if (focused)
4049 bg = wgt->theme.bg_active;
4050 else if (hovered)
4051 bg = wgt->theme.bg_hover;
4052 al_draw_filled_rectangle(ax, ay, ax + wgt->w, ay + wgt->h, bg);
4053 }
4054 ALLEGRO_COLOR bd = wgt->theme.border_normal;
4055 if (focused)
4056 bd = wgt->theme.border_active;
4057 else if (hovered)
4058 bd = wgt->theme.border_hover;
4059 al_draw_rectangle(ax, ay, ax + wgt->w, ay + wgt->h, bd, _min_thickness(wgt->theme.border_thickness));
4060
4061 if (!font) return;
4062 float fh = (float)al_get_font_line_height(font);
4063 float pad = style->textarea_padding;
4064
4065 /* cursor blink: visible during first half of blink period */
4066 int cursor_visible = 0;
4067 if (focused) {
4068 double now = al_get_time();
4069 double elapsed = now - td->cursor_time;
4070 float period = style->textarea_cursor_blink_period;
4071 if (period <= 0.0f) period = 1.0f;
4072 double phase = elapsed - (double)(int)(elapsed / (double)period) * (double)period;
4073 cursor_visible = (phase < (double)period * 0.5) ? 1 : 0;
4074 }
4075 float cursor_w = _min_thickness(style->textarea_cursor_width);
4076
4077 if (td->multiline) {
4078 float view_h = wgt->h - pad * 2;
4079 /* two-pass: first check if scrollbar is needed at full width,
4080 * then recompute content_h at the narrower width if so */
4081 float content_h = _textarea_content_height(td, font, wgt->w, pad);
4082 int need_scrollbar = (content_h > view_h) ? 1 : 0;
4083 float sb_size = need_scrollbar ? style->scrollbar_size : 0;
4084 float text_area_w = wgt->w - sb_size;
4085 if (need_scrollbar) {
4086 content_h = _textarea_content_height(td, font, text_area_w, pad);
4087 }
4088
4089 /* auto-scroll to keep cursor visible (skip if user just scrolled with mouse wheel) */
4090 if (focused && !td->scroll_from_wheel) {
4091 /* compute cursor Y position within content */
4092 float cur_cx = 0;
4093 float cur_cy = 0;
4094 for (size_t i = 0; i < td->cursor_pos && i < td->text_len;) {
4095 if (td->text[i] == '\n') {
4096 cur_cx = 0;
4097 cur_cy += fh;
4098 i++;
4099 continue;
4100 }
4101 int clen = _utf8_char_len((unsigned char)td->text[i]);
4102 if (i + (size_t)clen > td->text_len) clen = (int)(td->text_len - i);
4103 char ch[5];
4104 memcpy(ch, &td->text[i], (size_t)clen);
4105 ch[clen] = '\0';
4106 float cw2 = _text_w(font, ch);
4107 if (cur_cx + cw2 > text_area_w - pad * 2) {
4108 cur_cx = 0;
4109 cur_cy += fh;
4110 }
4111 cur_cx += cw2;
4112 i += (size_t)clen;
4113 }
4114 /* ensure cursor line is within visible region */
4115 if (cur_cy < (float)td->scroll_y) {
4116 td->scroll_y = (int)cur_cy;
4117 }
4118 if (cur_cy + fh > (float)td->scroll_y + view_h) {
4119 td->scroll_y = (int)(cur_cy + fh - view_h);
4120 }
4121 }
4122
4123 /* clamp scroll_y */
4124 if (need_scrollbar) {
4125 float max_sy = content_h - view_h;
4126 if (max_sy < 0) max_sy = 0;
4127 if ((float)td->scroll_y > max_sy) td->scroll_y = (int)max_sy;
4128 if (td->scroll_y < 0) td->scroll_y = 0;
4129 } else {
4130 td->scroll_y = 0;
4131 }
4132
4133 /* clip to widget bounds (text area only, leaving room for scrollbar) */
4134 int pcx, pcy, pcw, pch;
4135 al_get_clipping_rectangle(&pcx, &pcy, &pcw, &pch);
4136 _set_clipping_rect_transformed((int)ax, (int)ay, (int)text_area_w, (int)wgt->h);
4137 /* selection range */
4138 size_t sel_lo = 0, sel_hi = 0;
4139 int has_sel = _textarea_has_selection(td);
4140 if (has_sel) _textarea_sel_range(td, &sel_lo, &sel_hi);
4141 ALLEGRO_COLOR sel_bg = wgt->theme.selection_color;
4142
4143 /* simple line-wrap drawing with UTF-8 support */
4144 float cx = ax + pad;
4145 float cy = ay + pad - (float)td->scroll_y;
4146 /* cursor position tracked during layout */
4147 float cursor_cx = cx;
4148 float cursor_cy = cy;
4149 for (size_t i = 0; i < td->text_len;) {
4150 if (i == td->cursor_pos) {
4151 cursor_cx = cx;
4152 cursor_cy = cy;
4153 }
4154 if (td->text[i] == '\n') {
4155 /* draw selection highlight on newline (small rect at end of line) */
4156 if (has_sel && i >= sel_lo && i < sel_hi && cy + fh > ay && cy < ay + wgt->h) {
4157 float space_w = _text_w(font, " ");
4158 al_draw_filled_rectangle(cx, cy, cx + space_w, cy + fh, sel_bg);
4159 }
4160 cx = ax + pad;
4161 cy += fh;
4162 i++;
4163 continue;
4164 }
4165 int clen = _utf8_char_len((unsigned char)td->text[i]);
4166 if (i + (size_t)clen > td->text_len) clen = (int)(td->text_len - i);
4167 char ch[5];
4168 memcpy(ch, &td->text[i], (size_t)clen);
4169 ch[clen] = '\0';
4170 float cw = _text_w(font, ch);
4171 if (cx + cw > ax + text_area_w - pad) {
4172 cx = ax + pad;
4173 cy += fh;
4174 if (i == td->cursor_pos) {
4175 cursor_cx = cx;
4176 cursor_cy = cy;
4177 }
4178 }
4179 if (cy + fh > ay && cy < ay + wgt->h) {
4180 /* draw selection highlight behind character */
4181 if (has_sel && i >= sel_lo && i < sel_hi) {
4182 al_draw_filled_rectangle(cx, cy, cx + cw, cy + fh, sel_bg);
4183 }
4184 al_draw_text(font, wgt->theme.text_normal, cx, cy, 0, ch);
4185 }
4186 cx += cw;
4187 /* check cursor positions within the multi-byte character */
4188 for (int b = 1; b < clen; b++) {
4189 if (i + (size_t)b == td->cursor_pos) {
4190 cursor_cx = cx;
4191 cursor_cy = cy;
4192 }
4193 }
4194 i += (size_t)clen;
4195 }
4196 /* cursor is after all text when cursor_pos >= text_len */
4197 if (td->cursor_pos >= td->text_len) {
4198 cursor_cx = cx;
4199 cursor_cy = cy;
4200 }
4201 /* cursor */
4202 if (cursor_visible) {
4203 al_draw_filled_rectangle(cursor_cx, cursor_cy, cursor_cx + cursor_w, cursor_cy + fh, wgt->theme.text_active);
4204 }
4205 al_set_clipping_rectangle(pcx, pcy, pcw, pch);
4206
4207 /* draw scrollbar outside clipping region */
4208 if (need_scrollbar) {
4209 _draw_widget_vscrollbar(ax, ay + pad, wgt->w, view_h, content_h, (float)td->scroll_y, style);
4210 }
4211 } else {
4212 /* single line with horizontal scrolling */
4213 float ty = ay + (wgt->h - fh) / 2.0f;
4214 float inner_w = wgt->w - pad * 2;
4215
4216 /* build display text (masked if mask_char is set) */
4217 char display_text[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
4218 if (td->mask_char && td->text_len > 0) {
4219 size_t n = td->text_len;
4220 if (n >= N_GUI_TEXT_MAX) n = N_GUI_TEXT_MAX - 1;
4221 memset(display_text, td->mask_char, n);
4222 display_text[n] = '\0';
4223 } else {
4224 memcpy(display_text, td->text, td->text_len);
4225 display_text[td->text_len] = '\0';
4226 }
4227
4228 /* compute cursor pixel offset from text start */
4229 char tmp[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
4230 size_t cpos = td->cursor_pos;
4231 if (cpos > td->text_len) cpos = td->text_len;
4232 memcpy(tmp, display_text, cpos);
4233 tmp[cpos] = '\0';
4234 float cursor_px = _text_w(font, tmp);
4235
4236 /* adjust scroll_x so cursor stays visible within the inner area */
4237 if (cursor_px - td->scroll_x < 0) {
4238 td->scroll_x = cursor_px;
4239 }
4240 if (cursor_px - td->scroll_x > inner_w - cursor_w) {
4241 td->scroll_x = cursor_px - inner_w + cursor_w;
4242 }
4243 if (td->scroll_x < 0) td->scroll_x = 0;
4244
4245 /* clip text to widget inner bounds */
4246 int pcx, pcy, pcw, pch;
4247 al_get_clipping_rectangle(&pcx, &pcy, &pcw, &pch);
4248 _set_clipping_rect_transformed((int)(ax + pad), (int)ay, (int)inner_w, (int)wgt->h);
4249 /* draw selection highlight for single-line */
4250 if (_textarea_has_selection(td)) {
4251 size_t sl, sh;
4252 _textarea_sel_range(td, &sl, &sh);
4253 char stmp[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
4254 memcpy(stmp, display_text, sl);
4255 stmp[sl] = '\0';
4256 float sel_x1 = _text_w(font, stmp);
4257 memcpy(stmp, display_text, sh);
4258 stmp[sh] = '\0';
4259 float sel_x2 = _text_w(font, stmp);
4260 float sx1 = ax + pad + sel_x1 - td->scroll_x;
4261 float sx2 = ax + pad + sel_x2 - td->scroll_x;
4262 al_draw_filled_rectangle(sx1, ty, sx2, ty + fh, wgt->theme.selection_color);
4263 }
4264 al_draw_text(font, wgt->theme.text_normal, ax + pad - td->scroll_x, ty, 0, display_text);
4265 /* cursor */
4266 if (cursor_visible) {
4267 float cx = ax + pad + cursor_px - td->scroll_x;
4268 al_draw_filled_rectangle(cx, ty, cx + cursor_w, ty + fh, wgt->theme.text_active);
4269 }
4270 al_set_clipping_rectangle(pcx, pcy, pcw, pch);
4271 }
4272}
4273
4275static void _draw_checkbox(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, float ox, float oy, ALLEGRO_FONT* default_font, N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
4276 N_GUI_CHECKBOX_DATA* cd = (N_GUI_CHECKBOX_DATA*)wgt->data;
4277 float ax = ox + wgt->x;
4278 float ay = oy + wgt->y;
4279 ALLEGRO_FONT* font = wgt->font ? wgt->font : default_font;
4280
4281 float box_size = wgt->h < style->checkbox_max_size ? wgt->h : style->checkbox_max_size;
4282 float box_y = ay + (wgt->h - box_size) / 2.0f;
4283
4284 /* select bitmap: hover > checked/unchecked > color theme */
4285 ALLEGRO_BITMAP* box_bmp = NULL;
4286 if ((wgt->state & N_GUI_STATE_HOVER) && cd->box_hover_bitmap) {
4287 box_bmp = cd->box_hover_bitmap;
4288 } else if (cd->checked && cd->box_checked_bitmap) {
4289 box_bmp = cd->box_checked_bitmap;
4290 } else if (cd->box_bitmap) {
4291 box_bmp = cd->box_bitmap;
4292 }
4293
4294 if (box_bmp) {
4295 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(box_bmp, 0, 0,
4296 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(box_bmp), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(box_bmp),
4297 ax, box_y, box_size, box_size, 0);
4298 } else {
4299 _draw_themed_rect(&wgt->theme, wgt->state, ax, box_y, box_size, box_size, 0);
4300
4301 if (cd->checked) {
4302 /* draw checkmark as two lines */
4303 ALLEGRO_COLOR tc = wgt->theme.text_active;
4304 float m = style->checkbox_mark_margin;
4305 al_draw_line(ax + m, box_y + box_size / 2.0f,
4306 ax + box_size / 2.0f, box_y + box_size - m, tc, _min_thickness(style->checkbox_mark_thickness));
4307 al_draw_line(ax + box_size / 2.0f, box_y + box_size - m,
4308 ax + box_size - m, box_y + m, tc, _min_thickness(style->checkbox_mark_thickness));
4309 }
4310 }
4311
4312 if (font && cd->label[0]) {
4313 int cbbx = 0, cbby = 0, cbbw = 0, cbbh = 0;
4314 al_get_text_dimensions(font, cd->label, &cbbx, &cbby, &cbbw, &cbbh);
4315 float fh = (float)cbbh;
4316 float label_max_w = wgt->w - box_size - style->checkbox_label_gap;
4317 _draw_text_truncated(font, _text_for_state(&wgt->theme, wgt->state),
4318 ax + box_size + style->checkbox_label_offset, ay + (wgt->h - fh) / 2.0f - (float)cbby, label_max_w, cd->label);
4319 }
4320}
4321
4323static void _draw_scrollbar(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, float ox, float oy, const N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
4324 N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_DATA* sb = (N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_DATA*)wgt->data;
4325 float ax = ox + wgt->x;
4326 float ay = oy + wgt->y;
4327 int rounded = (sb->shape == N_GUI_SHAPE_ROUNDED) ? 1 : 0;
4328
4329 /* track */
4330 if (sb->track_bitmap) {
4331 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(sb->track_bitmap, 0, 0,
4332 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(sb->track_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(sb->track_bitmap),
4333 ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h, 0);
4334 } else {
4335 _draw_themed_rect(&wgt->theme, N_GUI_STATE_IDLE, ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h, rounded);
4336 }
4337
4338 /* compute thumb */
4339 double ratio = sb->viewport_size / sb->content_size;
4340 if (ratio > 1.0) ratio = 1.0;
4341 double max_scroll = sb->content_size - sb->viewport_size;
4342 if (max_scroll < 0) max_scroll = 0;
4343 double pos_ratio = (max_scroll > 0) ? sb->scroll_pos / max_scroll : 0;
4344
4345 float thumb_x, thumb_y, thumb_w, thumb_h;
4346 if (sb->orientation == N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_V) {
4347 thumb_h = (float)(ratio * (double)wgt->h);
4348 if (thumb_h < style->scrollbar_thumb_min) thumb_h = style->scrollbar_thumb_min;
4349 thumb_w = wgt->w - style->scrollbar_thumb_padding * 2;
4350 thumb_x = ax + style->scrollbar_thumb_padding;
4351 float track_range = wgt->h - thumb_h;
4352 thumb_y = ay + (float)(pos_ratio * (double)track_range);
4353 } else {
4354 thumb_w = (float)(ratio * (double)wgt->w);
4355 if (thumb_w < style->scrollbar_thumb_min) thumb_w = style->scrollbar_thumb_min;
4356 thumb_h = wgt->h - style->scrollbar_thumb_padding * 2;
4357 thumb_y = ay + style->scrollbar_thumb_padding;
4358 float track_range = wgt->w - thumb_w;
4359 thumb_x = ax + (float)(pos_ratio * (double)track_range);
4360 }
4361
4362 ALLEGRO_BITMAP* tbmp = _select_state_bitmap(wgt->state, sb->thumb_bitmap, sb->thumb_hover_bitmap, sb->thumb_active_bitmap);
4363 if (tbmp) {
4364 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(tbmp, 0, 0,
4365 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(tbmp), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(tbmp),
4366 thumb_x, thumb_y, thumb_w, thumb_h, 0);
4367 } else {
4368 _draw_themed_rect(&wgt->theme, wgt->state, thumb_x, thumb_y, thumb_w, thumb_h, rounded);
4369 }
4370}
4371
4373static void _draw_listbox(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, float ox, float oy, ALLEGRO_FONT* default_font, N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
4374 N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* ld = (N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)wgt->data;
4375 float ax = ox + wgt->x;
4376 float ay = oy + wgt->y;
4377 ALLEGRO_FONT* font = wgt->font ? wgt->font : default_font;
4378
4379 /* background */
4380 if (ld->bg_bitmap) {
4381 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(ld->bg_bitmap, 0, 0,
4382 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(ld->bg_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(ld->bg_bitmap),
4383 ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h, 0);
4384 } else {
4385 al_draw_filled_rectangle(ax, ay, ax + wgt->w, ay + wgt->h, wgt->theme.bg_normal);
4386 }
4387 al_draw_rectangle(ax, ay, ax + wgt->w, ay + wgt->h, wgt->theme.border_normal, wgt->theme.border_thickness);
4388
4389 if (!font) return;
4390 float fh = (float)al_get_font_line_height(font);
4391 float ih = ld->item_height > fh ? ld->item_height : fh + style->item_height_pad;
4392 /* Canonicalise: a listbox created with a too-small item_height
4393 (or with the style default of 20 when the active font is
4394 taller) would otherwise draw rows at `ih` but have every hit-
4395 test / hover-row / DnD helper read the raw `ld->item_height`,
4396 producing off-by-N row mismatches. Write the effective value
4397 back so all consumers agree on one pixel height. */
4398 ld->item_height = ih;
4399 int visible_count = (int)(wgt->h / ih);
4400 float pad = style->item_text_padding;
4401
4402 /* clamp scroll_offset to valid range */
4403 int max_off = (int)ld->nb_items - visible_count;
4404 if (max_off < 0) max_off = 0;
4405 if (ld->scroll_offset > max_off) ld->scroll_offset = max_off;
4406 if (ld->scroll_offset < 0) ld->scroll_offset = 0;
4407
4408 int need_scrollbar = ((int)ld->nb_items > visible_count) ? 1 : 0;
4409 float sb_w = need_scrollbar ? style->scrollbar_size : 0;
4410 float item_area_w = wgt->w - sb_w;
4411
4412 for (int i = 0; i < visible_count && (size_t)(i + ld->scroll_offset) < ld->nb_items; i++) {
4413 int idx = i + ld->scroll_offset;
4414 float iy = ay + (float)i * ih;
4415 N_GUI_LISTITEM* item = &ld->items[idx];
4416
4417 int row_hovered = (ld->hover_row == idx) ? 1 : 0;
4418 if (item->selected && ld->item_selected_bitmap) {
4419 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(ld->item_selected_bitmap, 0, 0,
4420 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(ld->item_selected_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(ld->item_selected_bitmap),
4421 ax + style->item_selection_inset, iy, item_area_w - style->item_selection_inset * 2, ih, 0);
4422 } else if (item->selected) {
4423 al_draw_filled_rectangle(ax + style->item_selection_inset, iy, ax + item_area_w - style->item_selection_inset, iy + ih, wgt->theme.bg_active);
4424 } else if (row_hovered) {
4425 /* Hover tint on the row under the cursor (only when the
4426 row isn't selected, selection wins). */
4427 al_draw_filled_rectangle(ax + style->item_selection_inset, iy,
4428 ax + item_area_w - style->item_selection_inset, iy + ih,
4429 wgt->theme.bg_hover);
4430 } else if (ld->item_bg_bitmap) {
4431 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(ld->item_bg_bitmap, 0, 0,
4432 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(ld->item_bg_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(ld->item_bg_bitmap),
4433 ax + style->item_selection_inset, iy, item_area_w - style->item_selection_inset * 2, ih, 0);
4434 }
4435 float item_max_w = item_area_w - pad * 2.0f;
4436 _draw_text_truncated(font, item->selected ? wgt->theme.text_active : wgt->theme.text_normal,
4437 ax + pad, iy + (ih - fh) / 2.0f, item_max_w, item->text);
4438 }
4439
4440 /* draw scrollbar indicator when items overflow */
4441 if (need_scrollbar) {
4442 float sb_x = ax + wgt->w - sb_w;
4443 /* scrollbar track */
4444 al_draw_filled_rectangle(sb_x, ay, ax + wgt->w, ay + wgt->h, wgt->theme.bg_normal);
4445 al_draw_line(sb_x, ay, sb_x, ay + wgt->h, wgt->theme.border_normal, 1.0f);
4446 /* thumb */
4447 float ratio = (float)visible_count / (float)ld->nb_items;
4448 float thumb_h = ratio * wgt->h;
4449 if (thumb_h < style->scrollbar_thumb_min) thumb_h = style->scrollbar_thumb_min;
4450 float track_range = wgt->h - thumb_h;
4451 float pos_ratio = (max_off > 0) ? (float)ld->scroll_offset / (float)max_off : 0;
4452 float thumb_y = ay + pos_ratio * track_range;
4453 float thumb_pad = style->scrollbar_thumb_padding;
4454 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(sb_x + thumb_pad, thumb_y, ax + wgt->w - thumb_pad, thumb_y + thumb_h,
4455 2.0f, 2.0f, wgt->theme.bg_hover);
4456 }
4457}
4458
4460static void _draw_radiolist(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, float ox, float oy, ALLEGRO_FONT* default_font, const N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
4461 N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA* rd = (N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA*)wgt->data;
4462 float ax = ox + wgt->x;
4463 float ay = oy + wgt->y;
4464 ALLEGRO_FONT* font = wgt->font ? wgt->font : default_font;
4465
4466 int hovered = (wgt->state & N_GUI_STATE_HOVER) ? 1 : 0;
4467
4468 /* background, honour hover so the radiolist behaves like the
4469 other interactive widgets even though per-row hover is not
4470 tracked separately (no consumer today). */
4471 if (rd->bg_bitmap) {
4472 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(rd->bg_bitmap, 0, 0,
4473 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(rd->bg_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(rd->bg_bitmap),
4474 ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h, 0);
4475 } else {
4476 ALLEGRO_COLOR bg = hovered ? wgt->theme.bg_hover : wgt->theme.bg_normal;
4477 al_draw_filled_rectangle(ax, ay, ax + wgt->w, ay + wgt->h, bg);
4478 }
4479 ALLEGRO_COLOR bd = hovered ? wgt->theme.border_hover : wgt->theme.border_normal;
4480 al_draw_rectangle(ax, ay, ax + wgt->w, ay + wgt->h, bd, wgt->theme.border_thickness);
4481
4482 if (!font) return;
4483 float fh = (float)al_get_font_line_height(font);
4484 float ih = rd->item_height > fh ? rd->item_height : fh + style->item_height_pad;
4485 int visible_count = (int)(wgt->h / ih);
4486 float radio_r = (ih - style->item_height_pad * 2) / 2.0f;
4487 if (radio_r < style->radio_circle_min_r) radio_r = style->radio_circle_min_r;
4488 float pad = style->radio_label_gap;
4489
4490 /* clamp scroll_offset to valid range */
4491 int max_off = (int)rd->nb_items - visible_count;
4492 if (max_off < 0) max_off = 0;
4493 if (rd->scroll_offset > max_off) rd->scroll_offset = max_off;
4494 if (rd->scroll_offset < 0) rd->scroll_offset = 0;
4495
4496 int need_scrollbar = ((int)rd->nb_items > visible_count) ? 1 : 0;
4497
4498 for (int i = 0; i < visible_count && (size_t)(i + rd->scroll_offset) < rd->nb_items; i++) {
4499 int idx = i + rd->scroll_offset;
4500 float iy = ay + (float)i * ih;
4501 float cy = iy + ih / 2.0f;
4502 float cx = ax + pad + radio_r;
4503
4504 /* item background bitmap */
4505 if (idx == rd->selected_index && rd->item_selected_bitmap) {
4506 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(rd->item_selected_bitmap, 0, 0,
4507 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(rd->item_selected_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(rd->item_selected_bitmap),
4508 ax, iy, wgt->w, ih, 0);
4509 } else if (rd->item_bg_bitmap) {
4510 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(rd->item_bg_bitmap, 0, 0,
4511 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(rd->item_bg_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(rd->item_bg_bitmap),
4512 ax, iy, wgt->w, ih, 0);
4513 }
4514
4515 /* outer circle */
4516 al_draw_circle(cx, cy, radio_r, wgt->theme.border_normal, _min_thickness(style->radio_circle_border_thickness));
4517
4518 /* inner filled circle if selected */
4519 if (idx == rd->selected_index) {
4520 al_draw_filled_circle(cx, cy, radio_r - style->radio_inner_offset, wgt->theme.text_active);
4521 }
4522
4523 /* label */
4524 al_draw_text(font, wgt->theme.text_normal,
4525 cx + radio_r + pad, iy + (ih - fh) / 2.0f, 0, rd->items[idx].text);
4526 }
4527
4528 /* draw scrollbar indicator when items overflow */
4529 if (need_scrollbar) {
4530 float sb_w = style->scrollbar_size;
4531 float sb_x = ax + wgt->w - sb_w;
4532 al_draw_filled_rectangle(sb_x, ay, ax + wgt->w, ay + wgt->h, wgt->theme.bg_normal);
4533 al_draw_line(sb_x, ay, sb_x, ay + wgt->h, wgt->theme.border_normal, 1.0f);
4534 float ratio = (float)visible_count / (float)rd->nb_items;
4535 float thumb_h = ratio * wgt->h;
4536 if (thumb_h < style->scrollbar_thumb_min) thumb_h = style->scrollbar_thumb_min;
4537 float track_range = wgt->h - thumb_h;
4538 float pos_ratio = (max_off > 0) ? (float)rd->scroll_offset / (float)max_off : 0;
4539 float thumb_y = ay + pos_ratio * track_range;
4540 float thumb_pad = style->scrollbar_thumb_padding;
4541 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(sb_x + thumb_pad, thumb_y, ax + wgt->w - thumb_pad, thumb_y + thumb_h,
4542 2.0f, 2.0f, wgt->theme.bg_hover);
4543 }
4544}
4545
4547static void _draw_combobox(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, float ox, float oy, ALLEGRO_FONT* default_font, const N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
4548 N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA* cd = (N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA*)wgt->data;
4549 float ax = ox + wgt->x;
4550 float ay = oy + wgt->y;
4551 ALLEGRO_FONT* font = wgt->font ? wgt->font : default_font;
4552
4553 if (cd->bg_bitmap) {
4554 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(cd->bg_bitmap, 0, 0,
4555 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(cd->bg_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(cd->bg_bitmap),
4556 ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h, 0);
4557 } else {
4558 int rounded = 0;
4559 _draw_themed_rect(&wgt->theme, wgt->state, ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h, rounded);
4560 }
4561
4562 if (!font) return;
4563 float pad = style->item_text_padding;
4564
4565 /* display selected item text (truncated to fit) */
4566 const char* display_text = "";
4567 if (cd->selected_index >= 0 && (size_t)cd->selected_index < cd->nb_items) {
4568 display_text = cd->items[cd->selected_index].text;
4569 }
4570 int cbbbx = 0, cbbby = 0, cbbbw = 0, cbbbh = 0;
4571 al_get_text_dimensions(font, display_text[0] ? display_text : "Ay", &cbbbx, &cbbby, &cbbbw, &cbbbh);
4572 float fh = (float)cbbbh;
4573 float max_text_w = wgt->w - pad - style->dropdown_arrow_reserve;
4574 _draw_text_truncated(font, _text_for_state(&wgt->theme, wgt->state),
4575 ax + pad, ay + (wgt->h - fh) / 2.0f - (float)cbbby, max_text_w, display_text);
4576
4577 /* dropdown arrow */
4578 float arrow_x = ax + wgt->w - style->dropdown_arrow_reserve;
4579 float arrow_y = ay + wgt->h / 2.0f;
4580 ALLEGRO_COLOR ac = wgt->theme.text_normal;
4581 al_draw_line(arrow_x, arrow_y - style->dropdown_arrow_half_h, arrow_x + style->dropdown_arrow_half_w, arrow_y + style->dropdown_arrow_half_h, ac, _min_thickness(style->dropdown_arrow_thickness));
4582 al_draw_line(arrow_x + style->dropdown_arrow_half_w, arrow_y + style->dropdown_arrow_half_h, arrow_x + style->dropdown_arrow_half_w * 2, arrow_y - style->dropdown_arrow_half_h, ac, _min_thickness(style->dropdown_arrow_thickness));
4583}
4584
4586/* Compute the effective top-Y of an open dropdown / dropmenu panel.
4587 * widget_top = oy + wgt->y (absolute Y of the widget's top edge)
4588 * widget_bottom = oy + wgt->y + wgt->h (absolute Y of the widget's bottom edge)
4589 * panel_h = intended panel height
4590 * expand_up = non-zero if caller requests upward expansion (flag set)
4591 *
4592 * When expand_up is set, open upward if there is room above; fall back to
4593 * downward if not. When expand_up is clear, open downward; auto-flip upward
4594 * only if the panel doesn't fit below and does fit above. If neither fits,
4595 * whichever side has more free space wins. Keeps draw + click paths in sync. */
4596static float _dropdown_panel_y(const N_GUI_CTX* ctx, float widget_top, float widget_bottom, float panel_h, int expand_up) {
4597 float ay_down = widget_bottom;
4598 float ay_up = widget_top - panel_h;
4599 int fits_down = (ctx->display_h <= 0) || (ay_down + panel_h <= (float)ctx->display_h);
4600 int fits_up = (ay_up >= 0.0f);
4601 if (expand_up) {
4602 return fits_up ? ay_up : (fits_down ? ay_down : ay_up);
4603 }
4604 if (!fits_down && fits_up) return ay_up;
4605 if (!fits_down && !fits_up) {
4606 /* neither fits, pick the side with more room */
4607 float space_down = (ctx->display_h > 0) ? ((float)ctx->display_h - widget_bottom) : panel_h;
4608 float space_up = widget_top;
4609 return (space_up > space_down) ? ay_up : ay_down;
4610 }
4611 return ay_down;
4612}
4613
4614static void _draw_combobox_dropdown(N_GUI_CTX* ctx) {
4615 if (ctx->open_combobox_id < 0) return;
4616 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->open_combobox_id);
4617 if (!wgt || !wgt->data) return;
4618 N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA* cd = (N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA*)wgt->data;
4619 if (!cd->is_open || cd->nb_items == 0) return;
4620
4621 /* find the window containing this widget to get absolute position */
4622 float ox = 0, oy = 0;
4623 if (!_find_widget_window(ctx, wgt->id, &ox, &oy)) return;
4624
4625 ALLEGRO_FONT* font = wgt->font ? wgt->font : ctx->default_font;
4626 if (!font) return;
4627
4628 float ax = ox + wgt->x;
4629 float fh = (float)al_get_font_line_height(font);
4630 float ih = cd->item_height > fh ? cd->item_height : fh + ctx->style.item_height_pad;
4631 int vis = (int)cd->nb_items;
4632 if (vis > cd->max_visible) vis = cd->max_visible;
4633 float dropdown_h = (float)vis * ih;
4634 float ay = _dropdown_panel_y(ctx, oy + wgt->y, oy + wgt->y + wgt->h, dropdown_h,
4635 cd->flags & N_GUI_COMBOBOX_EXPAND_UP);
4636 float pad = ctx->style.item_text_padding;
4637
4638 /* dropdown width, auto-expand if flag is set */
4639 float dropdown_w = wgt->w;
4640 if (cd->flags & N_GUI_COMBOBOX_AUTO_WIDTH) {
4641 float max_item_w = 0;
4642 for (size_t i = 0; i < cd->nb_items; i++) {
4643 float tw = _text_w(font, cd->items[i].text);
4644 if (tw > max_item_w) max_item_w = tw;
4645 }
4646 float needed = max_item_w + pad * 2;
4647 if (needed > dropdown_w) dropdown_w = needed;
4648 /* apply cap */
4649 float cap = ctx->style.combobox_max_dropdown_width;
4650 if (cap <= 0) cap = ctx->display_w > 0 ? (float)ctx->display_w : 4096.0f;
4651 if (dropdown_w > cap) dropdown_w = cap;
4652 /* clamp to display right edge */
4653 if (ctx->display_w > 0 && ax + dropdown_w > (float)ctx->display_w) {
4654 dropdown_w = (float)ctx->display_w - ax;
4655 if (dropdown_w < wgt->w) dropdown_w = wgt->w;
4656 }
4657 }
4658
4659 /* scrollbar geometry, only shown when items exceed max_visible */
4660 int need_scrollbar = ((int)cd->nb_items > cd->max_visible);
4661 float sb_size = ctx->style.scrollbar_size;
4662 if (sb_size < 10.0f) sb_size = 10.0f;
4663 float item_area_w = need_scrollbar ? dropdown_w - sb_size : dropdown_w;
4664
4665 /* dropdown background */
4666 if (cd->bg_bitmap) {
4667 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(cd->bg_bitmap, 0, 0,
4668 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(cd->bg_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(cd->bg_bitmap),
4669 ax, ay, dropdown_w, dropdown_h, 0);
4670 } else {
4671 al_draw_filled_rectangle(ax, ay, ax + dropdown_w, ay + dropdown_h, wgt->theme.bg_normal);
4672 }
4673 al_draw_rectangle(ax, ay, ax + dropdown_w, ay + dropdown_h, wgt->theme.border_active, _min_thickness(ctx->style.dropdown_border_thickness));
4674
4675 /* clip item drawing to the dropdown area */
4676 int prev_cx = 0, prev_cy = 0, prev_cw = 0, prev_ch = 0;
4677 al_get_clipping_rectangle(&prev_cx, &prev_cy, &prev_cw, &prev_ch);
4678 al_set_clipping_rectangle((int)ax, (int)ay, (int)dropdown_w, (int)dropdown_h);
4679
4680 /* items */
4681 float max_text_w = item_area_w - pad * 2;
4682 for (int i = 0; i < vis && (size_t)(i + cd->scroll_offset) < cd->nb_items; i++) {
4683 int idx = i + cd->scroll_offset;
4684 float iy = ay + (float)i * ih;
4685 int hovered = _point_in_rect((float)ctx->mouse_x, (float)ctx->mouse_y,
4686 ax, iy, item_area_w, ih);
4687
4688 if (idx == cd->selected_index) {
4689 if (cd->item_selected_bitmap) {
4690 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(cd->item_selected_bitmap, 0, 0,
4691 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(cd->item_selected_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(cd->item_selected_bitmap),
4692 ax + ctx->style.item_selection_inset, iy, item_area_w - ctx->style.item_selection_inset * 2, ih, 0);
4693 } else {
4694 al_draw_filled_rectangle(ax + ctx->style.item_selection_inset, iy, ax + item_area_w - ctx->style.item_selection_inset, iy + ih, wgt->theme.bg_active);
4695 }
4696 } else if (hovered) {
4697 if (cd->item_bg_bitmap) {
4698 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(cd->item_bg_bitmap, 0, 0,
4699 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(cd->item_bg_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(cd->item_bg_bitmap),
4700 ax + ctx->style.item_selection_inset, iy, item_area_w - ctx->style.item_selection_inset * 2, ih, 0);
4701 } else {
4702 al_draw_filled_rectangle(ax + ctx->style.item_selection_inset, iy, ax + item_area_w - ctx->style.item_selection_inset, iy + ih, wgt->theme.bg_hover);
4703 }
4704 }
4705
4706 ALLEGRO_COLOR tc = (idx == cd->selected_index) ? wgt->theme.text_active : wgt->theme.text_normal;
4707 _draw_text_truncated(font, tc, ax + pad, iy + (ih - fh) / 2.0f, max_text_w, cd->items[idx].text);
4708 }
4709
4710 al_set_clipping_rectangle(prev_cx, prev_cy, prev_cw, prev_ch);
4711
4712 /* scrollbar */
4713 if (need_scrollbar) {
4714 float sb_x = ax + dropdown_w - sb_size;
4715 /* track */
4716 al_draw_filled_rectangle(sb_x, ay, sb_x + sb_size, ay + dropdown_h,
4717 ctx->style.scrollbar_track_color);
4718 /* thumb, proportional to visible / total, positioned by scroll_offset */
4719 float ratio = (float)cd->max_visible / (float)cd->nb_items;
4720 if (ratio > 1.0f) ratio = 1.0f;
4721 float thumb_h = ratio * dropdown_h;
4722 float thumb_min = ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min;
4723 if (thumb_min < 12.0f) thumb_min = 12.0f;
4724 if (thumb_h < thumb_min) thumb_h = thumb_min;
4725 int max_offset = (int)cd->nb_items - cd->max_visible;
4726 float pos_ratio = (max_offset > 0) ? (float)cd->scroll_offset / (float)max_offset : 0.0f;
4727 float thumb_y = ay + pos_ratio * (dropdown_h - thumb_h);
4728 float thumb_pad = ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_padding;
4729 float corner_r = ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_corner_r;
4730 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(sb_x + thumb_pad, thumb_y,
4731 sb_x + sb_size - thumb_pad,
4732 thumb_y + thumb_h,
4733 corner_r, corner_r,
4734 ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_color);
4735 }
4736}
4737
4739static void _draw_dropmenu(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, float ox, float oy, ALLEGRO_FONT* default_font, const N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
4740 N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA* dd = (N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)wgt->data;
4741 float ax = ox + wgt->x;
4742 float ay = oy + wgt->y;
4743 ALLEGRO_FONT* font = wgt->font ? wgt->font : default_font;
4744
4745 int draw_state = wgt->state;
4746 if (dd->is_open) draw_state |= N_GUI_STATE_ACTIVE;
4747
4748 _draw_themed_rect(&wgt->theme, draw_state, ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h, 0);
4749
4750 if (font && dd->label[0]) {
4751 ALLEGRO_COLOR tc = _text_for_state(&wgt->theme, draw_state);
4752 int dbbx = 0, dbby = 0, dbbw = 0, dbbh = 0;
4753 al_get_text_dimensions(font, dd->label, &dbbx, &dbby, &dbbw, &dbbh);
4754 float fh = (float)dbbh;
4755 float pad = style->item_text_padding;
4756 float max_text_w = wgt->w - pad - style->dropdown_arrow_reserve;
4757 _draw_text_truncated(font, tc, ax + pad, ay + (wgt->h - fh) / 2.0f - (float)dbby, max_text_w, dd->label);
4758 }
4759
4760 /* dropdown arrow */
4761 float arrow_x = ax + wgt->w - style->dropdown_arrow_reserve;
4762 float arrow_y = ay + wgt->h / 2.0f;
4763 ALLEGRO_COLOR ac = wgt->theme.text_normal;
4764 al_draw_line(arrow_x, arrow_y - style->dropdown_arrow_half_h, arrow_x + style->dropdown_arrow_half_w, arrow_y + style->dropdown_arrow_half_h, ac, _min_thickness(style->dropdown_arrow_thickness));
4765 al_draw_line(arrow_x + style->dropdown_arrow_half_w, arrow_y + style->dropdown_arrow_half_h, arrow_x + style->dropdown_arrow_half_w * 2, arrow_y - style->dropdown_arrow_half_h, ac, _min_thickness(style->dropdown_arrow_thickness));
4766}
4767
4769static void _draw_dropmenu_panel(N_GUI_CTX* ctx) {
4770 if (ctx->open_dropmenu_id < 0) return;
4771 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->open_dropmenu_id);
4772 if (!wgt || !wgt->data) return;
4773 N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA* dd = (N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)wgt->data;
4774 if (!dd->is_open || dd->nb_entries == 0) return;
4775
4776 /* find the window containing this widget to get absolute position */
4777 float ox = 0, oy = 0;
4778 if (!_find_widget_window(ctx, wgt->id, &ox, &oy)) return;
4779
4780 ALLEGRO_FONT* font = wgt->font ? wgt->font : ctx->default_font;
4781 if (!font) return;
4782
4783 float ax = ox + wgt->x;
4784 float fh = (float)al_get_font_line_height(font);
4785 float ih = dd->item_height > fh ? dd->item_height : fh + ctx->style.item_height_pad;
4786 int vis = (int)dd->nb_entries;
4787 if (vis > dd->max_visible) vis = dd->max_visible;
4788 float panel_h = (float)vis * ih;
4789 float ay = _dropdown_panel_y(ctx, oy + wgt->y, oy + wgt->y + wgt->h, panel_h,
4790 dd->flags & N_GUI_DROPMENU_EXPAND_UP);
4791 float pad = ctx->style.item_text_padding;
4792
4793 /* scrollbar geometry, only shown when entries exceed max_visible */
4794 int need_scrollbar = ((int)dd->nb_entries > dd->max_visible);
4795 float sb_size = ctx->style.scrollbar_size;
4796 if (sb_size < 10.0f) sb_size = 10.0f;
4797 float item_area_w = need_scrollbar ? wgt->w - sb_size : wgt->w;
4798
4799 /* panel background */
4800 if (dd->panel_bitmap) {
4801 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(dd->panel_bitmap, 0, 0,
4802 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(dd->panel_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(dd->panel_bitmap),
4803 ax, ay, wgt->w, panel_h, 0);
4804 } else {
4805 al_draw_filled_rectangle(ax, ay, ax + wgt->w, ay + panel_h, wgt->theme.bg_normal);
4806 }
4807 al_draw_rectangle(ax, ay, ax + wgt->w, ay + panel_h, wgt->theme.border_active, _min_thickness(ctx->style.dropdown_border_thickness));
4808
4809 /* entries */
4810 float max_text_w = item_area_w - pad * 2.0f;
4811 for (int i = 0; i < vis && (size_t)(i + dd->scroll_offset) < dd->nb_entries; i++) {
4812 int idx = i + dd->scroll_offset;
4813 float iy = ay + (float)i * ih;
4814 int hovered = _point_in_rect((float)ctx->mouse_x, (float)ctx->mouse_y,
4815 ax, iy, item_area_w, ih);
4816
4817 if (hovered) {
4818 if (dd->item_hover_bitmap) {
4819 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(dd->item_hover_bitmap, 0, 0,
4820 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(dd->item_hover_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(dd->item_hover_bitmap),
4821 ax + ctx->style.item_selection_inset, iy, item_area_w - ctx->style.item_selection_inset * 2, ih, 0);
4822 } else {
4823 al_draw_filled_rectangle(ax + ctx->style.item_selection_inset, iy, ax + item_area_w - ctx->style.item_selection_inset, iy + ih, wgt->theme.bg_hover);
4824 }
4825 }
4826
4827 ALLEGRO_COLOR tc = hovered ? wgt->theme.text_hover : wgt->theme.text_normal;
4828 _draw_text_truncated(font, tc, ax + pad, iy + (ih - fh) / 2.0f, max_text_w, dd->entries[idx].text);
4829 }
4830
4831 /* scrollbar */
4832 if (need_scrollbar) {
4833 float sb_x = ax + wgt->w - sb_size;
4834 /* track */
4835 al_draw_filled_rectangle(sb_x, ay, sb_x + sb_size, ay + panel_h,
4836 ctx->style.scrollbar_track_color);
4837 /* thumb, proportional to visible / total, positioned by scroll_offset */
4838 float ratio = (float)dd->max_visible / (float)dd->nb_entries;
4839 if (ratio > 1.0f) ratio = 1.0f;
4840 float thumb_h = ratio * panel_h;
4841 float thumb_min = ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min;
4842 if (thumb_min < 12.0f) thumb_min = 12.0f;
4843 if (thumb_h < thumb_min) thumb_h = thumb_min;
4844 int max_offset = (int)dd->nb_entries - dd->max_visible;
4845 float pos_ratio = (max_offset > 0) ? (float)dd->scroll_offset / (float)max_offset : 0.0f;
4846 float thumb_y = ay + pos_ratio * (panel_h - thumb_h);
4847 float thumb_pad = ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_padding;
4848 float corner_r = ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_corner_r;
4849 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(sb_x + thumb_pad, thumb_y,
4850 sb_x + sb_size - thumb_pad,
4851 thumb_y + thumb_h,
4852 corner_r, corner_r,
4853 ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_color);
4854 }
4855}
4856
4858static void _draw_image(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, float ox, float oy) {
4859 N_GUI_IMAGE_DATA* id = (N_GUI_IMAGE_DATA*)wgt->data;
4860 float ax = ox + wgt->x;
4861 float ay = oy + wgt->y;
4862
4863 /* border */
4864 al_draw_rectangle(ax, ay, ax + wgt->w, ay + wgt->h, wgt->theme.border_normal, wgt->theme.border_thickness);
4865
4866 if (!id->bitmap) return;
4867 float bw = (float)al_get_bitmap_width(id->bitmap);
4868 float bh = (float)al_get_bitmap_height(id->bitmap);
4869
4870 if (id->scale_mode == N_GUI_IMAGE_STRETCH) {
4871 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(id->bitmap, 0, 0, bw, bh, ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h, 0);
4872 } else if (id->scale_mode == N_GUI_IMAGE_CENTER) {
4873 float dx = ax + (wgt->w - bw) / 2.0f;
4874 float dy = ay + (wgt->h - bh) / 2.0f;
4875 al_draw_bitmap(id->bitmap, dx, dy, 0);
4876 } else {
4877 /* N_GUI_IMAGE_FIT */
4878 float scale_x = wgt->w / bw;
4879 float scale_y = wgt->h / bh;
4880 float scale = (scale_x < scale_y) ? scale_x : scale_y;
4881 float dw = bw * scale;
4882 float dh = bh * scale;
4883 float dx = ax + (wgt->w - dw) / 2.0f;
4884 float dy = ay + (wgt->h - dh) / 2.0f;
4885 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(id->bitmap, 0, 0, bw, bh, dx, dy, dw, dh, 0);
4886 }
4887}
4888
4894static int _label_char_at_x(const N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* lb, ALLEGRO_FONT* font, float click_x) {
4895 if (!font || !lb->text[0]) return -1;
4896 if (click_x <= 0) return 0;
4897 size_t len = strlen(lb->text);
4898 char tmp[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
4899 int best = 0;
4900 float best_dist = click_x;
4901 for (size_t i = 0; i < len;) {
4902 int clen = _utf8_char_len((unsigned char)lb->text[i]);
4903 if (i + (size_t)clen > len) clen = (int)(len - i);
4904 size_t pos = i + (size_t)clen;
4905 memcpy(tmp, lb->text, pos);
4906 tmp[pos] = '\0';
4907 float tw = _text_w(font, tmp);
4908 float dist = click_x - tw;
4909 if (dist < 0) dist = -dist;
4910 if (dist < best_dist) {
4911 best_dist = dist;
4912 best = (int)pos;
4913 }
4914 if (tw > click_x) break;
4915 i += (size_t)clen;
4916 }
4917 return best;
4918}
4919
4923static float _label_text_origin_x(N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* lb, ALLEGRO_FONT* font, float ax, float wgt_w, float win_w, float wgt_x, float label_padding) {
4924 float effective_w = wgt_w;
4925 if (win_w > 0) {
4926 float max_from_win = win_w - wgt_x;
4927 if (max_from_win > effective_w) effective_w = max_from_win;
4928 }
4929 int lbbx = 0, lbby = 0, lbbw = 0, lbbh = 0;
4930 al_get_text_dimensions(font, lb->text, &lbbx, &lbby, &lbbw, &lbbh);
4931 float tw = (float)lbbw;
4932 float max_text_w = effective_w - label_padding * 2;
4933 if (lb->align == N_GUI_ALIGN_CENTER) {
4934 if (tw > max_text_w) return ax + label_padding;
4935 return ax + (effective_w - tw) / 2.0f - (float)lbbx;
4936 }
4937 if (lb->align == N_GUI_ALIGN_RIGHT) {
4938 if (tw > max_text_w) return ax + label_padding;
4939 return ax + effective_w - tw - label_padding - (float)lbbx;
4940 }
4941 /* LEFT or JUSTIFIED (justified single-line fallback) */
4942 return ax + label_padding;
4943}
4944
4945static void _draw_label(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, float ox, float oy, ALLEGRO_FONT* default_font, float win_w, N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
4946 N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* lb = (N_GUI_LABEL_DATA*)wgt->data;
4947 float ax = ox + wgt->x;
4948 float ay = oy + wgt->y;
4949 ALLEGRO_FONT* font = wgt->font ? wgt->font : default_font;
4950
4951 /* optional background bitmap */
4952 if (lb->bg_bitmap) {
4953 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(lb->bg_bitmap, 0, 0,
4954 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(lb->bg_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(lb->bg_bitmap),
4955 ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h, 0);
4956 }
4957
4958 if (!font || !lb->text[0]) return;
4959
4960 int lbbbx = 0, lbbby = 0, lbbbw = 0, lbbbh = 0;
4961 al_get_text_dimensions(font, lb->text, &lbbbx, &lbbby, &lbbbw, &lbbbh);
4962 float fh = (float)lbbbh;
4963
4964 /* effective widget width: expand into available window space when resizable */
4965 float effective_w = wgt->w;
4966 if (win_w > 0) {
4967 float max_from_win = win_w - wgt->x;
4968 if (max_from_win > effective_w) effective_w = max_from_win;
4969 }
4970
4971 int is_link = (lb->link[0] != '\0') ? 1 : 0;
4972 ALLEGRO_COLOR tc;
4973 if (is_link) {
4974 /* links: show in a distinctive colour, underlined on hover */
4975 if (wgt->state & N_GUI_STATE_HOVER) {
4976 tc = style->link_color_hover;
4977 } else {
4978 tc = style->link_color_normal;
4979 }
4980 } else {
4981 tc = _text_for_state(&wgt->theme, wgt->state);
4982 }
4983
4984 float tw = (float)lbbbw;
4985 float max_text_w = effective_w - style->label_padding * 2; /* padding each side */
4986 float tx;
4987
4988 if (lb->align == N_GUI_ALIGN_JUSTIFIED) {
4989 float lpad = style->label_padding;
4990 float view_h = wgt->h - lpad;
4991 float content_h = _label_content_height(lb->text, font, max_text_w);
4992 int need_scrollbar = (content_h > view_h) ? 1 : 0;
4993 float sb_size = need_scrollbar ? style->scrollbar_size : 0;
4994 float text_w = max_text_w - sb_size;
4995
4996 /* clamp scroll_y */
4997 if (need_scrollbar) {
4998 float max_sy = content_h - view_h;
4999 if (max_sy < 0) max_sy = 0;
5000 if (lb->scroll_y > max_sy) lb->scroll_y = max_sy;
5001 if (lb->scroll_y < 0) lb->scroll_y = 0;
5002 } else {
5003 lb->scroll_y = 0;
5004 }
5005
5006 /* clip to widget bounds (minus scrollbar) */
5007 int pcx, pcy, pcw, pch;
5008 al_get_clipping_rectangle(&pcx, &pcy, &pcw, &pch);
5009 _set_clipping_rect_transformed((int)ax, (int)ay, (int)(wgt->w - sb_size), (int)wgt->h);
5010
5011 float text_y = ay + lpad / 2.0f - lb->scroll_y;
5012 /* draw selection highlight for justified text */
5013 if (lb->sel_start >= 0 && lb->sel_end >= 0 && lb->sel_start != lb->sel_end) {
5014 _draw_justified_selection(font, ax + lpad, text_y, text_w, content_h + fh,
5015 lb->text, lb->sel_start, lb->sel_end, wgt->theme.selection_color);
5016 }
5017 /* pass a large avail_h so _draw_text_justified doesn't truncate; clipping handles visibility */
5018 _draw_text_justified(font, tc, ax + lpad, text_y, text_w, content_h + fh, lb->text);
5019
5020 /* underline for links on hover */
5021 if (is_link && (wgt->state & N_GUI_STATE_HOVER)) {
5022 float draw_w = tw < text_w ? tw : text_w;
5023 al_draw_line(ax + lpad, text_y + fh, ax + lpad + draw_w, text_y + fh, tc, _min_thickness(style->link_underline_thickness));
5024 }
5025
5026 al_set_clipping_rectangle(pcx, pcy, pcw, pch);
5027
5028 /* draw scrollbar */
5029 if (need_scrollbar) {
5030 _draw_widget_vscrollbar(ax, ay + lpad / 2.0f, wgt->w, view_h, content_h, lb->scroll_y, style);
5031 }
5032 return;
5033 }
5034
5035 float ty = ay + (wgt->h - fh) / 2.0f - (float)lbbby;
5036
5037 if (lb->align == N_GUI_ALIGN_CENTER) {
5038 if (tw > max_text_w) {
5039 _draw_text_truncated(font, tc, ax + style->label_padding, ty, max_text_w, lb->text);
5040 tx = ax + style->label_padding;
5041 } else {
5042 tx = ax + (effective_w - tw) / 2.0f - (float)lbbbx;
5043 al_draw_text(font, tc, tx, ty, 0, lb->text);
5044 }
5045 } else if (lb->align == N_GUI_ALIGN_RIGHT) {
5046 if (tw > max_text_w) {
5047 _draw_text_truncated(font, tc, ax + style->label_padding, ty, max_text_w, lb->text);
5048 tx = ax + style->label_padding;
5049 } else {
5050 tx = ax + effective_w - tw - style->label_padding - (float)lbbbx;
5051 al_draw_text(font, tc, tx, ty, 0, lb->text);
5052 }
5053 } else {
5054 /* N_GUI_ALIGN_LEFT */
5055 tx = ax + style->label_padding;
5056 if (tw > max_text_w) {
5057 _draw_text_truncated(font, tc, tx, ty, max_text_w, lb->text);
5058 } else {
5059 al_draw_text(font, tc, tx, ty, 0, lb->text);
5060 }
5061 }
5062
5063 /* draw selection highlight for non-justified labels */
5064 if (lb->sel_start >= 0 && lb->sel_end >= 0 && lb->sel_start != lb->sel_end) {
5065 int slo = lb->sel_start < lb->sel_end ? lb->sel_start : lb->sel_end;
5066 int shi = lb->sel_start < lb->sel_end ? lb->sel_end : lb->sel_start;
5067 size_t tlen = strlen(lb->text);
5068 if ((size_t)slo > tlen) slo = (int)tlen;
5069 if ((size_t)shi > tlen) shi = (int)tlen;
5070 char stmp[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
5071 memcpy(stmp, lb->text, (size_t)slo);
5072 stmp[slo] = '\0';
5073 float sx1 = _text_w(font, stmp);
5074 memcpy(stmp, lb->text, (size_t)shi);
5075 stmp[shi] = '\0';
5076 float sx2 = _text_w(font, stmp);
5077 al_draw_filled_rectangle(tx + sx1, ty, tx + sx2, ty + fh, wgt->theme.selection_color);
5078 }
5079
5080 /* underline for links on hover */
5081 if (is_link && (wgt->state & N_GUI_STATE_HOVER)) {
5082 float draw_w = tw < max_text_w ? tw : max_text_w;
5083 al_draw_line(tx, ty + fh, tx + draw_w, ty + fh, tc, _min_thickness(style->link_underline_thickness));
5084 }
5085}
5086
5090static void _draw_widget(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, float ox, float oy, ALLEGRO_FONT* default_font, float win_w, N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
5091 if (!wgt || !wgt->visible) return;
5092
5093 /* disabled widgets: force idle state visually, draw with reduced opacity */
5094 int saved_state = wgt->state;
5095 if (!wgt->enabled) {
5096 wgt->state = N_GUI_STATE_IDLE;
5097 }
5098
5099 switch (wgt->type) {
5100 case N_GUI_TYPE_BUTTON:
5101 _draw_button(wgt, ox, oy, default_font, style);
5102 break;
5103 case N_GUI_TYPE_SLIDER:
5104 _draw_slider(wgt, ox, oy, default_font, style);
5105 break;
5106 case N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA:
5107 _draw_textarea(wgt, ox, oy, default_font, style);
5108 break;
5109 case N_GUI_TYPE_CHECKBOX:
5110 _draw_checkbox(wgt, ox, oy, default_font, style);
5111 break;
5112 case N_GUI_TYPE_SCROLLBAR:
5113 _draw_scrollbar(wgt, ox, oy, style);
5114 break;
5115 case N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX:
5116 _draw_listbox(wgt, ox, oy, default_font, style);
5117 break;
5118 case N_GUI_TYPE_RADIOLIST:
5119 _draw_radiolist(wgt, ox, oy, default_font, style);
5120 break;
5121 case N_GUI_TYPE_COMBOBOX:
5122 _draw_combobox(wgt, ox, oy, default_font, style);
5123 break;
5124 case N_GUI_TYPE_IMAGE:
5125 _draw_image(wgt, ox, oy);
5126 break;
5127 case N_GUI_TYPE_LABEL:
5128 _draw_label(wgt, ox, oy, default_font, win_w, style);
5129 break;
5130 case N_GUI_TYPE_DROPMENU:
5131 _draw_dropmenu(wgt, ox, oy, default_font, style);
5132 break;
5133 default:
5134 break;
5135 }
5136
5137 /* restore state and draw dimming overlay for disabled widgets */
5138 if (!wgt->enabled) {
5139 wgt->state = saved_state;
5140 float dx = ox + wgt->x;
5141 float dy = oy + wgt->y;
5142 al_draw_filled_rectangle(dx, dy, dx + wgt->w, dy + wgt->h,
5143 al_map_rgba(0, 0, 0, 120));
5144 }
5145}
5146
5147/* TITLEBAR BUTTONS (minimize, maximize, close) */
5148
5150static float _tb_btn_resolved_size(const N_GUI_WINDOW* win, const N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
5151 if (style->tb_btn_size > 0) return style->tb_btn_size;
5152 return win->titlebar_h - 4.0f;
5153}
5154
5156static float _tb_buttons_area_width(const N_GUI_WINDOW* win, const N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
5157 if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_FRAMELESS) return 0.0f;
5158 int count = 0;
5159 if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_BTN_MINIMIZE) count++;
5160 if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_BTN_MAXIMIZE) count++;
5161 if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_BTN_CLOSE) count++;
5162 if (count == 0) return 0.0f;
5163 float sz = _tb_btn_resolved_size(win, style);
5164 return (float)count * sz + (float)(count - 1) * style->tb_btn_spacing + style->tb_btn_right_margin;
5165}
5166
5170static int _tb_button_rect(const N_GUI_WINDOW* win, const N_GUI_STYLE* style, int btn_type, float* out_x, float* out_y, float* out_w, float* out_h) {
5171 if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_FRAMELESS) return 0;
5172 int flag = 0;
5173 if (btn_type == N_GUI_TB_BTN_MINIMIZE)
5174 flag = N_GUI_WIN_BTN_MINIMIZE;
5175 else if (btn_type == N_GUI_TB_BTN_MAXIMIZE)
5176 flag = N_GUI_WIN_BTN_MAXIMIZE;
5177 else if (btn_type == N_GUI_TB_BTN_CLOSE)
5178 flag = N_GUI_WIN_BTN_CLOSE;
5179 if (!(win->flags & flag)) return 0;
5180
5181 float sz = _tb_btn_resolved_size(win, style);
5182 float right_edge = win->x + win->w - style->tb_btn_right_margin;
5183
5184 /* position index from the right: close=0, maximize=1, minimize=2 (but only for enabled buttons) */
5185 int pos = 0;
5186 if (btn_type == N_GUI_TB_BTN_CLOSE) {
5187 pos = 0;
5188 } else if (btn_type == N_GUI_TB_BTN_MAXIMIZE) {
5189 pos = (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_BTN_CLOSE) ? 1 : 0;
5190 } else { /* MINIMIZE */
5191 pos = 0;
5192 if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_BTN_CLOSE) pos++;
5193 if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_BTN_MAXIMIZE) pos++;
5194 }
5195
5196 *out_x = right_edge - sz - (float)pos * (sz + style->tb_btn_spacing);
5197 *out_y = win->y + (win->titlebar_h - sz) / 2.0f;
5198 *out_w = sz;
5199 *out_h = sz;
5200 return 1;
5201}
5202
5204static void _draw_tb_buttons(N_GUI_WINDOW* win, const N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
5205 const int btn_types[] = {N_GUI_TB_BTN_MINIMIZE, N_GUI_TB_BTN_MAXIMIZE, N_GUI_TB_BTN_CLOSE};
5206 for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
5207 int bt = btn_types[i];
5208 float bx, by, bw, bh;
5209 if (!_tb_button_rect(win, style, bt, &bx, &by, &bw, &bh)) continue;
5210
5211 /* determine visual state */
5212 int state = N_GUI_STATE_IDLE;
5213 if (win->tb_buttons.pressed == bt)
5214 state = N_GUI_STATE_ACTIVE;
5215 else if (win->tb_buttons.hovered == bt)
5216 state = N_GUI_STATE_HOVER;
5217
5218 /* select theme */
5219 N_GUI_THEME* theme = (bt == N_GUI_TB_BTN_CLOSE) ? &win->tb_buttons.close_theme : &win->tb_buttons.btn_theme;
5220
5221 /* select bitmap */
5222 ALLEGRO_BITMAP* bmp = NULL;
5223 if (bt == N_GUI_TB_BTN_MINIMIZE) {
5224 if (state == N_GUI_STATE_ACTIVE && win->tb_buttons.minimize_active_bitmap)
5225 bmp = win->tb_buttons.minimize_active_bitmap;
5226 else if (state == N_GUI_STATE_HOVER && win->tb_buttons.minimize_hover_bitmap)
5227 bmp = win->tb_buttons.minimize_hover_bitmap;
5228 else
5229 bmp = win->tb_buttons.minimize_bitmap;
5230 } else if (bt == N_GUI_TB_BTN_MAXIMIZE) {
5231 if (state == N_GUI_STATE_ACTIVE && win->tb_buttons.maximize_active_bitmap)
5232 bmp = win->tb_buttons.maximize_active_bitmap;
5233 else if (state == N_GUI_STATE_HOVER && win->tb_buttons.maximize_hover_bitmap)
5234 bmp = win->tb_buttons.maximize_hover_bitmap;
5235 else
5236 bmp = win->tb_buttons.maximize_bitmap;
5237 } else { /* CLOSE */
5238 if (state == N_GUI_STATE_ACTIVE && win->tb_buttons.close_active_bitmap)
5239 bmp = win->tb_buttons.close_active_bitmap;
5240 else if (state == N_GUI_STATE_HOVER && win->tb_buttons.close_hover_bitmap)
5241 bmp = win->tb_buttons.close_hover_bitmap;
5242 else
5243 bmp = win->tb_buttons.close_bitmap;
5244 }
5245
5246 if (bmp) {
5247 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(bmp, 0, 0,
5248 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(bmp), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(bmp),
5249 bx, by, bw, bh, 0);
5250 } else {
5251 /* draw themed background */
5252 _draw_themed_rect(theme, state, bx, by, bw, bh, 1);
5253
5254 /* draw glyph */
5255 ALLEGRO_COLOR gc = _text_for_state(theme, state);
5256 float cx = bx + bw / 2.0f;
5257 float cy = by + bh / 2.0f;
5258 float g = bw * 0.22f; /* glyph half-extent */
5259 float thick = style->tb_btn_glyph_thickness;
5260
5261 if (bt == N_GUI_TB_BTN_MINIMIZE) {
5262 /* horizontal line in lower third */
5263 al_draw_line(cx - g, cy + g * 0.5f, cx + g, cy + g * 0.5f, gc, thick);
5264 } else if (bt == N_GUI_TB_BTN_MAXIMIZE) {
5265 if (win->state & N_GUI_WIN_MAXIMISED) {
5266 /* restore icon: two overlapping rectangles */
5267 float off = g * 0.4f;
5268 al_draw_rectangle(cx - g + off, cy - g, cx + g, cy + g - off, gc, thick);
5269 al_draw_rectangle(cx - g, cy - g + off, cx + g - off, cy + g, gc, thick);
5270 } else {
5271 /* single rectangle outline */
5272 al_draw_rectangle(cx - g, cy - g, cx + g, cy + g, gc, thick);
5273 }
5274 } else { /* CLOSE: X shape */
5275 al_draw_line(cx - g, cy - g, cx + g, cy + g, gc, thick);
5276 al_draw_line(cx + g, cy - g, cx - g, cy + g, gc, thick);
5277 }
5278 }
5279 }
5280}
5281
5283static void _draw_window(N_GUI_WINDOW* win, ALLEGRO_FONT* default_font, N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
5284 if (!(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN)) return;
5285
5286 ALLEGRO_FONT* font = win->font ? win->font : default_font;
5287 int frameless = (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_FRAMELESS) ? 1 : 0;
5288 float tbh = frameless ? 0.0f : win->titlebar_h;
5289
5290 /* title bar (skip for frameless windows) */
5291 if (!frameless) {
