5292 if (win->titlebar_bitmap) {
5293 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(win->titlebar_bitmap, 0, 0,
5294 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(win->titlebar_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(win->titlebar_bitmap),
5295 win->x, win->y, win->w, tbh, 0);
5296 } else {
5297 ALLEGRO_COLOR tb_bg = win->theme.bg_active;
5298 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(win->x, win->y, win->x + win->w, win->y + tbh,
5299 win->theme.corner_rx, win->theme.corner_ry, tb_bg);
5300 }
5301 if (font && win->title[0]) {
5302 int tbbx = 0, tbby = 0, tbbw = 0, tbbh = 0;
5303 al_get_text_dimensions(font, win->title, &tbbx, &tbby, &tbbw, &tbbh);
5304 float fh = (float)tbbh;
5305 float btn_area = _tb_buttons_area_width(win, style);
5306 float max_title_w = win->w - style->title_max_w_reserve - btn_area;
5307 _draw_text_truncated(font, win->theme.text_active,
5308 win->x + style->title_padding, win->y + (tbh - fh) / 2.0f - (float)tbby, max_title_w, win->title);
5309 }
5310 _draw_tb_buttons(win, style);
5311 }
5312
5313 ALLEGRO_COLOR tb_bd = win->theme.border_normal;
5314
5315 /* body (if not minimised) */
5316 if (!(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_MINIMISED)) {
5317 float body_y = win->y + tbh;
5318 float body_h = win->h - tbh;
5319
5320 /* determine if scrollbars are needed */
5321 int need_vscroll = 0;
5322 int need_hscroll = 0;
5323 float scrollbar_size = style->scrollbar_size;
5324
5325 if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_AUTO_SCROLLBAR) {
5326 _window_update_content_size(win, default_font);
5327 if (win->content_h > body_h) need_vscroll = 1;
5328 if (win->content_w > win->w) need_hscroll = 1;
5329 /* adjust for scrollbar space */
5330 if (need_vscroll && win->content_w > (win->w - scrollbar_size)) need_hscroll = 1;
5331 if (need_hscroll && win->content_h > (body_h - scrollbar_size)) need_vscroll = 1;
5332 }
5333
5334 float content_area_w = win->w - (need_vscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
5335 float content_area_h = body_h - (need_hscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
5336
5337 /* clamp scroll */
5338 if (need_vscroll) {
5339 float max_sy = win->content_h - content_area_h;
5340 if (max_sy < 0) max_sy = 0;
5341 if (win->scroll_y > max_sy) win->scroll_y = max_sy;
5342 if (win->scroll_y < 0) win->scroll_y = 0;
5343 } else {
5344 win->scroll_y = 0;
5345 }
5346 if (need_hscroll) {
5347 float max_sx = win->content_w - content_area_w;
5348 if (max_sx < 0) max_sx = 0;
5349 if (win->scroll_x > max_sx) win->scroll_x = max_sx;
5350 if (win->scroll_x < 0) win->scroll_x = 0;
5351 } else {
5352 win->scroll_x = 0;
5353 }
5354
5355 /* body background */
5356 if (win->bg_bitmap) {
5357 _draw_bitmap_scaled(win->bg_bitmap, win->x, body_y, win->w, body_h, win->bg_scale_mode);
5358 } else {
5359 al_draw_filled_rectangle(win->x, body_y, win->x + win->w, win->y + win->h,
5360 win->theme.bg_normal);
5361 }
5362 al_draw_rounded_rectangle(win->x, win->y, win->x + win->w, win->y + win->h,
5363 win->theme.corner_rx, win->theme.corner_ry, tb_bd,
5364 _min_thickness(win->theme.border_thickness));
5365
5366 /* draw widgets with clipping to content area */
5367 float ox = win->x - win->scroll_x;
5368 float oy = body_y - win->scroll_y;
5369
5370 /* set clipping rectangle to window content area */
5371 int prev_cx, prev_cy, prev_cw, prev_ch;
5372 al_get_clipping_rectangle(&prev_cx, &prev_cy, &prev_cw, &prev_ch);
5373 /* Frameless windows have no chrome, their content is edge-to-edge
5374 * by design (drag-handle holders for HUD icons), so skip the
5375 * thumb-padding inset that would clip the leftmost pixels. */
5376 int clip_pad = frameless ? 0 : (int)style->scrollbar_thumb_padding;
5377 _set_clipping_rect_transformed((int)win->x + clip_pad, (int)body_y,
5378 (int)content_area_w - clip_pad, (int)content_area_h);
5379
5380 /* pass width hint so labels can adapt:
5381 * - auto-scrollbar windows: use content width so labels are never truncated
5382 * (the clipping rect + scrollbars handle overflow)
5383 * - resizable windows (without auto-scrollbar): use window width so labels expand
5384 * - fixed windows: 0 (use widget's own width) */
5385 float label_win_w = 0;
5386 if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_AUTO_SCROLLBAR)
5387 label_win_w = win->content_w + style->title_max_w_reserve + style->label_padding;
5388 else if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZABLE)
5389 label_win_w = win->w;
5390 list_foreach(node, win->widgets) {
5391 _draw_widget((N_GUI_WIDGET*)node->ptr, ox, oy, default_font, label_win_w, style);
5392 }
5393
5394 /* restore clipping */
5395 al_set_clipping_rectangle(prev_cx, prev_cy, prev_cw, prev_ch);
5396
5397 /* draw automatic scrollbars */
5398 if (need_vscroll) {
5399 float sb_x = win->x + win->w - scrollbar_size;
5400 float sb_y = body_y;
5401 float sb_h = content_area_h;
5402 /* leave room for resize corner when no horizontal scrollbar */
5403 if ((win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZABLE) && !need_hscroll) sb_h -= scrollbar_size;
5404
5405 /* track */
5406 al_draw_filled_rectangle(sb_x, sb_y, sb_x + scrollbar_size, sb_y + sb_h,
5407 style->scrollbar_track_color);
5408
5409 /* thumb */
5410 float ratio = content_area_h / win->content_h;
5411 if (ratio > 1.0f) ratio = 1.0f;
5412 float thumb_h = ratio * sb_h;
5413 if (thumb_h < style->scrollbar_thumb_min) thumb_h = style->scrollbar_thumb_min;
5414 float max_scroll = win->content_h - content_area_h;
5415 float pos_ratio = (max_scroll > 0) ? win->scroll_y / max_scroll : 0;
5416 float thumb_y = sb_y + pos_ratio * (sb_h - thumb_h);
5417 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(sb_x + style->scrollbar_thumb_padding, thumb_y, sb_x + scrollbar_size - style->scrollbar_thumb_padding,
5418 thumb_y + thumb_h, style->scrollbar_thumb_corner_r, style->scrollbar_thumb_corner_r,
5419 style->scrollbar_thumb_color);
5420 }
5421 if (need_hscroll) {
5422 float sb_x = win->x;
5423 float sb_y = win->y + win->h - scrollbar_size;
5424 float sb_w = content_area_w;
5425 /* leave room for resize corner when no vertical scrollbar */
5426 if ((win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZABLE) && !need_vscroll) sb_w -= scrollbar_size;
5427
5428 /* track */
5429 al_draw_filled_rectangle(sb_x, sb_y, sb_x + sb_w, sb_y + scrollbar_size,
5430 style->scrollbar_track_color);
5431
5432 /* thumb */
5433 float ratio = content_area_w / win->content_w;
5434 if (ratio > 1.0f) ratio = 1.0f;
5435 float thumb_w = ratio * sb_w;
5436 if (thumb_w < style->scrollbar_thumb_min) thumb_w = style->scrollbar_thumb_min;
5437 float max_scroll = win->content_w - content_area_w;
5438 float pos_ratio = (max_scroll > 0) ? win->scroll_x / max_scroll : 0;
5439 float thumb_x = sb_x + pos_ratio * (sb_w - thumb_w);
5440 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(thumb_x, sb_y + style->scrollbar_thumb_padding, thumb_x + thumb_w,
5441 sb_y + scrollbar_size - style->scrollbar_thumb_padding, style->scrollbar_thumb_corner_r, style->scrollbar_thumb_corner_r,
5442 style->scrollbar_thumb_color);
5443 }
5444
5445 /* draw resize handle if window is resizable */
5446 if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZABLE) {
5447 float rx = win->x + win->w;
5448 float ry = win->y + win->h;
5449 float grip_size = style->grip_size;
5450 ALLEGRO_COLOR grip_color = style->grip_color;
5451 /* three diagonal lines in bottom-right corner */
5452 float grip_thick = _min_thickness(style->grip_line_thickness);
5453 al_draw_line(rx - grip_size, ry - 2, rx - 2, ry - grip_size, grip_color, grip_thick);
5454 al_draw_line(rx - grip_size + 4, ry - 2, rx - 2, ry - grip_size + 4, grip_color, grip_thick);
5455 al_draw_line(rx - grip_size + 8, ry - 2, rx - 2, ry - grip_size + 8, grip_color, grip_thick);
5456 }
5457 } else {
5458 al_draw_rounded_rectangle(win->x, win->y, win->x + win->w, win->y + tbh,
5459 win->theme.corner_rx, win->theme.corner_ry, tb_bd,
5460 _min_thickness(win->theme.border_thickness));
5461 }
5462}
5463
5465static void _compute_gui_bounds(N_GUI_CTX* ctx) {
5466 float max_r = 0, max_b = 0;
5467 list_foreach(wnode, ctx->windows) {
5468 const N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
5469 if (!(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN)) continue;
5470 float r = win->x + win->w;
5471 float b = win->y + win->h;
5472 if (r > max_r) max_r = r;
5473 if (b > max_b) max_b = b;
5474 }
5475 ctx->gui_bounds_w = max_r;
5476 ctx->gui_bounds_h = max_b;
5477}
5478
5488void n_gui_draw(N_GUI_CTX* ctx) {
5489 __n_assert(ctx, return);
5490
5491 /* compute bounds and determine if global scrollbars are needed.
5492 * When virtual canvas is active, compare bounds against virtual dimensions
5493 * (since window positions are in virtual coordinates). */
5494 _compute_gui_bounds(ctx);
5495 float scrollbar_size = ctx->style.global_scrollbar_size;
5496 int need_global_vscroll = 0;
5497 int need_global_hscroll = 0;
5498
5499 /* gate on both dimensions: virtual canvas is only active when both are set */
5500 int virtual_active = (ctx->virtual_w > 0 && ctx->virtual_h > 0);
5501 float eff_w = virtual_active ? ctx->virtual_w : ctx->display_w;
5502 float eff_h = virtual_active ? ctx->virtual_h : ctx->display_h;
5503
5504 if (eff_w > 0 && eff_h > 0) {
5505 if (ctx->gui_bounds_h > eff_h) need_global_vscroll = 1;
5506 if (ctx->gui_bounds_w > eff_w) need_global_hscroll = 1;
5507 /* account for scrollbar space */
5508 if (need_global_vscroll && ctx->gui_bounds_w > (eff_w - scrollbar_size)) need_global_hscroll = 1;
5509 if (need_global_hscroll && ctx->gui_bounds_h > (eff_h - scrollbar_size)) need_global_vscroll = 1;
5510
5511 /* clamp global scroll */
5512 float view_w = eff_w - (need_global_vscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
5513 float view_h = eff_h - (need_global_hscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
5514 if (need_global_vscroll) {
5515 float max_sy = ctx->gui_bounds_h - view_h;
5516 if (max_sy < 0) max_sy = 0;
5517 if (ctx->global_scroll_y > max_sy) ctx->global_scroll_y = max_sy;
5518 if (ctx->global_scroll_y < 0) ctx->global_scroll_y = 0;
5519 } else {
5520 ctx->global_scroll_y = 0;
5521 }
5522 if (need_global_hscroll) {
5523 float max_sx = ctx->gui_bounds_w - view_w;
5524 if (max_sx < 0) max_sx = 0;
5525 if (ctx->global_scroll_x > max_sx) ctx->global_scroll_x = max_sx;
5526 if (ctx->global_scroll_x < 0) ctx->global_scroll_x = 0;
5527 } else {
5528 ctx->global_scroll_x = 0;
5529 }
5530 }
5531
5532 /* apply global scroll in virtual units, then scale + offset to physical display */
5533 ALLEGRO_TRANSFORM global_tf, prev_tf;
5534 al_copy_transform(&prev_tf, al_get_current_transform());
5535 al_identity_transform(&global_tf);
5536 al_translate_transform(&global_tf, -ctx->global_scroll_x, -ctx->global_scroll_y);
5537 if (ctx->virtual_w > 0 && ctx->virtual_h > 0 && ctx->gui_scale > 0) {
5538 al_scale_transform(&global_tf, ctx->gui_scale, ctx->gui_scale);
5539 al_translate_transform(&global_tf, ctx->gui_offset_x, ctx->gui_offset_y);
5540 }
5541 al_compose_transform(&global_tf, &prev_tf);
5542 al_use_transform(&global_tf);
5543
5544 /* clip to the content area (excluding global scrollbar space) */
5545 int prev_cx, prev_cy, prev_cw, prev_ch;
5546 int set_clip = 0;
5547 if (need_global_vscroll || need_global_hscroll) {
5548 al_get_clipping_rectangle(&prev_cx, &prev_cy, &prev_cw, &prev_ch);
5549 /* clipping is in physical pixels; map virtual scrollbar area to screen */
5550 float clip_vw = eff_w - (need_global_vscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
5551 float clip_vh = eff_h - (need_global_hscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
5552 if (ctx->virtual_w > 0 && ctx->virtual_h > 0 && ctx->gui_scale > 0) {
5553 al_set_clipping_rectangle((int)ctx->gui_offset_x, (int)ctx->gui_offset_y,
5554 (int)(clip_vw * ctx->gui_scale),
5555 (int)(clip_vh * ctx->gui_scale));
5556 } else {
5557 al_set_clipping_rectangle(0, 0, (int)clip_vw, (int)clip_vh);
5558 }
5559 set_clip = 1;
5560 }
5561
5562 /* auto-apply autofit for windows that have it configured */
5563 list_foreach(anode, ctx->windows) {
5564 const N_GUI_WINDOW* awin = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)anode->ptr;
5565 if (awin && awin->autofit_flags) {
5566 n_gui_window_apply_autofit(ctx, awin->id);
5567 }
5568 }
5569
5570 list_foreach(node, ctx->windows) {
5571 N_GUI_WINDOW* dwin = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)node->ptr;
5572 _draw_window(dwin, ctx->default_font, &ctx->style);
5573 /* Per-window custom rendering, drawn at this window's z-order so it
5574 * is occluded by any window drawn later in the loop. */
5575 if (dwin && dwin->on_content_draw && (dwin->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN)
5576 && !(dwin->state & N_GUI_WIN_MINIMISED)) {
5577 dwin->on_content_draw(dwin->id, dwin->on_content_draw_data);
5578 }
5579 }
5580 /* draw combobox dropdown overlay on top of everything */
5581 _draw_combobox_dropdown(ctx);
5582 /* draw dropdown menu panel overlay on top of everything */
5583 _draw_dropmenu_panel(ctx);
5584
5585 /* restore transform and clipping */
5586 if (set_clip) {
5587 al_set_clipping_rectangle(prev_cx, prev_cy, prev_cw, prev_ch);
5588 }
5589
5590 /* draw global scrollbars: apply virtual canvas transform (without scroll)
5591 * so scrollbars appear at the edges of the virtual canvas area */
5592 if (need_global_vscroll || need_global_hscroll) {
5593 ALLEGRO_TRANSFORM sb_tf;
5594 al_identity_transform(&sb_tf);
5595 if (ctx->virtual_w > 0 && ctx->virtual_h > 0 && ctx->gui_scale > 0) {
5596 al_scale_transform(&sb_tf, ctx->gui_scale, ctx->gui_scale);
5597 al_translate_transform(&sb_tf, ctx->gui_offset_x, ctx->gui_offset_y);
5598 }
5599 al_compose_transform(&sb_tf, &prev_tf);
5600 al_use_transform(&sb_tf);
5601 }
5602
5603 if (need_global_vscroll) {
5604 float sb_x = eff_w - scrollbar_size;
5605 float sb_y = 0;
5606 float sb_h = eff_h - (need_global_hscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
5607 float view_h = sb_h;
5608
5609 /* track */
5610 al_draw_filled_rectangle(sb_x, sb_y, sb_x + scrollbar_size, sb_y + sb_h,
5611 ctx->style.global_scrollbar_track_color);
5612
5613 /* thumb */
5614 float ratio = view_h / ctx->gui_bounds_h;
5615 if (ratio > 1.0f) ratio = 1.0f;
5616 float thumb_h = ratio * sb_h;
5617 if (thumb_h < ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_min) thumb_h = ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_min;
5618 float max_scroll = ctx->gui_bounds_h - view_h;
5619 float pos_ratio = (max_scroll > 0) ? ctx->global_scroll_y / max_scroll : 0;
5620 float thumb_y = sb_y + pos_ratio * (sb_h - thumb_h);
5621 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(sb_x + ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_padding, thumb_y, sb_x + scrollbar_size - ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_padding,
5622 thumb_y + thumb_h, ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_corner_r, ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_corner_r,
5623 ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_color);
5624 al_draw_rounded_rectangle(sb_x + ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_padding, thumb_y, sb_x + scrollbar_size - ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_padding,
5625 thumb_y + thumb_h, ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_corner_r, ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_corner_r,
5626 ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_border_color, ctx->style.global_scrollbar_border_thickness);
5627 }
5628 if (need_global_hscroll) {
5629 float sb_x = 0;
5630 float sb_y = eff_h - scrollbar_size;
5631 float sb_w = eff_w - (need_global_vscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
5632 float view_w = sb_w;
5633
5634 /* track */
5635 al_draw_filled_rectangle(sb_x, sb_y, sb_x + sb_w, sb_y + scrollbar_size,
5636 ctx->style.global_scrollbar_track_color);
5637
5638 /* thumb */
5639 float ratio = view_w / ctx->gui_bounds_w;
5640 if (ratio > 1.0f) ratio = 1.0f;
5641 float thumb_w = ratio * sb_w;
5642 if (thumb_w < ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_min) thumb_w = ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_min;
5643 float max_scroll = ctx->gui_bounds_w - view_w;
5644 float pos_ratio = (max_scroll > 0) ? ctx->global_scroll_x / max_scroll : 0;
5645 float thumb_x = sb_x + pos_ratio * (sb_w - thumb_w);
5646 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(thumb_x, sb_y + ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_padding, thumb_x + thumb_w,
5647 sb_y + scrollbar_size - ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_padding, ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_corner_r, ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_corner_r,
5648 ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_color);
5649 al_draw_rounded_rectangle(thumb_x, sb_y + ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_padding, thumb_x + thumb_w,
5650 sb_y + scrollbar_size - ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_padding, ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_corner_r, ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_corner_r,
5651 ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_border_color, ctx->style.global_scrollbar_border_thickness);
5652 }
5653
5654 /* tooltip bubble: after the pointer rested on a tooltip widget */
5655 if (ctx->style.tooltip_delay > 0.0f && ctx->tooltip_widget_id >= 0 && (al_get_time() - ctx->tooltip_armed_at) >= (double)ctx->style.tooltip_delay) {
5656 N_GUI_WIDGET* tip_wgt = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->tooltip_widget_id);
5657 if (tip_wgt && tip_wgt->visible && tip_wgt->tooltip[0] && ctx->default_font) {
5658 float tw = _text_w(ctx->default_font, tip_wgt->tooltip);
5659 float th = (float)al_get_font_line_height(ctx->default_font);
5660 float bw = tw + 16.0f;
5661 float bh = th + 10.0f;
5662 float bx = (float)ctx->mouse_x + 14.0f;
5663 float by = (float)ctx->mouse_y + 20.0f;
5664 if (ctx->display_w > 0 && bx + bw > ctx->display_w) bx = ctx->display_w - bw - 2.0f;
5665 if (ctx->display_h > 0 && by + bh > ctx->display_h) by = (float)ctx->mouse_y - bh - 6.0f;
5666 if (bx < 0) bx = 0;
5667 if (by < 0) by = 0;
5668 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(bx, by, bx + bw, by + bh, 4.0f, 4.0f, ctx->style.tooltip_bg);
5669 al_draw_rounded_rectangle(bx, by, bx + bw, by + bh, 4.0f, 4.0f, ctx->style.tooltip_border, 1.0f);
5670 al_draw_text(ctx->default_font, ctx->style.tooltip_fg, bx + 8.0f, by + 5.0f, 0, tip_wgt->tooltip);
5671 }
5672 }
5673
5674 al_use_transform(&prev_tf);
5675}
5676
5677/* VIRTUAL CANVAS / DISPLAY / DPI */
5678
5687void n_gui_set_virtual_size(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, float w, float h) {
5688 __n_assert(ctx, return);
5689 if ((w > 0) != (h > 0)) {
5690 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_gui_set_virtual_size: both dimensions must be > 0 (got w=%.1f, h=%.1f); virtual canvas not changed", w, h);
5691 return;
5692 }
5693 ctx->virtual_w = w;
5694 ctx->virtual_h = h;
5695 n_gui_update_transform(ctx);
5696}
5697
5705void n_gui_update_transform(N_GUI_CTX* ctx) {
5706 __n_assert(ctx, return);
5707
5708 if (ctx->virtual_w <= 0 || ctx->virtual_h <= 0 ||
5709 ctx->display_w <= 0 || ctx->display_h <= 0) {
5710 ctx->gui_scale = 1.0f;
5711 ctx->gui_offset_x = 0.0f;
5712 ctx->gui_offset_y = 0.0f;
5713 return;
5714 }
5715
5716 float sx = ctx->display_w / ctx->virtual_w;
5717 float sy = ctx->display_h / ctx->virtual_h;
5718 ctx->gui_scale = (sx < sy) ? sx : sy;
5719 if (ctx->gui_scale < 0.01f) ctx->gui_scale = 0.01f;
5720
5721 float scaled_w = ctx->virtual_w * ctx->gui_scale;
5722 float scaled_h = ctx->virtual_h * ctx->gui_scale;
5723 ctx->gui_offset_x = (ctx->display_w - scaled_w) * 0.5f;
5724 ctx->gui_offset_y = (ctx->display_h - scaled_h) * 0.5f;
5725}
5726
5732void n_gui_screen_to_virtual(const N_GUI_CTX* ctx, float sx, float sy, float* vx, float* vy) {
5733 __n_assert(ctx, return);
5734
5735 if (ctx->virtual_w <= 0 || ctx->virtual_h <= 0 || ctx->gui_scale <= 0) {
5736 if (vx) *vx = sx;
5737 if (vy) *vy = sy;
5738 return;
5739 }
5740
5741 float scale = ctx->gui_scale;
5742 if (vx) *vx = (sx - ctx->gui_offset_x) / scale;
5743 if (vy) *vy = (sy - ctx->gui_offset_y) / scale;
5744}
5745
5746/* ADAPTIVE RESIZE PUBLIC API */
5747
5753void n_gui_set_resize_mode(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int mode) {
5754 __n_assert(ctx, return);
5755 ctx->resize_mode = mode;
5756
5757 if (mode == N_GUI_RESIZE_ADAPTIVE) {
5758 /* disable virtual canvas scaling, virtual tracks display */
5759 ctx->virtual_w = 0;
5760 ctx->virtual_h = 0;
5761 ctx->gui_scale = 1.0f;
5762 ctx->gui_offset_x = 0.0f;
5763 ctx->gui_offset_y = 0.0f;
5764
5765 /* set reference display size */
5766 ctx->ref_display_w = ctx->display_w;
5767 ctx->ref_display_h = ctx->display_h;
5768
5769 /* capture normalized coords for all windows */
5770 list_foreach(wnode, ctx->windows) {
5771 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
5772 _n_gui_window_capture_normalized(ctx, win);
5773 }
5774 }
5775}
5776
5781// cppcheck-suppress constParameterPointer ; public API uses non-const for consistency
5782int n_gui_get_resize_mode(N_GUI_CTX* ctx) {
5783 __n_assert(ctx, return 0);
5784 return ctx->resize_mode;
5785}
5786
5792void n_gui_window_set_resize_policy(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, int policy) {
5793 __n_assert(ctx, return);
5794 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
5795 if (!win) return;
5796 win->resize_policy = policy;
5797 _n_gui_window_capture_normalized(ctx, win);
5798}
5799
5804// cppcheck-suppress constParameterPointer ; public API uses non-const for consistency
5805int n_gui_window_get_resize_policy(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
5806 __n_assert(ctx, return 0);
5807 // cppcheck-suppress constVariablePointer ; returned from non-const API
5808 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
5809 if (!win) return 0;
5810 return win->resize_policy;
5811}
5812
5818void n_gui_window_update_normalized(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
5819 __n_assert(ctx, return);
5820 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
5821 if (!win) return;
5822
5823 /* update reference to current display size before recapture */
5824 ctx->ref_display_w = ctx->display_w;
5825 ctx->ref_display_h = ctx->display_h;
5826 _n_gui_window_capture_normalized(ctx, win);
5827}
5828
5834void n_gui_apply_adaptive_resize(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, float new_w, float new_h) {
5835 __n_assert(ctx, return);
5836 if (new_w <= 0 || new_h <= 0) return;
5837
5838 list_foreach(wnode, ctx->windows) {
5839 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
5840
5841 switch (win->resize_policy) {
5842 case N_GUI_WIN_RESIZE_MOVE:
5843 win->x = win->norm_x * new_w;
5844 win->y = win->norm_y * new_h;
5845 /* size unchanged */
5846 break;
5847
5848 case N_GUI_WIN_RESIZE_SCALE: {
5849 win->x = win->norm_x * new_w;
5850 win->y = win->norm_y * new_h;
5851 win->w = win->norm_w * new_w;
5852 win->h = win->norm_h * new_h;
5853
5854 /* enforce minimums only on user-resizable (non-frameless) windows */
5855 if (!(win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_FRAMELESS)) {
5856 if (win->w < win->min_w) win->w = win->min_w;
5857 if (win->h < win->min_h) win->h = win->min_h;
5858 }
5859
5860 /* scale child widgets proportionally to new window size */
5861 list_foreach(wgn, win->widgets) {
5862 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = (N_GUI_WIDGET*)wgn->ptr;
5863 wgt->x = wgt->norm_x * win->w;
5864 wgt->y = wgt->norm_y * win->h;
5865 wgt->w = wgt->norm_w * win->w;
5866 wgt->h = wgt->norm_h * win->h;
5867 }
5868 break;
5869 }
5870
5871 case N_GUI_WIN_RESIZE_NONE:
5872 default:
5873 /* do nothing */
5874 break;
5875 }
5876 }
5877
5878 /* keep ref_display_w/h at the ORIGINAL creation size so norms remain
5879 stable across multiple resizes (always relative to initial layout) */
5880}
5881
5887void n_gui_set_display_size(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, float w, float h) {
5888 __n_assert(ctx, return);
5889 ctx->display_w = w;
5890 ctx->display_h = h;
5891 if (ctx->resize_mode == N_GUI_RESIZE_ADAPTIVE) {
5892 n_gui_apply_adaptive_resize(ctx, w, h);
5893 } else {
5894 if (ctx->virtual_w > 0 && ctx->virtual_h > 0) {
5895 n_gui_update_transform(ctx);
5896 }
5897 }
5898}
5899
5903void n_gui_set_display(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, ALLEGRO_DISPLAY* display) {
5904 __n_assert(ctx, return);
5905 ctx->display = display;
5906}
5907
5911void n_gui_set_dpi_scale(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, float scale) {
5912 __n_assert(ctx, return);
5913 if (scale < 0.25f) scale = 0.25f;
5914 if (scale > 8.0f) scale = 8.0f;
5915 ctx->dpi_scale = scale;
5916}
5917
5921float n_gui_get_dpi_scale(const N_GUI_CTX* ctx) {
5922 __n_assert(ctx, return 1.0f);
5923 return ctx->dpi_scale;
5924}
5925
5945float n_gui_detect_dpi_scale(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, ALLEGRO_DISPLAY* display) {
5946 __n_assert(ctx, return 1.0f);
5947 __n_assert(display, return 1.0f);
5948
5949 float scale = 1.0f;
5950
5951 /* Method: compare physical pixel size to logical window size.
5952 * On HiDPI displays, al_get_display_width returns the logical size while
5953 * the backbuffer bitmap has the physical pixel size. */
5954 int logical_w = al_get_display_width(display);
5955 int logical_h = al_get_display_height(display);
5956 ALLEGRO_BITMAP* backbuffer = al_get_backbuffer(display);
5957 if (backbuffer && logical_w > 0 && logical_h > 0) {
5958 int physical_w = al_get_bitmap_width(backbuffer);
5959 int physical_h = al_get_bitmap_height(backbuffer);
5960 float scale_x = (float)physical_w / (float)logical_w;
5961 float scale_y = (float)physical_h / (float)logical_h;
5962 scale = (scale_x > scale_y) ? scale_x : scale_y;
5963 if (scale < 0.5f) scale = 1.0f; /* sanity */
5964 }
5965
5966#ifdef ALLEGRO_ANDROID
5967 /* On Android, use the display DPI option if available.
5968 * Android standard baseline is 160 DPI; scale = actual_dpi / 160. */
5969 int dpi = al_get_display_option(display, ALLEGRO_DEFAULT_DISPLAY_ADAPTER);
5970 if (dpi <= 0) {
5971 /* fallback: try the pixel ratio we already computed */
5972 } else {
5973 float android_scale = (float)dpi / 160.0f;
5974 if (android_scale >= 0.5f) scale = android_scale;
5975 }
5976#endif
5977
5978 if (scale < 0.25f) scale = 0.25f;
5979 if (scale > 8.0f) scale = 8.0f;
5980 ctx->dpi_scale = scale;
5981 return scale;
5982}
5983
5984/* EVENT PROCESSING */
5985
5987static void _slider_update_from_mouse(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, float mx, float my, float win_x, float win_content_y) {
5988 N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA* sd = (N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA*)wgt->data;
5989 if (wgt->w <= 0) return;
5990 if (wgt->h <= 0) return;
5991 double ratio;
5992
5993 if (sd->orientation == N_GUI_SLIDER_V) {
5994 float ay = win_content_y + wgt->y;
5995 float local_y = my - ay;
5996 /* vertical slider: bottom = max, top = min, so invert */
5997 ratio = 1.0 - (double)local_y / (double)wgt->h;
5998 } else {
5999 float ax = win_x + wgt->x;
6000 float local_x = mx - ax;
6001 ratio = (double)local_x / (double)wgt->w;
6002 }
6003 if (ratio < 0.0) ratio = 0.0;
6004 if (ratio > 1.0) ratio = 1.0;
6005 double new_val = sd->min_val + ratio * (sd->max_val - sd->min_val);
6006 if (sd->step > 0.0)
6007 new_val = _slider_snap_value(new_val, sd->min_val, sd->max_val, sd->step);
6008 else
6009 new_val = _clamp(new_val, sd->min_val, sd->max_val);
6010 if (new_val != sd->value) {
6011 sd->value = new_val;
6012 if (sd->on_change) {
6013 sd->on_change(wgt->id, sd->value, sd->user_data);
6014 }
6015 }
6016}
6017
6019static void _scrollbar_update_from_mouse(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, float mx, float my, float win_x, float win_content_y, const N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
6020 N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_DATA* sb = (N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_DATA*)wgt->data;
6021 float ax = win_x + wgt->x;
6022 float ay = win_content_y + wgt->y;
6023
6024 double ratio_viewport = sb->viewport_size / sb->content_size;
6025 if (ratio_viewport > 1.0) ratio_viewport = 1.0;
6026 double max_scroll = sb->content_size - sb->viewport_size;
6027 if (max_scroll < 0) max_scroll = 0;
6028
6029 double pos_ratio;
6030 if (sb->orientation == N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_V) {
6031 float thumb_h = (float)(ratio_viewport * (double)wgt->h);
6032 if (thumb_h < style->scrollbar_thumb_min) thumb_h = style->scrollbar_thumb_min;
6033 float track_range = wgt->h - thumb_h;
6034 if (track_range <= 0) return;
6035 pos_ratio = (double)(my - ay - thumb_h / 2.0f) / (double)track_range;
6036 } else {
6037 float thumb_w = (float)(ratio_viewport * (double)wgt->w);
6038 if (thumb_w < style->scrollbar_thumb_min) thumb_w = style->scrollbar_thumb_min;
6039 float track_range = wgt->w - thumb_w;
6040 if (track_range <= 0) return;
6041 pos_ratio = (double)(mx - ax - thumb_w / 2.0f) / (double)track_range;
6042 }
6043 if (pos_ratio < 0.0) pos_ratio = 0.0;
6044 if (pos_ratio > 1.0) pos_ratio = 1.0;
6045 sb->scroll_pos = pos_ratio * max_scroll;
6046 if (sb->on_scroll) {
6047 sb->on_scroll(wgt->id, sb->scroll_pos, sb->user_data);
6048 }
6049}
6050
6052static int _utf8_encode(int cp, char* out) {
6053 if (cp < 0x80) {
6054 out[0] = (char)cp;
6055 return 1;
6056 }
6057 if (cp < 0x800) {
6058 out[0] = (char)(0xC0 | (cp >> 6));
6059 out[1] = (char)(0x80 | (cp & 0x3F));
6060 return 2;
6061 }
6062 if (cp < 0x10000) {
6063 out[0] = (char)(0xE0 | (cp >> 12));
6064 out[1] = (char)(0x80 | ((cp >> 6) & 0x3F));
6065 out[2] = (char)(0x80 | (cp & 0x3F));
6066 return 3;
6067 }
6068 if (cp < 0x110000) {
6069 out[0] = (char)(0xF0 | (cp >> 18));
6070 out[1] = (char)(0x80 | ((cp >> 12) & 0x3F));
6071 out[2] = (char)(0x80 | ((cp >> 6) & 0x3F));
6072 out[3] = (char)(0x80 | (cp & 0x3F));
6073 return 4;
6074 }
6075 return 0;
6076}
6077
6079static void _textarea_clear_selection(N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* td) {
6080 td->sel_start = td->cursor_pos;
6081 td->sel_end = td->cursor_pos;
6082}
6083
6085static void _textarea_delete_selection(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt) {
6086 N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* td = (N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA*)wgt->data;
6087 if (!_textarea_has_selection(td)) return;
6088 size_t lo, hi;
6089 _textarea_sel_range(td, &lo, &hi);
6090 size_t del_len = hi - lo;
6091 memmove(&td->text[lo], &td->text[hi], td->text_len - hi + 1);
6092 td->text_len -= del_len;
6093 td->cursor_pos = lo;
6094 _textarea_clear_selection(td);
6095 if (td->on_change) td->on_change(wgt->id, td->text, td->user_data);
6096}
6097
6099static int _textarea_copy_to_clipboard(const N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* td, ALLEGRO_DISPLAY* display) {
6100 if (!display || !_textarea_has_selection(td)) return 0;
6101 size_t lo, hi;
6102 _textarea_sel_range(td, &lo, &hi);
6103 size_t len = hi - lo;
6104 char* tmp = NULL;
6105 Malloc(tmp, char, len + 1);
6106 if (!tmp) return 0;
6107 memcpy(tmp, &td->text[lo], len);
6108 tmp[len] = '\0';
6109 al_set_clipboard_text(display, tmp);
6110 FreeNoLog(tmp);
6111 return 1;
6112}
6113
6117static int _textarea_handle_key(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, ALLEGRO_EVENT* ev, ALLEGRO_FONT* font, float pad, float sb_size, N_GUI_CTX* ctx) {
6118 N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* td = (N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA*)wgt->data;
6119
6120 /* reset blink timer so cursor stays visible during typing */
6121 td->cursor_time = al_get_time();
6122 /* clear mouse-wheel scroll flag so auto-scroll resumes following the cursor */
6123 td->scroll_from_wheel = 0;
6124
6125 int shift = (ev->keyboard.modifiers & ALLEGRO_KEYMOD_SHIFT) ? 1 : 0;
6126 int ctrl = (ev->keyboard.modifiers & ALLEGRO_KEYMOD_CTRL) ? 1 : 0;
6127
6128 /* Ctrl+A: select all */
6129 if (ctrl && ev->keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_A) {
6130 td->sel_start = 0;
6131 td->sel_end = td->text_len;
6132 td->cursor_pos = td->text_len;
6133 return 1;
6134 }
6135
6136 /* Ctrl+C: copy */
6137 if (ctrl && ev->keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_C) {
6138 if (ctx && ctx->display) {
6139 _textarea_copy_to_clipboard(td, ctx->display);
6140 }
6141 return 1;
6142 }
6143
6144 /* Ctrl+X: cut */
6145 if (ctrl && ev->keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_X) {
6146 if (ctx && ctx->display && _textarea_has_selection(td)) {
6147 _textarea_copy_to_clipboard(td, ctx->display);
6148 _textarea_delete_selection(wgt);
6149 }
6150 return 1;
6151 }
6152
6153 /* Ctrl+V: paste */
6154 if (ctrl && ev->keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_V) {
6155 if (ctx && ctx->display) {
6156 char* clip = al_get_clipboard_text(ctx->display);
6157 if (clip) {
6158 /* delete selection first if any */
6159 if (_textarea_has_selection(td)) {
6160 _textarea_delete_selection(wgt);
6161 }
6162 size_t clip_len = strlen(clip);
6163 /* filter out non-printable except newline in multiline mode;
6164 * skip \r to normalize CRLF for Allegro5 compatibility */
6165 char filtered[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
6166 size_t flen = 0;
6167 for (size_t ci = 0; ci < clip_len && flen < N_GUI_TEXT_MAX - 1; ci++) {
6168 if (clip[ci] == '\r') {
6169 continue; /* strip CR, CRLF becomes just LF */
6170 } else if (clip[ci] == '\n') {
6171 if (td->multiline) filtered[flen++] = '\n';
6172 } else if ((unsigned char)clip[ci] >= 32 || ((unsigned char)clip[ci] & 0xC0) == 0x80) {
6173 filtered[flen++] = clip[ci];
6174 } else if (((unsigned char)clip[ci] & 0xC0) == 0xC0) {
6175 filtered[flen++] = clip[ci]; /* UTF-8 lead byte */
6176 }
6177 }
6178 filtered[flen] = '\0';
6179 if (flen > 0 && td->text_len + flen <= td->char_limit) {
6180 memmove(&td->text[td->cursor_pos + flen], &td->text[td->cursor_pos], td->text_len - td->cursor_pos + 1);
6181 memcpy(&td->text[td->cursor_pos], filtered, flen);
6182 td->cursor_pos += flen;
6183 td->text_len += flen;
6184 _textarea_clear_selection(td);
6185 if (td->on_change) td->on_change(wgt->id, td->text, td->user_data);
6186 }
6187 al_free(clip);
6188 }
6189 }
6190 return 1;
6191 }
6192
6193 if (ev->keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_BACKSPACE) {
6194 if (_textarea_has_selection(td)) {
6195 _textarea_delete_selection(wgt);
6196 } else if (td->cursor_pos > 0 && td->text_len > 0) {
6197 size_t erase_start = td->cursor_pos;
6198 int cont_count = 0;
6199 do {
6200 erase_start--;
6201 cont_count++;
6202 } while (erase_start > 0 && cont_count <= 3 && ((unsigned char)td->text[erase_start] & 0xC0) == 0x80);
6203 size_t erase_len = td->cursor_pos - erase_start;
6204 memmove(&td->text[erase_start], &td->text[td->cursor_pos], td->text_len - td->cursor_pos + 1);
6205 td->cursor_pos = erase_start;
6206 td->text_len -= erase_len;
6207 _textarea_clear_selection(td);
6208 if (td->on_change) td->on_change(wgt->id, td->text, td->user_data);
6209 }
6210 return 1;
6211 }
6212 if (ev->keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_DELETE) {
6213 if (_textarea_has_selection(td)) {
6214 _textarea_delete_selection(wgt);
6215 } else if (td->cursor_pos < td->text_len) {
6216 int clen = _utf8_char_len((unsigned char)td->text[td->cursor_pos]);
6217 if (td->cursor_pos + (size_t)clen > td->text_len) clen = (int)(td->text_len - td->cursor_pos);
6218 memmove(&td->text[td->cursor_pos], &td->text[td->cursor_pos + (size_t)clen], td->text_len - td->cursor_pos - (size_t)clen + 1);
6219 td->text_len -= (size_t)clen;
6220 _textarea_clear_selection(td);
6221 if (td->on_change) td->on_change(wgt->id, td->text, td->user_data);
6222 }
6223 return 1;
6224 }
6225 if (ev->keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_LEFT) {
6226 if (!shift && _textarea_has_selection(td)) {
6227 /* collapse selection to left edge */
6228 size_t lo, hi;
6229 _textarea_sel_range(td, &lo, &hi);
6230 td->cursor_pos = lo;
6231 _textarea_clear_selection(td);
6232 } else if (td->cursor_pos > 0) {
6233 if (shift && !_textarea_has_selection(td)) {
6234 td->sel_start = td->cursor_pos;
6235 }
6236 int skip = 0;
6237 do {
6238 td->cursor_pos--;
6239 } while (skip++ < 3 && td->cursor_pos > 0 && ((unsigned char)td->text[td->cursor_pos] & 0xC0) == 0x80);
6240 if (shift)
6241 td->sel_end = td->cursor_pos;
6242 else
6243 _textarea_clear_selection(td);
6244 }
6245 return 1;
6246 }
6247 if (ev->keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_RIGHT) {
6248 if (!shift && _textarea_has_selection(td)) {
6249 /* collapse selection to right edge */
6250 size_t lo, hi;
6251 _textarea_sel_range(td, &lo, &hi);
6252 td->cursor_pos = hi;
6253 _textarea_clear_selection(td);
6254 } else if (td->cursor_pos < td->text_len) {
6255 if (shift && !_textarea_has_selection(td)) {
6256 td->sel_start = td->cursor_pos;
6257 }
6258 int clen = _utf8_char_len((unsigned char)td->text[td->cursor_pos]);
6259 td->cursor_pos += (size_t)clen;
6260 if (td->cursor_pos > td->text_len) td->cursor_pos = td->text_len;
6261 if (shift)
6262 td->sel_end = td->cursor_pos;
6263 else
6264 _textarea_clear_selection(td);
6265 }
6266 return 1;
6267 }
6268 if (ev->keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_HOME) {
6269 if (shift && !_textarea_has_selection(td)) {
6270 td->sel_start = td->cursor_pos;
6271 }
6272 td->cursor_pos = 0;
6273 if (shift)
6274 td->sel_end = td->cursor_pos;
6275 else
6276 _textarea_clear_selection(td);
6277 return 1;
6278 }
6279 if (ev->keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_END) {
6280 if (shift && !_textarea_has_selection(td)) {
6281 td->sel_start = td->cursor_pos;
6282 }
6283 td->cursor_pos = td->text_len;
6284 if (shift)
6285 td->sel_end = td->cursor_pos;
6286 else
6287 _textarea_clear_selection(td);
6288 return 1;
6289 }
6290
6291 /* UP/DOWN arrow keys: move cursor to previous/next visual line in multiline mode */
6292 if (ev->keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_UP || ev->keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_DOWN) {
6293 if (!td->multiline || !font) return 1;
6294 if (shift && !_textarea_has_selection(td)) {
6295 td->sel_start = td->cursor_pos;
6296 }
6297
6298 /* compute wrap width consistently with rendering: subtract scrollbar
6299 * width when content overflows, then subtract padding. */
6300 float base_wrap_w = wgt->w - pad * 2;
6301 float text_area_h = wgt->h - pad * 2;
6302 float content_h = _textarea_content_height(td, font, wgt->w, pad);
6303 float wrap_w = (content_h > text_area_h)
6304 ? (wgt->w - sb_size - pad * 2)
6305 : base_wrap_w;
6306
6307 /* pass 1: find the cursor's visual line number and x offset */
6308 float cx = 0;
6309 int line = 0;
6310 int cursor_line = 0;
6311 float cursor_x = 0;
6312
6313 for (size_t i = 0; i < td->text_len;) {
6314 if (i == td->cursor_pos) {
6315 cursor_line = line;
6316 cursor_x = cx;
6317 }
6318 if (td->text[i] == '\n') {
6319 cx = 0;
6320 line++;
6321 i++;
6322 continue;
6323 }
6324 int clen = _utf8_char_len((unsigned char)td->text[i]);
6325 if (i + (size_t)clen > td->text_len) clen = (int)(td->text_len - i);
6326 char ch[5];
6327 memcpy(ch, &td->text[i], (size_t)clen);
6328 ch[clen] = '\0';
6329 float cw = _text_w(font, ch);
6330 if (cx + cw > wrap_w) {
6331 cx = 0;
6332 line++;
6333 if (i == td->cursor_pos) {
6334 cursor_line = line;
6335 cursor_x = cx;
6336 }
6337 }
6338 cx += cw;
6339 i += (size_t)clen;
6340 }
6341 if (td->cursor_pos >= td->text_len) {
6342 cursor_line = line;
6343 cursor_x = cx;
6344 }
6345 int total_lines = line;
6346
6347 /* determine target line */
6348 int target_line;
6349 if (ev->keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_UP) {
6350 if (cursor_line <= 0) {
6351 td->cursor_pos = 0;
6352 return 1;
6353 }
6354 target_line = cursor_line - 1;
6355 } else {
6356 if (cursor_line >= total_lines) {
6357 td->cursor_pos = td->text_len;
6358 return 1;
6359 }
6360 target_line = cursor_line + 1;
6361 }
6362
6363 /* pass 2: find the byte position on target_line closest to cursor_x */
6364 cx = 0;
6365 line = 0;
6366 size_t best_pos = 0;
6367 float best_dist = 1e9f;
6368
6369 /* check position 0 */
6370 if (line == target_line) {
6371 best_dist = (cursor_x >= 0) ? cursor_x : -cursor_x;
6372 best_pos = 0;
6373 }
6374
6375 for (size_t i = 0; i < td->text_len;) {
6376 if (td->text[i] == '\n') {
6377 if (line >= target_line) break;
6378 cx = 0;
6379 line++;
6380 if (line == target_line) {
6381 float dist = (cursor_x >= cx) ? (cursor_x - cx) : (cx - cursor_x);
6382 if (dist < best_dist) {
6383 best_dist = dist;
6384 best_pos = i + 1;
6385 }
6386 }
6387 i++;
6388 continue;
6389 }
6390 int clen = _utf8_char_len((unsigned char)td->text[i]);
6391 if (i + (size_t)clen > td->text_len) clen = (int)(td->text_len - i);
6392 char ch[5];
6393 memcpy(ch, &td->text[i], (size_t)clen);
6394 ch[clen] = '\0';
6395 float cw = _text_w(font, ch);
6396 if (cx + cw > wrap_w) {
6397 if (line >= target_line) break;
6398 cx = 0;
6399 line++;
6400 if (line == target_line) {
6401 float dist = (cursor_x >= cx) ? (cursor_x - cx) : (cx - cursor_x);
6402 if (dist < best_dist) {
6403 best_dist = dist;
6404 best_pos = i;
6405 }
6406 }
6407 }
6408 cx += cw;
6409 /* check position after this character */
6410 if (line == target_line) {
6411 float dist = (cursor_x >= cx) ? (cursor_x - cx) : (cx - cursor_x);
6412 if (dist < best_dist) {
6413 best_dist = dist;
6414 best_pos = i + (size_t)clen;
6415 if (best_pos > td->text_len) best_pos = td->text_len;
6416 }
6417 }
6418 i += (size_t)clen;
6419 }
6420
6421 td->cursor_pos = best_pos;
6422 if (shift)
6423 td->sel_end = td->cursor_pos;
6424 else
6425 _textarea_clear_selection(td);
6426 return 1;
6427 }
6428
6429 if (ev->keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_ENTER) {
6430 if (td->multiline) {
6431 if (_textarea_has_selection(td)) {
6432 _textarea_delete_selection(wgt);
6433 }
6434 if (td->text_len < td->char_limit) {
6435 memmove(&td->text[td->cursor_pos + 1], &td->text[td->cursor_pos], td->text_len - td->cursor_pos + 1);
6436 td->text[td->cursor_pos] = '\n';
6437 td->cursor_pos++;
6438 td->text_len++;
6439 _textarea_clear_selection(td);
6440 if (td->on_change) td->on_change(wgt->id, td->text, td->user_data);
6441 }
6442 }
6443 /* in single-line mode, let ENTER pass through to button keybinds */
6444 return td->multiline ? 1 : 0;
6445 }
6446
6447 /* printable character: encode Unicode code point as UTF-8 */
6448 if (ev->keyboard.unichar >= 32) {
6449 /* delete selection first */
6450 if (_textarea_has_selection(td)) {
6451 _textarea_delete_selection(wgt);
6452 }
6453 char utf8[4];
6454 int utf8_len = _utf8_encode(ev->keyboard.unichar, utf8);
6455 if (utf8_len > 0 && td->text_len + (size_t)utf8_len <= td->char_limit) {
6456 memmove(&td->text[td->cursor_pos + (size_t)utf8_len], &td->text[td->cursor_pos], td->text_len - td->cursor_pos + 1);
6457 memcpy(&td->text[td->cursor_pos], utf8, (size_t)utf8_len);
6458 td->cursor_pos += (size_t)utf8_len;
6459 td->text_len += (size_t)utf8_len;
6460 _textarea_clear_selection(td);
6461 if (td->on_change) td->on_change(wgt->id, td->text, td->user_data);
6462 }
6463 }
6464 return 1;
6465}
6466
6474static void _tb_button_action(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, N_GUI_WINDOW* win, int btn_type) {
6475 if (btn_type == N_GUI_TB_BTN_MINIMIZE) {
6476 if (win->tb_buttons.on_minimize)
6477 win->tb_buttons.on_minimize(win->id, win->tb_buttons.on_minimize_user_data);
6478 else
6479 n_gui_minimize_window(ctx, win->id);
6480 } else if (btn_type == N_GUI_TB_BTN_MAXIMIZE) {
6481 if (win->tb_buttons.on_maximize)
6482 win->tb_buttons.on_maximize(win->id, win->tb_buttons.on_maximize_user_data);
6483 else
6484 n_gui_maximize_window(ctx, win->id);
6485 } else if (btn_type == N_GUI_TB_BTN_CLOSE) {
6486 if (win->tb_buttons.on_close)
6487 win->tb_buttons.on_close(win->id, win->tb_buttons.on_close_user_data);
6488 else
6489 n_gui_close_window(ctx, win->id);
6490 }
6491}
6492
6502int n_gui_process_event(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, ALLEGRO_EVENT event) {
6503 __n_assert(ctx, return 0);
6504
6505 int event_consumed = 0;
6506
6507 /* When the display loses focus (e.g. OS window is moved to another monitor via the
6508 * title bar, or another window steals focus), examples typically call
6509 * al_flush_event_queue() which discards any pending MOUSE_BUTTON_UP events.
6510 * Without resetting our state here, the GUI would keep its drag/resize flags set
6511 * and continue moving/resizing windows on the next MOUSE_AXES event, which is the
6512 * root cause of GUI windows being unintentionally resized when the OS window is
6513 * moved between monitors. */
6514 if (event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_DISPLAY_SWITCH_OUT) {
6515 ctx->mouse_b1 = 0;
6516 ctx->mouse_b1_prev = 0;
6517 list_foreach(wnode, ctx->windows) {
6518 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
6519 win->state &= ~(N_GUI_WIN_DRAGGING | N_GUI_WIN_RESIZING | N_GUI_WIN_VSCROLL_DRAG | N_GUI_WIN_HSCROLL_DRAG);
6520 win->tb_buttons.pressed = N_GUI_TB_BTN_NONE;
6521 win->tb_buttons.hovered = N_GUI_TB_BTN_NONE;
6522 }
6523 ctx->global_vscroll_drag = 0;
6524 ctx->global_hscroll_drag = 0;
6525 return 0;
6526 }
6527
6528 /* track mouse */
6529 if (event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_MOUSE_AXES) {
6530 ctx->mouse_x = event.mouse.x;
6531 ctx->mouse_y = event.mouse.y;
6532 /* tooltip arming: track the hovered tooltip widget; any movement
6533 * re-arms the delay so the bubble shows once the pointer rests.
6534 * Disabled hosts (style.tooltip_delay <= 0, e.g. touch screens where
6535 * the emulated cursor parks on the last tap forever) and held-button
6536 * drags skip the whole widget scan - it would run at the touch
6537 * sample rate in the middle of a stroke for nothing */
6538 if (ctx->style.tooltip_delay > 0.0f && !ctx->mouse_b1) {
6539 int tip_id = _tooltip_widget_at(ctx, (float)ctx->mouse_x, (float)ctx->mouse_y);
6540 int moved = (abs(ctx->mouse_x - ctx->tooltip_anchor_x) > 2) || (abs(ctx->mouse_y - ctx->tooltip_anchor_y) > 2);
6541 if (tip_id != ctx->tooltip_widget_id || moved) {
6542 ctx->tooltip_widget_id = tip_id;
6543 ctx->tooltip_armed_at = al_get_time();
6544 ctx->tooltip_anchor_x = ctx->mouse_x;
6545 ctx->tooltip_anchor_y = ctx->mouse_y;
6546 }
6547 } else if (ctx->tooltip_widget_id >= 0) {
6548 ctx->tooltip_widget_id = -1;
6549 }
6550 }
6551 if (event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_MOUSE_BUTTON_DOWN && event.mouse.button == 1) {
6552 ctx->tooltip_widget_id = -1; /* a click dismisses the tooltip */
6553 ctx->mouse_b1_prev = ctx->mouse_b1;
6554 ctx->mouse_b1 = 1;
6555 ctx->mouse_x = event.mouse.x;
6556 ctx->mouse_y = event.mouse.y;
6557 }
6558 if (event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_MOUSE_BUTTON_UP && event.mouse.button == 1) {
6559 ctx->mouse_b1_prev = ctx->mouse_b1;
6560 ctx->mouse_b1 = 0;
6561 ctx->scrollbar_drag_widget_id = -1;
6562 }
6563
6564 /* Unified widget scrollbar drag: update scroll position while mouse held */
6565 if (ctx->scrollbar_drag_widget_id >= 0 && ctx->mouse_b1 &&
6566 (event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_MOUSE_AXES || event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_MOUSE_BUTTON_DOWN)) {
6567 N_GUI_WIDGET* drag_wgt = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->scrollbar_drag_widget_id);
6568 if (drag_wgt && drag_wgt->data) {
6569 float d_ox = 0, d_oy = 0;
6570 const N_GUI_WINDOW* d_win = _find_widget_window(ctx, drag_wgt->id, &d_ox, &d_oy);
6571 if (d_win) {
6572 ALLEGRO_FONT* d_font = drag_wgt->font ? drag_wgt->font : ctx->default_font;
6573 float d_fh = d_font ? (float)al_get_font_line_height(d_font) : 16.0f;
6574 float d_my = (float)ctx->mouse_y;
6575 switch (drag_wgt->type) {
6576 case N_GUI_TYPE_COMBOBOX: {
6577 N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA* cbd = (N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA*)drag_wgt->data;
6578 if (cbd->is_open && (int)cbd->nb_items > cbd->max_visible) {
6579 float ih = cbd->item_height > d_fh ? cbd->item_height : d_fh + ctx->style.item_height_pad;
6580 float d_ay = d_oy + drag_wgt->y + drag_wgt->h;
6581 float dd_h = (float)cbd->max_visible * ih;
6582 cbd->scroll_offset = _scrollbar_calc_scroll_int(d_my, d_ay, dd_h, cbd->max_visible, (int)cbd->nb_items, ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min);
6583 }
6584 break;
6585 }
6586 case N_GUI_TYPE_DROPMENU: {
6587 N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA* dmd = (N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)drag_wgt->data;
6588 if (dmd->is_open && (int)dmd->nb_entries > dmd->max_visible) {
6589 float ih = dmd->item_height > d_fh ? dmd->item_height : d_fh + ctx->style.item_height_pad;
6590 float d_ay = d_oy + drag_wgt->y + drag_wgt->h;
6591 float dd_h = (float)dmd->max_visible * ih;
6592 dmd->scroll_offset = _scrollbar_calc_scroll_int(d_my, d_ay, dd_h, dmd->max_visible, (int)dmd->nb_entries, ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min);
6593 }
6594 break;
6595 }
6596 case N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX: {
6597 N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* lbd = (N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)drag_wgt->data;
6598 float ih = lbd->item_height > d_fh ? lbd->item_height : d_fh + ctx->style.item_height_pad;
6599 float d_ay = d_oy + drag_wgt->y;
6600 int visible = (int)(drag_wgt->h / ih);
6601 lbd->scroll_offset = _scrollbar_calc_scroll_int(d_my, d_ay, drag_wgt->h, visible, (int)lbd->nb_items, ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min);
6602 break;
6603 }
6604 case N_GUI_TYPE_RADIOLIST: {
6605 N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA* rld = (N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA*)drag_wgt->data;
6606 float ih = rld->item_height > d_fh ? rld->item_height : d_fh + ctx->style.item_height_pad;
6607 float d_ay = d_oy + drag_wgt->y;
6608 int visible = (int)(drag_wgt->h / ih);
6609 rld->scroll_offset = _scrollbar_calc_scroll_int(d_my, d_ay, drag_wgt->h, visible, (int)rld->nb_items, ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min);
6610 break;
6611 }
6612 case N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA: {
6613 N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* tatd = (N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA*)drag_wgt->data;
6614 if (tatd->multiline) {
6615 float ta_pad = ctx->style.textarea_padding;
6616 float ta_view_h = drag_wgt->h - ta_pad * 2;
6617 float ta_sb_w = ctx->style.scrollbar_size;
6618 float ta_text_w = drag_wgt->w - ta_sb_w;
6619 float ta_content_h = _textarea_content_height(tatd, d_font, ta_text_w, ta_pad);
6620 float d_ay = d_oy + drag_wgt->y + ta_pad;
6621 tatd->scroll_y = (int)_scrollbar_calc_scroll(
6622 d_my, d_ay, ta_view_h,
6623 ta_view_h, ta_content_h,
6624 ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min);
6625 }
6626 break;
6627 }
6628 default:
6629 break;
6630 }
6631 return 1;
6632 }
6633 }
6634 }
6635
6636 /* screen-space mouse (for global scrollbar interaction) */
6637 float screen_mx = (float)ctx->mouse_x;
6638 float screen_my = (float)ctx->mouse_y;
6639 /* virtual-space mouse: reverse the virtual canvas transform first */
6640 float virtual_mx = screen_mx;
6641 float virtual_my = screen_my;
6642 if (ctx->virtual_w > 0 && ctx->virtual_h > 0 && ctx->gui_scale > 0) {
6643 virtual_mx = (screen_mx - ctx->gui_offset_x) / ctx->gui_scale;
6644 virtual_my = (screen_my - ctx->gui_offset_y) / ctx->gui_scale;
6645 }
6646 /* GUI-space mouse (offset by global scroll) */
6647 float mx = virtual_mx + ctx->global_scroll_x;
6648 float my = virtual_my + ctx->global_scroll_y;
6649 int just_pressed = (ctx->mouse_b1 == 1 && ctx->mouse_b1_prev == 0 &&
6650 event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_MOUSE_BUTTON_DOWN)
6651 ? 1
6652 : 0;
6653 int just_released = (ctx->mouse_b1 == 0 && ctx->mouse_b1_prev == 1 &&
6654 event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_MOUSE_BUTTON_UP)
6655 ? 1
6656 : 0;
6657
6658 /* effective dimensions: gate on both dimensions for virtual canvas */
6659 int virtual_active = (ctx->virtual_w > 0 && ctx->virtual_h > 0);
6660 float eff_w = virtual_active ? ctx->virtual_w : ctx->display_w;
6661 float eff_h = virtual_active ? ctx->virtual_h : ctx->display_h;
6662
6663 /* handle global scrollbar drag */
6664 if (ctx->global_vscroll_drag || ctx->global_hscroll_drag) {
6665 if (ctx->mouse_b1 && (event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_MOUSE_AXES || event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_MOUSE_BUTTON_DOWN)) {
6666 float scrollbar_size = ctx->style.global_scrollbar_size;
6667 _compute_gui_bounds(ctx);
6668 if (ctx->global_vscroll_drag && eff_h > 0) {
6669 int need_hscroll = (ctx->gui_bounds_w > eff_w) ? 1 : 0;
6670 float sb_h = eff_h - (need_hscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
6671 float view_h = sb_h;
6672 float ratio = view_h / ctx->gui_bounds_h;
6673 if (ratio > 1.0f) ratio = 1.0f;
6674 float thumb_h = ratio * sb_h;
6675 if (thumb_h < ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_min) thumb_h = ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_min;
6676 float max_scroll = ctx->gui_bounds_h - view_h;
6677 float track_range = sb_h - thumb_h;
6678 if (track_range > 0 && max_scroll > 0) {
6679 float pos_ratio = (virtual_my - thumb_h / 2.0f) / track_range;
6680 if (pos_ratio < 0) pos_ratio = 0;
6681 if (pos_ratio > 1) pos_ratio = 1;
6682 ctx->global_scroll_y = pos_ratio * max_scroll;
6683 }
6684 }
6685 if (ctx->global_hscroll_drag && eff_w > 0) {
6686 int need_vscroll = (ctx->gui_bounds_h > eff_h) ? 1 : 0;
6687 float sb_w = eff_w - (need_vscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
6688 float view_w = sb_w;
6689 float ratio = view_w / ctx->gui_bounds_w;
6690 if (ratio > 1.0f) ratio = 1.0f;
6691 float thumb_w = ratio * sb_w;
6692 if (thumb_w < ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_min) thumb_w = ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_min;
6693 float max_scroll = ctx->gui_bounds_w - view_w;
6694 float track_range = sb_w - thumb_w;
6695 if (track_range > 0 && max_scroll > 0) {
6696 float pos_ratio = (virtual_mx - thumb_w / 2.0f) / track_range;
6697 if (pos_ratio < 0) pos_ratio = 0;
6698 if (pos_ratio > 1) pos_ratio = 1;
6699 ctx->global_scroll_x = pos_ratio * max_scroll;
6700 }
6701 }
6702 return 1;
6703 }
6704 if (just_released) {
6705 ctx->global_vscroll_drag = 0;
6706 ctx->global_hscroll_drag = 0;
6707 }
6708 return 1;
6709 }
6710
6711 /* check global scrollbar click */
6712 if (just_pressed && eff_w > 0 && eff_h > 0) {
6713 float scrollbar_size = ctx->style.global_scrollbar_size;
6714 _compute_gui_bounds(ctx);
6715 int need_vscroll = (ctx->gui_bounds_h > eff_h) ? 1 : 0;
6716 int need_hscroll = (ctx->gui_bounds_w > eff_w) ? 1 : 0;
6717 if (need_vscroll && ctx->gui_bounds_w > (eff_w - scrollbar_size)) need_hscroll = 1;
6718 if (need_hscroll && ctx->gui_bounds_h > (eff_h - scrollbar_size)) need_vscroll = 1;
6719
6720 if (need_vscroll) {
6721 float sb_x = eff_w - scrollbar_size;
6722 float sb_h = eff_h - (need_hscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
6723 if (_point_in_rect(virtual_mx, virtual_my, sb_x, 0, scrollbar_size, sb_h)) {
6724 ctx->global_vscroll_drag = 1;
6725 return 1;
6726 }
6727 }
6728 if (need_hscroll) {
6729 float sb_y = eff_h - scrollbar_size;
6730 float sb_w = eff_w - (need_vscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
6731 if (_point_in_rect(virtual_mx, virtual_my, 0, sb_y, sb_w, scrollbar_size)) {
6732 ctx->global_hscroll_drag = 1;
6733 return 1;
6734 }
6735 }
6736 }
6737
6738 /* handle open combobox dropdown first (it overlays everything) */
6739 if (just_pressed && ctx->open_combobox_id >= 0) {
6740 N_GUI_WIDGET* cb_wgt = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->open_combobox_id);
6741 if (cb_wgt && cb_wgt->data) {
6742 N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA* cbd = (N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA*)cb_wgt->data;
6743
6744 /* find absolute position of the combobox (account for window scroll) */
6745 float cb_ox = 0, cb_oy = 0;
6746 _find_widget_window(ctx, cb_wgt->id, &cb_ox, &cb_oy);
6747
6748 ALLEGRO_FONT* cb_font = cb_wgt->font ? cb_wgt->font : ctx->default_font;
6749 float cb_fh = cb_font ? (float)al_get_font_line_height(cb_font) : 16.0f;
6750 float cb_ih = cbd->item_height > cb_fh ? cbd->item_height : cb_fh + ctx->style.item_height_pad;
6751 float cb_ax = cb_ox + cb_wgt->x;
6752 float cb_pad = ctx->style.item_text_padding;
6753 int cb_vis = (int)cbd->nb_items;
6754 if (cb_vis > cbd->max_visible) cb_vis = cbd->max_visible;
6755 float cb_dd_h = (float)cb_vis * cb_ih;
6756 float cb_ay = _dropdown_panel_y(ctx, cb_oy + cb_wgt->y, cb_oy + cb_wgt->y + cb_wgt->h,
6757 cb_dd_h, cbd->flags & N_GUI_COMBOBOX_EXPAND_UP);
6758
6759 /* compute effective dropdown width (mirrors _draw_combobox_dropdown) */
6760 float cb_dd_w = cb_wgt->w;
6761 if ((cbd->flags & N_GUI_COMBOBOX_AUTO_WIDTH) && cb_font) {
6762 float cb_max_tw = 0;
6763 for (size_t ci = 0; ci < cbd->nb_items; ci++) {
6764 float tw = _text_w(cb_font, cbd->items[ci].text);
6765 if (tw > cb_max_tw) cb_max_tw = tw;
6766 }
6767 float cb_needed = cb_max_tw + cb_pad * 2;
6768 if (cb_needed > cb_dd_w) cb_dd_w = cb_needed;
6769 float cb_cap = ctx->style.combobox_max_dropdown_width;
6770 if (cb_cap <= 0) cb_cap = ctx->display_w > 0 ? (float)ctx->display_w : 4096.0f;
6771 if (cb_dd_w > cb_cap) cb_dd_w = cb_cap;
6772 if (ctx->display_w > 0 && cb_ax + cb_dd_w > (float)ctx->display_w) {
6773 cb_dd_w = (float)ctx->display_w - cb_ax;
6774 if (cb_dd_w < cb_wgt->w) cb_dd_w = cb_wgt->w;
6775 }
6776 }
6777
6778 if (_point_in_rect(mx, my, cb_ax, cb_ay, cb_dd_w, cb_dd_h)) {
6779 /* Check if click is on the scrollbar area (right edge) */
6780 int cb_need_sb = ((int)cbd->nb_items > cbd->max_visible);
6781 float cb_sb_size = ctx->style.scrollbar_size;
6782 if (cb_sb_size < 10.0f) cb_sb_size = 10.0f;
6783 float cb_item_w = cb_need_sb ? cb_dd_w - cb_sb_size : cb_dd_w;
6784
6785 if (cb_need_sb && mx >= cb_ax + cb_item_w) {
6786 /* Clicked on scrollbar, scroll to position, start drag */
6787 cbd->scroll_offset = _scrollbar_calc_scroll_int(my, cb_ay, cb_dd_h, cbd->max_visible, (int)cbd->nb_items, ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min);
6788 ctx->scrollbar_drag_widget_id = cb_wgt->id;
6789 return 1; /* consumed, keep dropdown open */
6790 }
6791
6792 /* Clicked on item area, select item */
6793 int clicked_idx = cbd->scroll_offset + (int)((my - cb_ay) / cb_ih);
6794 if (clicked_idx >= 0 && (size_t)clicked_idx < cbd->nb_items) {
6795 cbd->selected_index = clicked_idx;
6796 if (cbd->on_select) cbd->on_select(cb_wgt->id, clicked_idx, cbd->user_data);
6797 }
6798 cbd->is_open = 0;
6799 ctx->open_combobox_id = -1;
6800 return 1; /* event consumed by dropdown */
6801 } else {
6802 /* clicked outside dropdown - close it */
6803 cbd->is_open = 0;
6804 ctx->open_combobox_id = -1;
6805 /* fall through to normal processing */
6806 }
6807 } else {
6808 ctx->open_combobox_id = -1;
6809 }
6810 }
6811
6812 /* handle open dropdown menu panel first */
6813 if (just_pressed && ctx->open_dropmenu_id >= 0) {
6814 N_GUI_WIDGET* dm_wgt = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->open_dropmenu_id);
6815 if (dm_wgt && dm_wgt->data) {
6816 N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA* dmd = (N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)dm_wgt->data;
6817
6818 /* find absolute position of the dropmenu widget (account for window scroll) */
6819 float dm_ox = 0, dm_oy = 0;
6820 _find_widget_window(ctx, dm_wgt->id, &dm_ox, &dm_oy);
6821
6822 ALLEGRO_FONT* dm_font = dm_wgt->font ? dm_wgt->font : ctx->default_font;
6823 float dm_fh = dm_font ? (float)al_get_font_line_height(dm_font) : 16.0f;
6824 float dm_ih = dmd->item_height > dm_fh ? dmd->item_height : dm_fh + ctx->style.item_height_pad;
6825 float dm_ax = dm_ox + dm_wgt->x;
6826 int dm_vis = (int)dmd->nb_entries;
6827 if (dm_vis > dmd->max_visible) dm_vis = dmd->max_visible;
6828 float dm_panel_h = (float)dm_vis * dm_ih;
6829 float dm_ay = _dropdown_panel_y(ctx, dm_oy + dm_wgt->y, dm_oy + dm_wgt->y + dm_wgt->h,
6830 dm_panel_h, dmd->flags & N_GUI_DROPMENU_EXPAND_UP);
6831
6832 if (_point_in_rect(mx, my, dm_ax, dm_ay, dm_wgt->w, dm_panel_h)) {
6833 /* check if click is on the scrollbar area (right edge) */
6834 int dm_need_sb = ((int)dmd->nb_entries > dmd->max_visible);
6835 float dm_sb_size = ctx->style.scrollbar_size;
6836 if (dm_sb_size < 10.0f) dm_sb_size = 10.0f;
6837 float dm_item_w = dm_need_sb ? dm_wgt->w - dm_sb_size : dm_wgt->w;
6838
6839 if (dm_need_sb && mx >= dm_ax + dm_item_w) {
6840 /* Clicked on scrollbar, scroll to position, start drag */
6841 dmd->scroll_offset = _scrollbar_calc_scroll_int(my, dm_ay, dm_panel_h, dmd->max_visible, (int)dmd->nb_entries, ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min);
6842 ctx->scrollbar_drag_widget_id = dm_wgt->id;
6843 return 1; /* consumed, keep panel open */
6844 }
6845
6846 /* clicked on item area */
6847 int clicked_idx = dmd->scroll_offset + (int)((my - dm_ay) / dm_ih);
6848 if (clicked_idx >= 0 && (size_t)clicked_idx < dmd->nb_entries) {
6849 N_GUI_DROPMENU_ENTRY* entry = &dmd->entries[clicked_idx];
6850 if (entry->on_click) {
6851 entry->on_click(dm_wgt->id, clicked_idx, entry->tag, entry->user_data);
6852 }
6853 }
6854 dmd->is_open = 0;
6855 ctx->open_dropmenu_id = -1;
6856 return 1; /* event consumed by dropdown menu */
6857 } else {
6858 /* clicked outside panel - close the menu */
6859 dmd->is_open = 0;
6860 ctx->open_dropmenu_id = -1;
6861 /* if click landed on the button itself, consume event so widget handler doesn't re-open */
6862 float dm_btn_ax = dm_ox + dm_wgt->x;
6863 float dm_btn_ay = dm_oy + dm_wgt->y;
6864 if (_point_in_rect(mx, my, dm_btn_ax, dm_btn_ay, dm_wgt->w, dm_wgt->h)) {
6865 return 1;
6866 }
6867 /* fall through to normal processing */
6868 }
6869 } else {
6870 ctx->open_dropmenu_id = -1;
6871 }
6872 }
6873
6874 /* iterate windows back-to-front, but for hit testing we want front-to-back
6875 (last in list = front), so we walk backward */
6876 if (event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_MOUSE_AXES ||
6877 event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_MOUSE_BUTTON_DOWN ||
6878 event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_MOUSE_BUTTON_UP) {
6879 /* reset hover for all widgets and titlebar buttons */
6880 list_foreach(wnode, ctx->windows) {
6881 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
6882 if (!(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN)) continue;
6883 win->tb_buttons.hovered = N_GUI_TB_BTN_NONE;
6884 list_foreach(wgn, win->widgets) {
6885 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = (N_GUI_WIDGET*)wgn->ptr;
6886 if (!wgt) continue;
6887 wgt->state &= ~N_GUI_STATE_HOVER;
6888 /* also clear listbox per-row hover so a widget that
6889 now has no pointer over it doesn't keep painting
6890 a hover highlight from the previous frame */
6891 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX && wgt->data) {
6892 ((N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)wgt->data)->hover_row = -1;
6893 }
6894 }
6895 }
6896
6897 /* check if any window has an active drag/resize/scroll (mouse capture) */
6898 LIST_NODE* captured_wnode = NULL;
6899 for (LIST_NODE* wnode = ctx->windows->end; wnode; wnode = wnode->prev) {
6900 const N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
6901 if (!(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN)) continue;
6902 if (win->state & (N_GUI_WIN_DRAGGING | N_GUI_WIN_RESIZING | N_GUI_WIN_VSCROLL_DRAG | N_GUI_WIN_HSCROLL_DRAG)) {
6903 captured_wnode = wnode;
6904 break;
6905 }
6906 }
6907
6908 /* find topmost window hit (iterate from end), skip if captured */
6909 LIST_NODE* hit_wnode = captured_wnode;
6910 if (!hit_wnode) {
6911 for (LIST_NODE* wnode = ctx->windows->end; wnode; wnode = wnode->prev) {
6912 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
6913 if (!(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN)) continue;
6914
6915 float win_h_check = (win->state & N_GUI_WIN_MINIMISED) ? _win_tbh(win) : win->h;
6916 if (_point_in_rect(mx, my, win->x, win->y, win->w, win_h_check)) {
6917 hit_wnode = wnode;
6918 break;
6919 }
6920 }
6921 }
6922
6923 if (hit_wnode) {
6924 event_consumed = 1;
6925 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)hit_wnode->ptr;
6926
6927 /* only process new clicks/interactions when not in a captured operation */
6928 if (!captured_wnode) {
6929 /* bring to front on click */
6930 if (just_pressed) {
6931 n_gui_raise_window(ctx, win->id);
6932 /* re-fetch since node may have moved */
6933 win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, win->id);
6934 if (!win) return 1;
6935
6936 /* clear focus from previously focused widget on a new primary click
6937 * inside a window; textarea clicks will re-set focus below */
6938 if (ctx->focused_widget_id >= 0) {
6939 N_GUI_WIDGET* prev_fw = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->focused_widget_id);
6940 if (prev_fw) prev_fw->state &= ~N_GUI_STATE_FOCUSED;
6941 ctx->focused_widget_id = -1;
6942 }
6943 }
6944
6945 /* check auto-scrollbar clicks before resize handle */
6946 int auto_scrollbar_hit = 0;
6947 if ((win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_AUTO_SCROLLBAR) && !(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_MINIMISED) && just_pressed) {
6948 float scrollbar_size = ctx->style.scrollbar_size;
6949 float body_h = win->h - _win_tbh(win);
6950 float body_y = win->y + _win_tbh(win);
6951 int need_vscroll = 0, need_hscroll = 0;
6952 _window_update_content_size(win, ctx->default_font);
6953 if (win->content_h > body_h) need_vscroll = 1;
6954 if (win->content_w > win->w) need_hscroll = 1;
6955 if (need_vscroll && win->content_w > (win->w - scrollbar_size)) need_hscroll = 1;
6956 if (need_hscroll && win->content_h > (body_h - scrollbar_size)) need_vscroll = 1;
6957 float content_area_w = win->w - (need_vscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
6958 float content_area_h = body_h - (need_hscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
6959
6960 /* vertical auto-scrollbar track */
6961 if (need_vscroll) {
6962 float sb_x = win->x + win->w - scrollbar_size;
6963 float sb_y = body_y;
6964 float sb_h = content_area_h;
6965 /* leave room for resize corner when no horizontal scrollbar */
6966 if ((win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZABLE) && !need_hscroll) sb_h -= scrollbar_size;
6967 if (_point_in_rect(mx, my, sb_x, sb_y, scrollbar_size, sb_h)) {
6968 win->state |= N_GUI_WIN_VSCROLL_DRAG;
6969 auto_scrollbar_hit = 1;
6970 win->scroll_y = _scrollbar_calc_scroll(my, sb_y, sb_h, content_area_h, win->content_h, ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min);
6971 }
6972 }
6973 /* horizontal auto-scrollbar track */
6974 if (need_hscroll && !auto_scrollbar_hit) {
6975 float sb_x = win->x;
6976 float sb_y = win->y + win->h - scrollbar_size;
6977 float sb_w = content_area_w;
6978 /* leave room for resize corner when no vertical scrollbar */
6979 if ((win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZABLE) && !need_vscroll) sb_w -= scrollbar_size;
6980 if (_point_in_rect(mx, my, sb_x, sb_y, sb_w, scrollbar_size)) {
6981 win->state |= N_GUI_WIN_HSCROLL_DRAG;
6982 auto_scrollbar_hit = 1;
6983 win->scroll_x = _scrollbar_calc_scroll(mx, sb_x, sb_w, content_area_w, win->content_w, ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min);
6984 }
6985 }
6986 }
6987
6988 /* check resize handle (bottom-right corner, 14x14 px) - skip if auto-scrollbar was hit or maximised */
6989 if (!auto_scrollbar_hit && (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZABLE) && !(win->state & (N_GUI_WIN_MINIMISED | N_GUI_WIN_MAXIMISED))) {
6990 float grip = ctx->style.grip_size + 2.0f;
6991 float rx = win->x + win->w - grip;
6992 float ry = win->y + win->h - grip;
6993 /* when auto-scrollbars are visible, restrict resize to the corner square only */
6994 int in_resize_area = 0;
6995 if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_AUTO_SCROLLBAR) {
6996 float scrollbar_size = ctx->style.scrollbar_size;
6997 float body_h = win->h - _win_tbh(win);
6998 int need_vscroll = 0, need_hscroll = 0;
6999 _window_update_content_size(win, ctx->default_font);
7000 if (win->content_h > body_h) need_vscroll = 1;
7001 if (win->content_w > win->w) need_hscroll = 1;
7002 if (need_vscroll && win->content_w > (win->w - scrollbar_size)) need_hscroll = 1;
7003 if (need_hscroll && win->content_h > (body_h - scrollbar_size)) need_vscroll = 1;
7004 if (need_vscroll || need_hscroll) {
7005 /* resize corner is only the small square at bottom-right where scrollbars don't reach */
7006 float corner_x = win->x + win->w - scrollbar_size;
7007 float corner_y = win->y + win->h - scrollbar_size;
7008 in_resize_area = just_pressed && _point_in_rect(mx, my, corner_x, corner_y, scrollbar_size, scrollbar_size);
7009 } else {
7010 in_resize_area = just_pressed && _point_in_rect(mx, my, rx, ry, grip, grip);
7011 }
7012 } else {
7013 in_resize_area = just_pressed && _point_in_rect(mx, my, rx, ry, grip, grip);
7014 }
7015 if (in_resize_area) {
7016 win->state |= N_GUI_WIN_RESIZING;
7017 win->drag_ox = win->w - (mx - win->x);
7018 win->drag_oy = win->h - (my - win->y);
7019 }
7020 }
7021
7022 /* title bar: buttons / drag */
7023 if (!(win->state & (N_GUI_WIN_RESIZING | N_GUI_WIN_VSCROLL_DRAG | N_GUI_WIN_HSCROLL_DRAG)) &&
7024 _point_in_rect(mx, my, win->x, win->y, win->w, _win_tbh(win))) {
7025 /* check titlebar buttons first */
7026 int tb_btn_hit = N_GUI_TB_BTN_NONE;
7027 float tbx, tby, tbw, tbhh;
7028 if (_tb_button_rect(win, &ctx->style, N_GUI_TB_BTN_CLOSE, &tbx, &tby, &tbw, &tbhh) &&
7029 _point_in_rect(mx, my, tbx, tby, tbw, tbhh)) {
7030 tb_btn_hit = N_GUI_TB_BTN_CLOSE;
7031 } else if (_tb_button_rect(win, &ctx->style, N_GUI_TB_BTN_MAXIMIZE, &tbx, &tby, &tbw, &tbhh) &&
7032 _point_in_rect(mx, my, tbx, tby, tbw, tbhh)) {
7033 tb_btn_hit = N_GUI_TB_BTN_MAXIMIZE;
7034 } else if (_tb_button_rect(win, &ctx->style, N_GUI_TB_BTN_MINIMIZE, &tbx, &tby, &tbw, &tbhh) &&
7035 _point_in_rect(mx, my, tbx, tby, tbw, tbhh)) {
7036 tb_btn_hit = N_GUI_TB_BTN_MINIMIZE;
7037 }
7038
7039 /* hover tracking */
7040 win->tb_buttons.hovered = tb_btn_hit;
7041
7042 if (just_pressed && tb_btn_hit != N_GUI_TB_BTN_NONE) {
7043 /* button press, do NOT start drag */
7044 win->tb_buttons.pressed = tb_btn_hit;
7045 } else if (just_pressed && !(win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_FIXED_POSITION) && !(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_MAXIMISED)) {
7046 /* start drag */
7047 win->state |= N_GUI_WIN_DRAGGING;
7048 win->drag_ox = mx - win->x;
7049 win->drag_oy = my - win->y;
7050 }
7051
7052 /* release handling for titlebar buttons */
7053 if (just_released && win->tb_buttons.pressed != N_GUI_TB_BTN_NONE) {
7054 int btn = win->tb_buttons.pressed;
7055 win->tb_buttons.pressed = N_GUI_TB_BTN_NONE;
7056 if (_tb_button_rect(win, &ctx->style, btn, &tbx, &tby, &tbw, &tbhh) &&
7057 _point_in_rect(mx, my, tbx, tby, tbw, tbhh)) {
7058 _tb_button_action(ctx, win, btn);
7059 }
7060 }
7061 } else if (!(win->state & (N_GUI_WIN_MINIMISED | N_GUI_WIN_RESIZING | N_GUI_WIN_VSCROLL_DRAG | N_GUI_WIN_HSCROLL_DRAG))) {
7062 /* widget area (account for scroll offsets) */
7063 float content_x = win->x - win->scroll_x;
7064 float content_y = win->y + _win_tbh(win) - win->scroll_y;
7065
7066 list_foreach(wgn, win->widgets) {
7067 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = (N_GUI_WIDGET*)wgn->ptr;
7068 if (!wgt || !wgt->visible || !wgt->enabled) continue;
7069 float ax = content_x + wgt->x;
7070 float ay = content_y + wgt->y;
7071
7072 if (_point_in_rect(mx, my, ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h)) {
7073 wgt->state |= N_GUI_STATE_HOVER;
7074
7075 /* listbox: translate mouse-Y into the row
7076 index under the cursor so the draw path
7077 can paint a hover highlight. */
7078 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX && wgt->data) {
7079 N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* ld =
7080 (N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)wgt->data;
7081 float ih = ld->item_height > 0.0f
7082 ? ld->item_height
7083 : 20.0f;
7084 int row_in_view = (int)((my - ay) / ih);
7085 int row = row_in_view + ld->scroll_offset;
7086 if (row >= 0 && (size_t)row < ld->nb_items) {
7087 ld->hover_row = row;
7088 } else {
7089 ld->hover_row = -1;
7090 }
7091 }
7092
7093 if (just_pressed) {
7094 wgt->state |= N_GUI_STATE_ACTIVE;
7095
7096 /* set focus on any interactive widget type */
7097 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SLIDER ||
7098 wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_CHECKBOX ||
7099 wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX ||
7100 wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_RADIOLIST ||
7101 wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_COMBOBOX ||
7102 wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SCROLLBAR ||
7103 wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_DROPMENU ||
7104 wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA) {
7105 wgt->state |= N_GUI_STATE_FOCUSED;
7106 ctx->focused_widget_id = wgt->id;
7107 }
7108
7109 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_BUTTON) {
7110 /* click callback on release */
7111 }
7112 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_CHECKBOX) {
7113 N_GUI_CHECKBOX_DATA* ckd = (N_GUI_CHECKBOX_DATA*)wgt->data;
7114 ckd->checked = !ckd->checked;
7115 if (ckd->on_toggle) ckd->on_toggle(wgt->id, ckd->checked, ckd->user_data);
7116 }
7117 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SLIDER) {
7118 _slider_update_from_mouse(wgt, mx, my, content_x, content_y);
7119 }
7120 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SCROLLBAR) {
7121 _scrollbar_update_from_mouse(wgt, mx, my, content_x, content_y, &ctx->style);
7122 }
7123 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA) {
7124 /* clear any label selection when clicking a textarea */
7125 if (ctx->selected_label_id >= 0) {
7126 N_GUI_WIDGET* prev = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->selected_label_id);
7127 if (prev && prev->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LABEL && prev->data) {
7128 N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* plb = (N_GUI_LABEL_DATA*)prev->data;
7129 plb->sel_start = -1;
7130 plb->sel_end = -1;
7131 plb->sel_dragging = 0;
7132 }
7133 ctx->selected_label_id = -1;
7134 }
7135 N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* click_td = (N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA*)wgt->data;
7136 click_td->cursor_time = al_get_time();
7137 ALLEGRO_FONT* tf = wgt->font ? wgt->font : ctx->default_font;
7138 if (tf) {
7139 /* check if click is on the scrollbar area */
7140 float text_pad = ctx->style.textarea_padding;
7141 if (click_td->multiline) {
7142 float ta_view_h = wgt->h - text_pad * 2;
7143 float ta_content_h = _textarea_content_height(click_td, tf, wgt->w, text_pad);
7144 int ta_need_sb = (ta_content_h > ta_view_h) ? 1 : 0;
7145 float ta_sb_w = ta_need_sb ? ctx->style.scrollbar_size : 0;
7146 if (ta_need_sb && mx > ax + wgt->w - ta_sb_w) {
7147 /* scrollbar track click: jump + start drag */
7148 float ta_text_w = wgt->w - ta_sb_w;
7149 ta_content_h = _textarea_content_height(click_td, tf, ta_text_w, text_pad);
7150 click_td->scroll_y = (int)_scrollbar_calc_scroll(
7151 my, ay + text_pad, ta_view_h,
7152 ta_view_h, ta_content_h,
7153 ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min);
7154 ctx->scrollbar_drag_widget_id = wgt->id;
7155 goto textarea_click_done;
7156 }
7157 }
7158 size_t pos = _textarea_pos_from_mouse(click_td, tf, mx, my,
7159 ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h,
7160 text_pad, ctx->style.scrollbar_size);
7161 click_td->cursor_pos = pos;
7162 click_td->sel_start = pos;
7163 click_td->sel_end = pos;
7164 }
7165 textarea_click_done:;
7166 }
7167 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LABEL) {
7168 N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* click_lb = (N_GUI_LABEL_DATA*)wgt->data;
7169 if (click_lb) {
7170 /* clear previous label selection */
7171 if (ctx->selected_label_id >= 0 && ctx->selected_label_id != wgt->id) {
7172 N_GUI_WIDGET* prev = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->selected_label_id);
7173 if (prev && prev->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LABEL && prev->data) {
7174 N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* plb = (N_GUI_LABEL_DATA*)prev->data;
7175 plb->sel_start = -1;
7176 plb->sel_end = -1;
7177 plb->sel_dragging = 0;
7178 }
7179 }
7180 ALLEGRO_FONT* lf = wgt->font ? wgt->font : ctx->default_font;
7181 if (lf) {
7182 int char_pos;
7183 if (click_lb->align == N_GUI_ALIGN_JUSTIFIED) {
7184 float lpad = ctx->style.label_padding;
7185 float effective_w = wgt->w;
7186 float lww = 0;
7187 if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_AUTO_SCROLLBAR)
7188 lww = win->content_w + ctx->style.title_max_w_reserve + lpad;
7189 else if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZABLE)
7190 lww = win->w;
7191 if (lww > 0) {
7192 float mfw = lww - wgt->x;
7193 if (mfw > effective_w) effective_w = mfw;
7194 }
7195 float max_text_w = effective_w - lpad * 2;
7196 float content_h = _label_content_height(click_lb->text, lf, max_text_w);
7197 float view_h = wgt->h - lpad;
7198 float sb_sz = (content_h > view_h) ? ctx->style.scrollbar_size : 0;
7199 float tw2 = max_text_w - sb_sz;
7200 char_pos = _justified_char_at_pos(click_lb->text, lf, tw2,
7201 ax + lpad, ay + lpad / 2.0f, click_lb->scroll_y, mx, my);
7202 } else {
7203 float lww = 0;
7204 if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_AUTO_SCROLLBAR)
7205 lww = win->content_w + ctx->style.title_max_w_reserve + ctx->style.label_padding;
7206 else if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZABLE)
7207 lww = win->w;
7208 float text_ox = _label_text_origin_x(click_lb, lf, ax, wgt->w, lww, wgt->x, ctx->style.label_padding);
7209 float click_x = mx - text_ox;
7210 char_pos = _label_char_at_x(click_lb, lf, click_x);
7211 }
7212 if (char_pos >= 0) {
7213 click_lb->sel_start = char_pos;
7214 click_lb->sel_end = char_pos;
7215 click_lb->sel_dragging = 1;
7216 ctx->selected_label_id = wgt->id;
7217 }
7218 }
7219 }
7220 }
7221 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_COMBOBOX) {
7222 N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA* cbd = (N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA*)wgt->data;
7223 cbd->is_open = !cbd->is_open;
7224 if (cbd->is_open) {
7225 ctx->open_combobox_id = wgt->id;
7226 /* auto-scroll to center the selected item in the visible area */
7227 if (cbd->selected_index >= 0 && cbd->nb_items > (size_t)cbd->max_visible) {
7228 int target = cbd->selected_index - cbd->max_visible / 2;
7229 if (target < 0) target = 0;
7230 int max_off = (int)cbd->nb_items - cbd->max_visible;
7231 if (target > max_off) target = max_off;
7232 cbd->scroll_offset = target;
7233 } else {
7234 cbd->scroll_offset = 0;
7235 }
7236 } else {
7237 ctx->open_combobox_id = -1;
7238 }
7239 }
7240 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX) {
7241 N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* lbd = (N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)wgt->data;
7242 ALLEGRO_FONT* lf = wgt->font ? wgt->font : ctx->default_font;
7243 float lfh = lf ? (float)al_get_font_line_height(lf) : 16.0f;
7244 float lih = lbd->item_height > lfh ? lbd->item_height : lfh + ctx->style.item_height_pad;
7245 int lb_visible = (int)(wgt->h / lih);
7246 int lb_need_sb = ((int)lbd->nb_items > lb_visible) ? 1 : 0;
7247 float lb_sb_w = lb_need_sb ? ctx->style.scrollbar_size : 0;
7248 /* clamp scroll_offset */
7249 int lb_max_off = (int)lbd->nb_items - lb_visible;
7250 if (lb_max_off < 0) lb_max_off = 0;
7251 if (lbd->scroll_offset > lb_max_off) lbd->scroll_offset = lb_max_off;
7252 if (lbd->scroll_offset < 0) lbd->scroll_offset = 0;
7253 /* skip click if on the scrollbar area */
7254 if (lb_need_sb && mx > ax + wgt->w - lb_sb_w) {
7255 /* scrollbar track click: jump scroll position + start drag */
7256 lbd->scroll_offset = _scrollbar_calc_scroll_int(my, ay, wgt->h, lb_visible, (int)lbd->nb_items, ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min);
7257 ctx->scrollbar_drag_widget_id = wgt->id;
7258 } else {
7259 int clicked_idx = lbd->scroll_offset + (int)((my - ay) / lih);
7260 if (clicked_idx >= 0 && (size_t)clicked_idx < lbd->nb_items) {
7261 if (lbd->selection_mode == N_GUI_SELECT_SINGLE) {
7262 for (size_t si = 0; si < lbd->nb_items; si++) lbd->items[si].selected = 0;
7263 lbd->items[clicked_idx].selected = 1;
7264 if (lbd->on_select) lbd->on_select(wgt->id, clicked_idx, 1, lbd->user_data);
7265 } else if (lbd->selection_mode == N_GUI_SELECT_MULTIPLE) {
7266 lbd->items[clicked_idx].selected = !lbd->items[clicked_idx].selected;
7267 if (lbd->on_select) lbd->on_select(wgt->id, clicked_idx, lbd->items[clicked_idx].selected, lbd->user_data);
7268 }
7269 /* N_GUI_SELECT_NONE: no selection change */
7270 }
7271 }
7272 }
7273 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_RADIOLIST) {
7274 N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA* rld = (N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA*)wgt->data;
7275 ALLEGRO_FONT* rf = wgt->font ? wgt->font : ctx->default_font;
7276 float rfh = rf ? (float)al_get_font_line_height(rf) : 16.0f;
7277 float rih = rld->item_height > rfh ? rld->item_height : rfh + ctx->style.item_height_pad;
7278 int rl_visible = (int)(wgt->h / rih);
7279 int rl_need_sb = ((int)rld->nb_items > rl_visible) ? 1 : 0;
7280 float rl_sb_w = rl_need_sb ? ctx->style.scrollbar_size : 0;
7281 /* clamp scroll_offset */
7282 int rl_max_off = (int)rld->nb_items - rl_visible;
7283 if (rl_max_off < 0) rl_max_off = 0;
7284 if (rld->scroll_offset > rl_max_off) rld->scroll_offset = rl_max_off;
7285 if (rld->scroll_offset < 0) rld->scroll_offset = 0;
7286 /* skip click if on the scrollbar area */
7287 if (rl_need_sb && mx > ax + wgt->w - rl_sb_w) {
7288 /* scrollbar track click: jump scroll position + start drag */
7289 rld->scroll_offset = _scrollbar_calc_scroll_int(my, ay, wgt->h, rl_visible, (int)rld->nb_items, ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min);
7290 ctx->scrollbar_drag_widget_id = wgt->id;
7291 } else {
7292 int clicked_idx = rld->scroll_offset + (int)((my - ay) / rih);
7293 if (clicked_idx >= 0 && (size_t)clicked_idx < rld->nb_items) {
7294 rld->selected_index = clicked_idx;
7295 if (rld->on_select) rld->on_select(wgt->id, clicked_idx, rld->user_data);
7296 }
7297 }
7298 }
7299 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LABEL) {
7300 N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* lbl = (N_GUI_LABEL_DATA*)wgt->data;
7301 if (lbl->link[0] && lbl->on_link_click) {
7302 lbl->on_link_click(wgt->id, lbl->link, lbl->user_data);
7303 }
7304 }
7305 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_DROPMENU) {
7306 N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA* dmd = (N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)wgt->data;
7307 dmd->is_open = !dmd->is_open;
7308 if (dmd->is_open) {
7309 /* close any other open dropdown/combobox first */
7310 if (ctx->open_combobox_id >= 0) {
7311 N_GUI_WIDGET* old_cb = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->open_combobox_id);
7312 if (old_cb && old_cb->data) ((N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA*)old_cb->data)->is_open = 0;
7313 ctx->open_combobox_id = -1;
7314 }
7315 if (ctx->open_dropmenu_id >= 0 && ctx->open_dropmenu_id != wgt->id) {
7316 N_GUI_WIDGET* old_dm = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->open_dropmenu_id);
7317 if (old_dm && old_dm->data) ((N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)old_dm->data)->is_open = 0;
7318 }
7319 ctx->open_dropmenu_id = wgt->id;
7320 /* call on_open callback to rebuild dynamic entries */
7321 if (dmd->on_open) {
7322 dmd->on_open(wgt->id, dmd->on_open_user_data);
7323 }
7324 } else {
7325 ctx->open_dropmenu_id = -1;
7326 }
7327 }
7328 }
7329 break; /* only top widget gets the event */
7330 }
7331 }
7332
7333 /* frameless windows: drag from empty body area */
7334 if ((win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_FRAMELESS) && just_pressed &&
7335 !(win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_FIXED_POSITION) &&
7336 !(win->state & (N_GUI_WIN_DRAGGING | N_GUI_WIN_MAXIMISED))) {
7337 win->state |= N_GUI_WIN_DRAGGING;
7338 win->drag_ox = mx - win->x;
7339 win->drag_oy = my - win->y;
7340 }
7341 }
7342
7343 } /* end if (!captured_wnode) */
7344
7345 /* clear titlebar button press if released outside the button */
7346 if (just_released && win->tb_buttons.pressed != N_GUI_TB_BTN_NONE) {
7347 win->tb_buttons.pressed = N_GUI_TB_BTN_NONE;
7348 }
7349
7350 /* window dragging */
7351 if ((win->state & N_GUI_WIN_DRAGGING) && ctx->mouse_b1 && !(win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_FIXED_POSITION)) {
7352 win->x = mx - win->drag_ox;
7353 win->y = my - win->drag_oy;
7354 }
7355 if (just_released && (win->state & N_GUI_WIN_DRAGGING) && !(win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_FIXED_POSITION)) {
7356 win->state &= ~N_GUI_WIN_DRAGGING;
7357 if (ctx->resize_mode == N_GUI_RESIZE_ADAPTIVE) {
7358 _n_gui_window_capture_normalized(ctx, win);
7359 }
7360 }
7361
7362 /* window resizing */
7363 if ((win->state & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZING) && ctx->mouse_b1) {
7364 float new_w = (mx - win->x) + win->drag_ox;
7365 float new_h = (my - win->y) + win->drag_oy;
7366 if (new_w < win->min_w) new_w = win->min_w;
7367 if (new_h < win->min_h) new_h = win->min_h;
7368 win->w = new_w;
7369 win->h = new_h;
7370 }
7371 if (just_released && (win->state & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZING)) {
7372 win->state &= ~N_GUI_WIN_RESIZING;
7373 if (ctx->resize_mode == N_GUI_RESIZE_ADAPTIVE) {
7374 _n_gui_window_capture_normalized(ctx, win);
7375 }
7376 }
7377
7378 /* auto-scrollbar dragging */
7379 if ((win->state & (N_GUI_WIN_VSCROLL_DRAG | N_GUI_WIN_HSCROLL_DRAG)) && ctx->mouse_b1) {
