7380 float scrollbar_size = ctx->style.scrollbar_size;
7381 float body_h = win->h - _win_tbh(win);
7382 float body_y = win->y + _win_tbh(win);
7383 int need_vscroll = 0, need_hscroll = 0;
7384 _window_update_content_size(win, ctx->default_font);
7385 if (win->content_h > body_h) need_vscroll = 1;
7386 if (win->content_w > win->w) need_hscroll = 1;
7387 if (need_vscroll && win->content_w > (win->w - scrollbar_size)) need_hscroll = 1;
7388 if (need_hscroll && win->content_h > (body_h - scrollbar_size)) need_vscroll = 1;
7389 float content_area_w = win->w - (need_vscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
7390 float content_area_h = body_h - (need_hscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
7391
7392 if (win->state & N_GUI_WIN_VSCROLL_DRAG) {
7393 float sb_y = body_y;
7394 float sb_h = content_area_h;
7395 if ((win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZABLE) && !need_hscroll) sb_h -= scrollbar_size;
7396 win->scroll_y = _scrollbar_calc_scroll(my, sb_y, sb_h, content_area_h, win->content_h, ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min);
7397 }
7398 if (win->state & N_GUI_WIN_HSCROLL_DRAG) {
7399 float sb_x = win->x;
7400 float sb_w = content_area_w;
7401 if ((win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZABLE) && !need_vscroll) sb_w -= scrollbar_size;
7402 win->scroll_x = _scrollbar_calc_scroll(mx, sb_x, sb_w, content_area_w, win->content_w, ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min);
7403 }
7404 }
7405 if (just_released && (win->state & (N_GUI_WIN_VSCROLL_DRAG | N_GUI_WIN_HSCROLL_DRAG))) {
7406 win->state &= ~(N_GUI_WIN_VSCROLL_DRAG | N_GUI_WIN_HSCROLL_DRAG);
7407 }
7408 } else {
7409 /* clicked outside all windows */
7410 if (just_pressed) {
7411 if (ctx->focused_widget_id != -1) {
7412 N_GUI_WIDGET* fw = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->focused_widget_id);
7413 if (fw) fw->state &= ~N_GUI_STATE_FOCUSED;
7414 ctx->focused_widget_id = -1;
7415 }
7416 }
7417 }
7418
7419 /* handle active slider/scrollbar drag even outside widget bounds */
7420 if (ctx->mouse_b1 && event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_MOUSE_AXES) {
7421 list_foreach(wnode, ctx->windows) {
7422 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
7423 if (!(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN)) continue;
7424 float content_x = win->x - win->scroll_x;
7425 float content_y = win->y + _win_tbh(win) - win->scroll_y;
7426 list_foreach(wgn, win->widgets) {
7427 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = (N_GUI_WIDGET*)wgn->ptr;
7428 if (!wgt) continue;
7429 if (wgt->state & N_GUI_STATE_ACTIVE) {
7430 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SLIDER) {
7431 _slider_update_from_mouse(wgt, mx, my, content_x, content_y);
7432 }
7433 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SCROLLBAR) {
7434 _scrollbar_update_from_mouse(wgt, mx, my, content_x, content_y, &ctx->style);
7435 }
7436 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LABEL) {
7437 N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* drag_lb = (N_GUI_LABEL_DATA*)wgt->data;
7438 if (drag_lb && drag_lb->sel_dragging) {
7439 ALLEGRO_FONT* lf = wgt->font ? wgt->font : ctx->default_font;
7440 if (lf) {
7441 float lax = content_x + wgt->x;
7442 float lay = content_y + wgt->y;
7443 int char_pos;
7444 if (drag_lb->align == N_GUI_ALIGN_JUSTIFIED) {
7445 float lpad = ctx->style.label_padding;
7446 float effective_w = wgt->w;
7447 float lww = 0;
7448 if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_AUTO_SCROLLBAR)
7449 lww = win->content_w + ctx->style.title_max_w_reserve + lpad;
7450 else if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZABLE)
7451 lww = win->w;
7452 if (lww > 0) {
7453 float mfw = lww - wgt->x;
7454 if (mfw > effective_w) effective_w = mfw;
7455 }
7456 float max_text_w = effective_w - lpad * 2;
7457 float content_h2 = _label_content_height(drag_lb->text, lf, max_text_w);
7458 float view_h = wgt->h - lpad;
7459 float sb_sz = (content_h2 > view_h) ? ctx->style.scrollbar_size : 0;
7460 float tw2 = max_text_w - sb_sz;
7461 char_pos = _justified_char_at_pos(drag_lb->text, lf, tw2,
7462 lax + lpad, lay + lpad / 2.0f, drag_lb->scroll_y, mx, my);
7463 } else {
7464 float lww = 0;
7465 if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_AUTO_SCROLLBAR)
7466 lww = win->content_w + ctx->style.title_max_w_reserve + ctx->style.label_padding;
7467 else if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZABLE)
7468 lww = win->w;
7469 float text_ox = _label_text_origin_x(drag_lb, lf, lax, wgt->w, lww, wgt->x, ctx->style.label_padding);
7470 float click_x = mx - text_ox;
7471 char_pos = _label_char_at_x(drag_lb, lf, click_x);
7472 }
7473 if (char_pos >= 0) {
7474 drag_lb->sel_end = char_pos;
7475 }
7476 }
7477 }
7478 }
7479 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA) {
7480 N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* drag_td = (N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA*)wgt->data;
7481 ALLEGRO_FONT* tf = wgt->font ? wgt->font : ctx->default_font;
7482 if (tf && drag_td) {
7483 float ta_ax = content_x + wgt->x;
7484 float ta_ay = content_y + wgt->y;
7485 float text_pad = ctx->style.textarea_padding;
7486 size_t pos = _textarea_pos_from_mouse(drag_td, tf, mx, my,
7487 ta_ax, ta_ay, wgt->w, wgt->h,
7488 text_pad, ctx->style.scrollbar_size);
7489 drag_td->cursor_pos = pos;
7490 drag_td->sel_end = pos;
7491 drag_td->cursor_time = al_get_time();
7492 }
7493 }
7494 }
7495 }
7496 }
7497 }
7498
7499 /* release active state on mouse up */
7500 if (just_released) {
7501 list_foreach(wnode, ctx->windows) {
7502 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
7503 list_foreach(wgn, win->widgets) {
7504 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = (N_GUI_WIDGET*)wgn->ptr;
7505 if (!wgt) continue;
7506 if (wgt->state & N_GUI_STATE_ACTIVE) {
7507 /* fire button callback on release if still hovering */
7508 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_BUTTON) {
7509 float content_x = win->x - win->scroll_x;
7510 float content_y = win->y + _win_tbh(win) - win->scroll_y;
7511 float ax = content_x + wgt->x;
7512 float ay = content_y + wgt->y;
7513 if (_point_in_rect(mx, my, ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h)) {
7514 N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA* bd = (N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA*)wgt->data;
7515 /* Toggle mode: flip toggled state on each click */
7516 if (bd->toggle_mode) {
7517 bd->toggled = !bd->toggled;
7518 }
7519 if (bd->on_click) bd->on_click(wgt->id, bd->user_data);
7520 }
7521 }
7522 /* stop label drag selection on release */
7523 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LABEL) {
7524 N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* rel_lb = (N_GUI_LABEL_DATA*)wgt->data;
7525 if (rel_lb) rel_lb->sel_dragging = 0;
7526 }
7527 wgt->state &= ~N_GUI_STATE_ACTIVE;
7528 }
7529 }
7530 }
7531 }
7532 }
7533
7534 /* Tab / Shift+Tab: focus navigation across widgets in the active window.
7535 * Ctrl+Tab in a textarea inserts a literal tab, handled below by the textarea key handler. */
7536 if (!event_consumed && event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_KEY_CHAR && event.keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_TAB) {
7537 int ctrl = (event.keyboard.modifiers & ALLEGRO_KEYMOD_CTRL) ? 1 : 0;
7538 int shift = (event.keyboard.modifiers & ALLEGRO_KEYMOD_SHIFT) ? 1 : 0;
7539
7540 /* Ctrl+Tab in a focused textarea inserts a tab character, skip navigation */
7541 int is_ctrl_tab_in_textarea = 0;
7542 if (ctrl && ctx->focused_widget_id >= 0) {
7543 const N_GUI_WIDGET* fw = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->focused_widget_id);
7544 if (fw && fw->type == N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA && (fw->state & N_GUI_STATE_FOCUSED))
7545 is_ctrl_tab_in_textarea = 1;
7546 }
7547
7548 if (!is_ctrl_tab_in_textarea) {
7549 /* find the window that contains the focused widget (or the topmost window) */
7550 N_GUI_WINDOW* tab_win = NULL;
7551 if (ctx->focused_widget_id >= 0) {
7552 tab_win = _find_focused_window(ctx);
7553 }
7554 if (!tab_win && ctx->windows && ctx->windows->end) {
7555 /* no focus yet, use topmost open window */
7556 for (LIST_NODE* wn = ctx->windows->end; wn; wn = wn->prev) {
7557 N_GUI_WINDOW* w = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wn->ptr;
7558 if (w && (w->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN) && !(w->state & N_GUI_WIN_MINIMISED)) {
7559 tab_win = w;
7560 break;
7561 }
7562 }
7563 }
7564
7565 if (tab_win && tab_win->widgets && tab_win->widgets->nb_items > 0) {
7566 /* build an ordered list of focusable widget ids */
7567 int focusable_ids[512];
7568 int nfocusable = 0;
7569 list_foreach(wgn, tab_win->widgets) {
7570 const N_GUI_WIDGET* w = (N_GUI_WIDGET*)wgn->ptr;
7571 if (w && w->visible && w->enabled && _is_focusable_type(w->type) && nfocusable < 512) {
7572 focusable_ids[nfocusable++] = w->id;
7573 }
7574 }
7575 if (nfocusable > 0) {
7576 /* find current position */
7577 int cur_idx = -1;
7578 for (int i = 0; i < nfocusable; i++) {
7579 if (focusable_ids[i] == ctx->focused_widget_id) {
7580 cur_idx = i;
7581 break;
7582 }
7583 }
7584 int next_idx;
7585 if (shift) {
7586 next_idx = (cur_idx <= 0) ? nfocusable - 1 : cur_idx - 1;
7587 } else {
7588 next_idx = (cur_idx < 0 || cur_idx >= nfocusable - 1) ? 0 : cur_idx + 1;
7589 }
7590 n_gui_set_focus(ctx, focusable_ids[next_idx]);
7591 }
7592 }
7593 event_consumed = 1;
7594 }
7595 }
7596
7597 /* keyboard events -> focused textarea */
7598 if (!event_consumed && event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_KEY_CHAR && ctx->focused_widget_id != -1) {
7599 N_GUI_WIDGET* fw = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->focused_widget_id);
7600 if (fw && fw->type == N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA && (fw->state & N_GUI_STATE_FOCUSED)) {
7601 ALLEGRO_FONT* ta_font = fw->font ? fw->font : ctx->default_font;
7602 float ta_pad = ctx->style.textarea_padding;
7603 float ta_sb = ctx->style.scrollbar_size;
7604 if (_textarea_handle_key(fw, &event, ta_font, ta_pad, ta_sb, ctx)) {
7605 event_consumed = 1;
7606 }
7607 }
7608 }
7609
7610 /* keyboard events -> focused non-textarea widgets (slider, listbox, radiolist, combobox, scrollbar, checkbox) */
7611 if (!event_consumed && event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_KEY_CHAR && ctx->focused_widget_id >= 0) {
7612 N_GUI_WIDGET* fw = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->focused_widget_id);
7613 if (fw && fw->visible && fw->enabled && (fw->state & N_GUI_STATE_FOCUSED) && fw->data) {
7614 int kc = event.keyboard.keycode;
7615
7616 /* slider keyboard */
7617 if (fw->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SLIDER) {
7618 N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA* sd = (N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA*)fw->data;
7619 double step = sd->step > 0.0 ? sd->step : (sd->max_val - sd->min_val) / 20.0;
7620 if (step <= 0) step = 1.0;
7621 double new_val = sd->value;
7622 int handled = 0;
7623
7624 if (sd->orientation == N_GUI_SLIDER_H) {
7625 if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_RIGHT) {
7626 new_val += step;
7627 handled = 1;
7628 } else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_LEFT) {
7629 new_val -= step;
7630 handled = 1;
7631 }
7632 } else {
7633 if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_UP) {
7634 new_val += step;
7635 handled = 1;
7636 } else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_DOWN) {
7637 new_val -= step;
7638 handled = 1;
7639 }
7640 }
7641 if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_HOME) {
7642 new_val = sd->min_val;
7643 handled = 1;
7644 } else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_END) {
7645 new_val = sd->max_val;
7646 handled = 1;
7647 }
7648
7649 if (handled) {
7650 if (sd->step > 0.0)
7651 new_val = _slider_snap_value(new_val, sd->min_val, sd->max_val, sd->step);
7652 else
7653 new_val = _clamp(new_val, sd->min_val, sd->max_val);
7654 if (new_val != sd->value) {
7655 sd->value = new_val;
7656 if (sd->on_change) sd->on_change(fw->id, sd->value, sd->user_data);
7657 }
7658 event_consumed = 1;
7659 }
7660 }
7661
7662 /* listbox keyboard */
7663 if (fw->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX) {
7664 N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* ld = (N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)fw->data;
7665 if (ld->selection_mode != N_GUI_SELECT_NONE && ld->nb_items > 0) {
7666 int handled = 0;
7667 /* find first selected item for single-select navigation */
7668 int cur_sel = -1;
7669 if (ld->selection_mode == N_GUI_SELECT_SINGLE) {
7670 for (size_t i = 0; i < ld->nb_items; i++) {
7671 if (ld->items[i].selected) {
7672 cur_sel = (int)i;
7673 break;
7674 }
7675 }
7676 }
7677 int new_sel = cur_sel;
7678 if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_UP && cur_sel > 0) {
7679 new_sel = cur_sel - 1;
7680 handled = 1;
7681 } else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_DOWN && cur_sel < (int)ld->nb_items - 1) {
7682 new_sel = cur_sel + 1;
7683 handled = 1;
7684 } else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_DOWN && cur_sel < 0) {
7685 new_sel = 0;
7686 handled = 1;
7687 } else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_HOME) {
7688 new_sel = 0;
7689 handled = 1;
7690 } else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_END) {
7691 new_sel = (int)ld->nb_items - 1;
7692 handled = 1;
7693 }
7694
7695 if (handled && ld->selection_mode == N_GUI_SELECT_SINGLE && new_sel != cur_sel) {
7696 for (size_t i = 0; i < ld->nb_items; i++) ld->items[i].selected = 0;
7697 ld->items[new_sel].selected = 1;
7698 if (ld->on_select) ld->on_select(fw->id, new_sel, 1, ld->user_data);
7699 /* auto-scroll to keep selection visible */
7700 ALLEGRO_FONT* lf = fw->font ? fw->font : ctx->default_font;
7701 float lfh = lf ? (float)al_get_font_line_height(lf) : 16.0f;
7702 float lih = ld->item_height > lfh ? ld->item_height : lfh + ctx->style.item_height_pad;
7703 int visible = (int)(fw->h / lih);
7704 if (new_sel < ld->scroll_offset) ld->scroll_offset = new_sel;
7705 if (new_sel >= ld->scroll_offset + visible) ld->scroll_offset = new_sel - visible + 1;
7706 event_consumed = 1;
7707 }
7708 }
7709 }
7710
7711 /* radiolist keyboard */
7712 if (fw->type == N_GUI_TYPE_RADIOLIST) {
7713 N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA* rd = (N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA*)fw->data;
7714 if (rd->nb_items > 0) {
7715 int cur_sel = rd->selected_index;
7716 int new_sel = cur_sel;
7717 int handled = 0;
7718 if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_UP && cur_sel > 0) {
7719 new_sel = cur_sel - 1;
7720 handled = 1;
7721 } else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_DOWN && cur_sel < (int)rd->nb_items - 1) {
7722 new_sel = cur_sel + 1;
7723 handled = 1;
7724 } else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_DOWN && cur_sel < 0) {
7725 new_sel = 0;
7726 handled = 1;
7727 } else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_HOME) {
7728 new_sel = 0;
7729 handled = 1;
7730 } else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_END) {
7731 new_sel = (int)rd->nb_items - 1;
7732 handled = 1;
7733 }
7734
7735 if (handled && new_sel != cur_sel) {
7736 rd->selected_index = new_sel;
7737 if (rd->on_select) rd->on_select(fw->id, new_sel, rd->user_data);
7738 /* auto-scroll to keep selection visible */
7739 ALLEGRO_FONT* rf = fw->font ? fw->font : ctx->default_font;
7740 float rfh = rf ? (float)al_get_font_line_height(rf) : 16.0f;
7741 float rih = rd->item_height > rfh ? rd->item_height : rfh + ctx->style.item_height_pad;
7742 int visible = (int)(fw->h / rih);
7743 if (new_sel < rd->scroll_offset) rd->scroll_offset = new_sel;
7744 if (new_sel >= rd->scroll_offset + visible) rd->scroll_offset = new_sel - visible + 1;
7745 event_consumed = 1;
7746 }
7747 }
7748 }
7749
7750 /* combobox keyboard (when closed) */
7751 if (fw->type == N_GUI_TYPE_COMBOBOX) {
7752 N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA* cd = (N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA*)fw->data;
7753 if (!cd->is_open && cd->nb_items > 0) {
7754 int cur_sel = cd->selected_index;
7755 int new_sel = cur_sel;
7756 int handled = 0;
7757 if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_UP && cur_sel > 0) {
7758 new_sel = cur_sel - 1;
7759 handled = 1;
7760 } else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_DOWN && cur_sel < (int)cd->nb_items - 1) {
7761 new_sel = cur_sel + 1;
7762 handled = 1;
7763 } else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_DOWN && cur_sel < 0) {
7764 new_sel = 0;
7765 handled = 1;
7766 } else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_HOME) {
7767 new_sel = 0;
7768 handled = 1;
7769 } else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_END) {
7770 new_sel = (int)cd->nb_items - 1;
7771 handled = 1;
7772 }
7773
7774 if (handled && new_sel != cur_sel) {
7775 cd->selected_index = new_sel;
7776 if (cd->on_select) cd->on_select(fw->id, new_sel, cd->user_data);
7777 event_consumed = 1;
7778 }
7779 }
7780 }
7781
7782 /* scrollbar keyboard */
7783 if (fw->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SCROLLBAR) {
7784 N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_DATA* sb = (N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_DATA*)fw->data;
7785 double max_scroll = sb->content_size - sb->viewport_size;
7786 if (max_scroll > 0) {
7787 double step = max_scroll / 20.0;
7788 if (step <= 0) step = 1.0;
7789 double new_pos = sb->scroll_pos;
7790 int handled = 0;
7791 if (sb->orientation == N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_V) {
7792 if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_UP) {
7793 new_pos -= step;
7794 handled = 1;
7795 } else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_DOWN) {
7796 new_pos += step;
7797 handled = 1;
7798 }
7799 } else {
7800 if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_LEFT) {
7801 new_pos -= step;
7802 handled = 1;
7803 } else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_RIGHT) {
7804 new_pos += step;
7805 handled = 1;
7806 }
7807 }
7808 if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_HOME) {
7809 new_pos = 0;
7810 handled = 1;
7811 } else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_END) {
7812 new_pos = max_scroll;
7813 handled = 1;
7814 }
7815
7816 if (handled) {
7817 if (new_pos < 0) new_pos = 0;
7818 if (new_pos > max_scroll) new_pos = max_scroll;
7819 if (new_pos != sb->scroll_pos) {
7820 sb->scroll_pos = new_pos;
7821 if (sb->on_scroll) sb->on_scroll(fw->id, sb->scroll_pos, sb->user_data);
7822 }
7823 event_consumed = 1;
7824 }
7825 }
7826 }
7827
7828 /* checkbox keyboard (Space/Enter to toggle) */
7829 if (fw->type == N_GUI_TYPE_CHECKBOX) {
7830 if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_SPACE || kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_ENTER) {
7831 N_GUI_CHECKBOX_DATA* cd = (N_GUI_CHECKBOX_DATA*)fw->data;
7832 cd->checked = !cd->checked;
7833 if (cd->on_toggle) cd->on_toggle(fw->id, cd->checked, cd->user_data);
7834 event_consumed = 1;
7835 }
7836 }
7837 }
7838 }
7839
7840 /* Ctrl+C on label selection: copy selected text from the most recently selected label */
7841 if (!event_consumed && event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_KEY_DOWN &&
7842 (event.keyboard.modifiers & ALLEGRO_KEYMOD_CTRL) &&
7843 event.keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_C && ctx->display &&
7844 ctx->selected_label_id >= 0) {
7845 N_GUI_WIDGET* sel_wgt = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->selected_label_id);
7846 if (sel_wgt && sel_wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LABEL && sel_wgt->data) {
7847 N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* lb = (N_GUI_LABEL_DATA*)sel_wgt->data;
7848 if (lb->sel_start >= 0 && lb->sel_end >= 0 && lb->sel_start != lb->sel_end) {
7849 int slo = lb->sel_start < lb->sel_end ? lb->sel_start : lb->sel_end;
7850 int shi = lb->sel_start < lb->sel_end ? lb->sel_end : lb->sel_start;
7851 size_t tlen = strlen(lb->text);
7852 if ((size_t)slo > tlen) slo = (int)tlen;
7853 if ((size_t)shi > tlen) shi = (int)tlen;
7854 int len = shi - slo;
7855 if (len > 0) {
7856 char clip[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
7857 memcpy(clip, &lb->text[slo], (size_t)len);
7858 clip[len] = '\0';
7859 al_set_clipboard_text(ctx->display, clip);
7860 event_consumed = 1;
7861 }
7862 }
7863 }
7864 }
7865
7866 /* keyboard events -> button key bindings.
7867 * Two passes:
7868 * 1. Focused bindings (key_focus_only=1): fire only when the focused widget
7869 * is the button itself or one of the button's key_sources. These are
7870 * checked first and bypass the widget_focused guard so they work even
7871 * when a textarea has focus.
7872 * 2. Global bindings (key_focus_only=0): fire when no interactive widget
7873 * has focus. Exception: ENTER passes through single-line textareas. */
7874 if (event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_KEY_DOWN && !event_consumed) {
7875 int kc = event.keyboard.keycode;
7876 int ev_mods = event.keyboard.modifiers & N_GUI_KEY_MOD_MASK;
7877
7878 /* Pass 1: focused key bindings, check before the widget_focused guard */
7879 for (LIST_NODE* wnode = ctx->windows->end; wnode && !event_consumed; wnode = wnode->prev) {
7880 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
7881 if (!(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN)) {
7882 continue;
7883 }
7884 list_foreach(wgn, win->widgets) {
7885 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = (N_GUI_WIDGET*)wgn->ptr;
7886 if (!wgt || !wgt->visible || !wgt->enabled || wgt->type != N_GUI_TYPE_BUTTON) {
7887 continue;
7888 }
7889 N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA* bd = (N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA*)wgt->data;
7890 if (!bd || !bd->key_focus_only || bd->keycode != kc) {
7891 continue;
7892 }
7893 if (bd->key_modifiers != 0 && ev_mods != bd->key_modifiers) {
7894 continue;
7895 }
7896 /* check if focused widget is this button or a listed source */
7897 int focus_match = (ctx->focused_widget_id == wgt->id);
7898 if (!focus_match) {
7899 for (int i = 0; i < N_GUI_KEY_SOURCES_MAX && bd->key_sources[i] >= 0; i++) {
7900 if (ctx->focused_widget_id == bd->key_sources[i]) {
7901 focus_match = 1;
7902 break;
7903 }
7904 }
7905 }
7906 if (!focus_match) {
7907 continue;
7908 }
7909 if (bd->toggle_mode) {
7910 bd->toggled = !bd->toggled;
7911 }
7912 /* keybind-triggered press: flash the active visual briefly so the
7913 * user sees the button react just like on a mouse click. */
7914 bd->key_press_until = al_get_time() + N_GUI_KEY_PRESS_FLASH_SEC;
7915 if (bd->on_click) {
7916 bd->on_click(wgt->id, bd->user_data);
7917 }
7918 event_consumed = 1;
7919 break;
7920 }
7921 if (event_consumed) {
7922 /* the on_click callback may have mutated ctx->windows,
7923 * n_gui_add_window's z-order re-sort rebuilds the list and
7924 * frees every node, so wnode must not be stepped by the
7925 * for-increment. Exit the window loop without touching it. */
7926 break;
7927 }
7928 }
7929
7930 /* Pass 2: global key bindings, skip when an interactive widget has focus.
7931 * Exception: for single-line textareas, ENTER passes through. */
7932 if (!event_consumed) {
7933 int widget_focused = 0;
7934 if (ctx->focused_widget_id >= 0) {
7935 N_GUI_WIDGET* fw = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->focused_widget_id);
7936 if (fw && (fw->state & N_GUI_STATE_FOCUSED)) {
7937 if (fw->type == N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA) {
7938 const N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* ftd = (N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA*)fw->data;
7939 /* for single-line textareas, allow ENTER to pass through */
7940 if (ftd && (ftd->multiline || kc != ALLEGRO_KEY_ENTER)) {
7941 widget_focused = 1;
7942 }
7943 } else if (_is_focusable_type(fw->type)) {
7944 widget_focused = 1;
7945 }
7946 }
7947 }
7948 if (!widget_focused) {
7949 /* Iterate windows from frontmost (end of list) to backmost (start)
7950 * and stop as soon as a button consumes the event. */
7951 for (LIST_NODE* wnode = ctx->windows->end; wnode && !event_consumed; wnode = wnode->prev) {
7952 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
7953 if (!(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN)) {
7954 continue;
7955 }
7956 list_foreach(wgn, win->widgets) {
7957 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = (N_GUI_WIDGET*)wgn->ptr;
7958 if (!wgt || !wgt->visible || !wgt->enabled || wgt->type != N_GUI_TYPE_BUTTON) {
7959 continue;
7960 }
7961 N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA* bd = (N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA*)wgt->data;
7962 if (bd && !bd->key_focus_only && bd->keycode == kc) {
7963 if (bd->key_modifiers != 0 && ev_mods != bd->key_modifiers) {
7964 continue;
7965 }
7966 if (bd->toggle_mode) {
7967 bd->toggled = !bd->toggled;
7968 }
7969 /* keybind-triggered press: flash the active visual
7970 * briefly so the user sees the button react just
7971 * like on a mouse click. */
7972 bd->key_press_until = al_get_time() + N_GUI_KEY_PRESS_FLASH_SEC;
7973 if (bd->on_click) {
7974 bd->on_click(wgt->id, bd->user_data);
7975 }
7976 event_consumed = 1;
7977 break;
7978 }
7979 }
7980 if (event_consumed) {
7981 /* same node-invalidation guard as pass 1 above:
7982 * the callback may have rebuilt ctx->windows. */
7983 break;
7984 }
7985 }
7986 }
7987 }
7988 }
7989
7990 /* mouse wheel scrolling for listbox/radiolist/combobox/dropmenu and auto-scrollbar windows.
7991 * Iterate from topmost window (end of list) to bottommost (start) so that the
7992 * frontmost window under the cursor receives the scroll event first. */
7993 if (event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_MOUSE_AXES && event.mouse.dz != 0) {
7994 int scroll_consumed = 0;
7995
7996 /* Check if an open combobox dropdown should consume the scroll */
7997 if (ctx->open_combobox_id >= 0) {
7998 N_GUI_WIDGET* cb_wgt = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->open_combobox_id);
7999 if (cb_wgt && cb_wgt->data) {
8000 N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA* cbd = (N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA*)cb_wgt->data;
8001 if (cbd->is_open && (int)cbd->nb_items > cbd->max_visible) {
8002 cbd->scroll_offset -= event.mouse.dz;
8003 if (cbd->scroll_offset < 0) cbd->scroll_offset = 0;
8004 int max_off = (int)cbd->nb_items - cbd->max_visible;
8005 if (cbd->scroll_offset > max_off) cbd->scroll_offset = max_off;
8006 scroll_consumed = 1;
8007 }
8008 }
8009 }
8010 /* Check if an open dropmenu panel should consume the scroll */
8011 if (!scroll_consumed && ctx->open_dropmenu_id >= 0) {
8012 N_GUI_WIDGET* dm_wgt = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->open_dropmenu_id);
8013 if (dm_wgt && dm_wgt->data) {
8014 N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA* dmd = (N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)dm_wgt->data;
8015 if (dmd->is_open && (int)dmd->nb_entries > dmd->max_visible) {
8016 dmd->scroll_offset -= event.mouse.dz;
8017 if (dmd->scroll_offset < 0) dmd->scroll_offset = 0;
8018 int max_off = (int)dmd->nb_entries - dmd->max_visible;
8019 if (max_off < 0) max_off = 0;
8020 if (dmd->scroll_offset > max_off) dmd->scroll_offset = max_off;
8021 scroll_consumed = 1;
8022 }
8023 }
8024 }
8025 if (scroll_consumed) return 1;
8026
8027 for (LIST_NODE* wnode = ctx->windows->end; wnode; wnode = wnode->prev) {
8028 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
8029 if (!(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN) || (win->state & N_GUI_WIN_MINIMISED)) continue;
8030
8031 float win_h = win->h;
8032 if (!_point_in_rect(mx, my, win->x, win->y, win->w, win_h)) continue;
8033
8034 float content_x = win->x;
8035 float content_y = win->y + _win_tbh(win);
8036
8037 /* first check if a widget wants the scroll */
8038 list_foreach(wgn, win->widgets) {
8039 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = (N_GUI_WIDGET*)wgn->ptr;
8040 if (!wgt || !wgt->visible || !wgt->enabled) continue;
8041 float ax = content_x + wgt->x - win->scroll_x;
8042 float ay = content_y + wgt->y - win->scroll_y;
8043 if (!_point_in_rect(mx, my, ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h)) continue;
8044
8045 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX) {
8046 N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* ld = (N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)wgt->data;
8047 ld->scroll_offset -= event.mouse.dz;
8048 if (ld->scroll_offset < 0) ld->scroll_offset = 0;
8049 ALLEGRO_FONT* lf = wgt->font ? wgt->font : ctx->default_font;
8050 float lfh = lf ? (float)al_get_font_line_height(lf) : 16.0f;
8051 float lih = ld->item_height > lfh ? ld->item_height : lfh + ctx->style.item_height_pad;
8052 int visible_count = (int)(wgt->h / lih);
8053 int max_off = (int)ld->nb_items - visible_count;
8054 if (max_off < 0) max_off = 0;
8055 if (ld->scroll_offset > max_off) ld->scroll_offset = max_off;
8056 scroll_consumed = 1;
8057 }
8058 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_RADIOLIST) {
8059 N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA* rd = (N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA*)wgt->data;
8060 rd->scroll_offset -= event.mouse.dz;
8061 if (rd->scroll_offset < 0) rd->scroll_offset = 0;
8062 ALLEGRO_FONT* rf = wgt->font ? wgt->font : ctx->default_font;
8063 float rfh = rf ? (float)al_get_font_line_height(rf) : 16.0f;
8064 float rih = rd->item_height > rfh ? rd->item_height : rfh + ctx->style.item_height_pad;
8065 int visible_count = (int)(wgt->h / rih);
8066 int max_off = (int)rd->nb_items - visible_count;
8067 if (max_off < 0) max_off = 0;
8068 if (rd->scroll_offset > max_off) rd->scroll_offset = max_off;
8069 scroll_consumed = 1;
8070 }
8071 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA) {
8072 N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* std = (N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA*)wgt->data;
8073 if (std->multiline) {
8074 float scroll_step = ctx->style.scroll_step;
8075 std->scroll_y -= (int)((float)event.mouse.dz * scroll_step);
8076 std->scroll_from_wheel = 1;
8077 /* clamp is done at draw time */
8078 scroll_consumed = 1;
8079 }
8080 }
8081 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SLIDER) {
8082 N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA* sd = (N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA*)wgt->data;
8083 double step = sd->step > 0.0 ? sd->step : (sd->max_val - sd->min_val) / 20.0;
8084 if (step <= 0) step = 1.0;
8085 double new_val = sd->value + (double)event.mouse.dz * step;
8086 if (sd->step > 0.0)
8087 new_val = _slider_snap_value(new_val, sd->min_val, sd->max_val, sd->step);
8088 else
8089 new_val = _clamp(new_val, sd->min_val, sd->max_val);
8090 if (new_val != sd->value) {
8091 sd->value = new_val;
8092 if (sd->on_change) {
8093 sd->on_change(wgt->id, sd->value, sd->user_data);
8094 }
8095 }
8096 scroll_consumed = 1;
8097 }
8098 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SCROLLBAR) {
8099 N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_DATA* sbd = (N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_DATA*)wgt->data;
8100 double max_scroll = sbd->content_size - sbd->viewport_size;
8101 if (max_scroll > 0) {
8102 double step = max_scroll / 20.0;
8103 if (step <= 0) step = 1.0;
8104 sbd->scroll_pos -= (double)event.mouse.dz * step;
8105 if (sbd->scroll_pos < 0) sbd->scroll_pos = 0;
8106 if (sbd->scroll_pos > max_scroll) sbd->scroll_pos = max_scroll;
8107 if (sbd->on_scroll) {
8108 sbd->on_scroll(wgt->id, sbd->scroll_pos, sbd->user_data);
8109 }
8110 scroll_consumed = 1;
8111 }
8112 }
8113 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_COMBOBOX) {
8114 N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA* cbd = (N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA*)wgt->data;
8115 if (cbd->is_open && cbd->nb_items > 0) {
8116 cbd->scroll_offset -= event.mouse.dz;
8117 if (cbd->scroll_offset < 0) cbd->scroll_offset = 0;
8118 int max_vis = cbd->max_visible > 0 ? cbd->max_visible : 8;
8119 int max_off = (int)cbd->nb_items - max_vis;
8120 if (max_off < 0) max_off = 0;
8121 if (cbd->scroll_offset > max_off) cbd->scroll_offset = max_off;
8122 scroll_consumed = 1;
8123 }
8124 }
8125 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_DROPMENU) {
8126 N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA* dmd = (N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)wgt->data;
8127 if (dmd->is_open && dmd->nb_entries > 0) {
8128 dmd->scroll_offset -= event.mouse.dz;
8129 if (dmd->scroll_offset < 0) dmd->scroll_offset = 0;
8130 int max_vis = dmd->max_visible > 0 ? dmd->max_visible : 8;
8131 int max_off = (int)dmd->nb_entries - max_vis;
8132 if (max_off < 0) max_off = 0;
8133 if (dmd->scroll_offset > max_off) dmd->scroll_offset = max_off;
8134 scroll_consumed = 1;
8135 }
8136 }
8137 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LABEL) {
8138 N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* sld = (N_GUI_LABEL_DATA*)wgt->data;
8139 if (sld->align == N_GUI_ALIGN_JUSTIFIED) {
8140 float scroll_step = ctx->style.scroll_step;
8141 sld->scroll_y -= (float)event.mouse.dz * scroll_step;
8142 /* clamp is done at draw time */
8143 scroll_consumed = 1;
8144 }
8145 }
8146 break;
8147 }
8148
8149 /* if no widget consumed the scroll, let the window auto-scroll */
8150 if (!scroll_consumed && (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_AUTO_SCROLLBAR)) {
8151 float scroll_step = ctx->style.scroll_step;
8152 win->scroll_y -= (float)event.mouse.dz * scroll_step;
8153 /* clamp is done at draw time */
8154 scroll_consumed = 1;
8155 }
8156 if (scroll_consumed) event_consumed = 1;
8157 break; /* only one window gets scroll */
8158 }
8159
8160 /* if no window consumed the scroll and global scrollbars are available,
8161 * scroll the global viewport */
8162 if (!scroll_consumed && eff_w > 0 && eff_h > 0) {
8163 _compute_gui_bounds(ctx);
8164 if (ctx->gui_bounds_h > eff_h || ctx->gui_bounds_w > eff_w) {
8165 float scroll_step = ctx->style.global_scroll_step;
8166 ctx->global_scroll_y -= (float)event.mouse.dz * scroll_step;
8167 /* clamp is done at draw time */
8168 event_consumed = 1;
8169 }
8170 }
8171 }
8172
8173 return event_consumed;
8174}
8175
8182int n_gui_wants_mouse(N_GUI_CTX* ctx) {
8183 __n_assert(ctx, return 0);
8184 float mx = (float)ctx->mouse_x;
8185 float my = (float)ctx->mouse_y;
8186 /* transform to virtual space when virtual canvas is active */
8187 if (ctx->virtual_w > 0 && ctx->virtual_h > 0 && ctx->gui_scale > 0) {
8188 mx = (mx - ctx->gui_offset_x) / ctx->gui_scale;
8189 my = (my - ctx->gui_offset_y) / ctx->gui_scale;
8190 }
8191 list_foreach(wnode, ctx->windows) {
8192 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
8193 if (!(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN)) continue;
8194 float win_h = (win->state & N_GUI_WIN_MINIMISED) ? _win_tbh(win) : win->h;
8195 if (_point_in_rect(mx, my, win->x, win->y, win->w, win_h)) {
8196 return 1;
8197 }
8198 }
8199 return 0;
8200}
8201
8202/* JSON THEME I/O (requires cJSON) */
8203
8204#ifdef HAVE_CJSON
8205
8207static void _json_add_color(cJSON* parent, const char* name, ALLEGRO_COLOR c) {
8208 unsigned char r, g, b, a;
8209 al_unmap_rgba(c, &r, &g, &b, &a);
8210 cJSON* arr = cJSON_CreateArray();
8211 cJSON_AddItemToArray(arr, cJSON_CreateNumber(r));
8212 cJSON_AddItemToArray(arr, cJSON_CreateNumber(g));
8213 cJSON_AddItemToArray(arr, cJSON_CreateNumber(b));
8214 cJSON_AddItemToArray(arr, cJSON_CreateNumber(a));
8215 cJSON_AddItemToObject(parent, name, arr);
8216}
8217
8219static ALLEGRO_COLOR _json_get_color(cJSON* parent, const char* name, ALLEGRO_COLOR fallback) {
8220 cJSON* arr = cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive(parent, name);
8221 if (!arr || !cJSON_IsArray(arr) || cJSON_GetArraySize(arr) < 4) return fallback;
8222 int r = (int)cJSON_GetArrayItem(arr, 0)->valuedouble;
8223 int g = (int)cJSON_GetArrayItem(arr, 1)->valuedouble;
8224 int b = (int)cJSON_GetArrayItem(arr, 2)->valuedouble;
8225 int a = (int)cJSON_GetArrayItem(arr, 3)->valuedouble;
8226 return al_map_rgba((unsigned char)r, (unsigned char)g, (unsigned char)b, (unsigned char)a);
8227}
8228
8230static float _json_get_float(cJSON* parent, const char* name, float fallback) {
8231 cJSON* item = cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive(parent, name);
8232 if (!item || !cJSON_IsNumber(item)) return fallback;
8233 return (float)item->valuedouble;
8234}
8235
8237static int _json_get_int(cJSON* parent, const char* name, int fallback) {
8238 cJSON* item = cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive(parent, name);
8239 if (!item || !cJSON_IsNumber(item)) return fallback;
8240 return (int)item->valuedouble;
8241}
8242
8249int n_gui_save_theme_json(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, const char* filepath) {
8250 __n_assert(ctx, return -1);
8251 __n_assert(filepath, return -1);
8252
8253 cJSON* root = cJSON_CreateObject();
8254 if (!root) return -1;
8255
8256 /* theme colours */
8257 cJSON* theme = cJSON_CreateObject();
8258 N_GUI_THEME* t = &ctx->default_theme;
8259 _json_add_color(theme, "bg_normal", t->bg_normal);
8260 _json_add_color(theme, "bg_hover", t->bg_hover);
8261 _json_add_color(theme, "bg_active", t->bg_active);
8262 _json_add_color(theme, "border_normal", t->border_normal);
8263 _json_add_color(theme, "border_hover", t->border_hover);
8264 _json_add_color(theme, "border_active", t->border_active);
8265 _json_add_color(theme, "text_normal", t->text_normal);
8266 _json_add_color(theme, "text_hover", t->text_hover);
8267 _json_add_color(theme, "text_active", t->text_active);
8268 _json_add_color(theme, "selection_color", t->selection_color);
8269 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(theme, "border_thickness", t->border_thickness);
8270 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(theme, "corner_rx", t->corner_rx);
8271 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(theme, "corner_ry", t->corner_ry);
8272 cJSON_AddItemToObject(root, "theme", theme);
8273
8274 /* style values */
8275 cJSON* sty = cJSON_CreateObject();
8276 N_GUI_STYLE* s = &ctx->style;
8277 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "titlebar_h", s->titlebar_h);
8278 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "min_win_w", s->min_win_w);
8279 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "min_win_h", s->min_win_h);
8280 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "title_padding", s->title_padding);
8281 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "title_max_w_reserve", s->title_max_w_reserve);
8282
8283 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "tb_btn_size", s->tb_btn_size);
8284 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "tb_btn_spacing", s->tb_btn_spacing);
8285 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "tb_btn_right_margin", s->tb_btn_right_margin);
8286 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "tb_btn_glyph_thickness", s->tb_btn_glyph_thickness);
8287
8288 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "scrollbar_size", s->scrollbar_size);
8289 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "scrollbar_thumb_min", s->scrollbar_thumb_min);
8290 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "scrollbar_thumb_padding", s->scrollbar_thumb_padding);
8291 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "scrollbar_thumb_corner_r", s->scrollbar_thumb_corner_r);
8292 _json_add_color(sty, "scrollbar_track_color", s->scrollbar_track_color);
8293 _json_add_color(sty, "scrollbar_thumb_color", s->scrollbar_thumb_color);
8294
8295 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "global_scrollbar_size", s->global_scrollbar_size);
8296 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "global_scrollbar_thumb_min", s->global_scrollbar_thumb_min);
8297 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "global_scrollbar_thumb_padding", s->global_scrollbar_thumb_padding);
8298 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "global_scrollbar_thumb_corner_r", s->global_scrollbar_thumb_corner_r);
8299 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "global_scrollbar_border_thickness", s->global_scrollbar_border_thickness);
8300 _json_add_color(sty, "global_scrollbar_track_color", s->global_scrollbar_track_color);
8301 _json_add_color(sty, "global_scrollbar_thumb_color", s->global_scrollbar_thumb_color);
8302 _json_add_color(sty, "global_scrollbar_thumb_border_color", s->global_scrollbar_thumb_border_color);
8303
8304 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "grip_size", s->grip_size);
8305 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "grip_line_thickness", s->grip_line_thickness);
8306 _json_add_color(sty, "grip_color", s->grip_color);
8307
8308 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "slider_track_size", s->slider_track_size);
8309 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "slider_track_corner_r", s->slider_track_corner_r);
8310 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "slider_track_border_thickness", s->slider_track_border_thickness);
8311 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "slider_handle_min_r", s->slider_handle_min_r);
8312 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "slider_handle_edge_offset", s->slider_handle_edge_offset);
8313 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "slider_handle_border_thickness", s->slider_handle_border_thickness);
8314 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "slider_value_label_offset", s->slider_value_label_offset);
8315
8316 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "textarea_padding", s->textarea_padding);
8317 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "textarea_cursor_width", s->textarea_cursor_width);
8318 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "textarea_cursor_blink_period", s->textarea_cursor_blink_period);
8319
8320 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "checkbox_max_size", s->checkbox_max_size);
8321 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "checkbox_mark_margin", s->checkbox_mark_margin);
8322 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "checkbox_mark_thickness", s->checkbox_mark_thickness);
8323 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "checkbox_label_gap", s->checkbox_label_gap);
8324 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "checkbox_label_offset", s->checkbox_label_offset);
8325
8326 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "radio_circle_min_r", s->radio_circle_min_r);
8327 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "radio_circle_border_thickness", s->radio_circle_border_thickness);
8328 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "radio_inner_offset", s->radio_inner_offset);
8329 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "radio_label_gap", s->radio_label_gap);
8330
8331 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "listbox_default_item_height", s->listbox_default_item_height);
8332 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "radiolist_default_item_height", s->radiolist_default_item_height);
8333 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "combobox_max_visible", s->combobox_max_visible);
8334 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "dropmenu_max_visible", s->dropmenu_max_visible);
8335 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "item_text_padding", s->item_text_padding);
8336 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "item_selection_inset", s->item_selection_inset);
8337 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "item_height_pad", s->item_height_pad);
8338
8339 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "dropdown_arrow_reserve", s->dropdown_arrow_reserve);
8340 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "dropdown_arrow_thickness", s->dropdown_arrow_thickness);
8341 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "dropdown_arrow_half_h", s->dropdown_arrow_half_h);
8342 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "dropdown_arrow_half_w", s->dropdown_arrow_half_w);
8343 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "dropdown_border_thickness", s->dropdown_border_thickness);
8344
8345 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "label_padding", s->label_padding);
8346 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "link_underline_thickness", s->link_underline_thickness);
8347 _json_add_color(sty, "link_color_normal", s->link_color_normal);
8348 _json_add_color(sty, "link_color_hover", s->link_color_hover);
8349
8350 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "scroll_step", s->scroll_step);
8351 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "global_scroll_step", s->global_scroll_step);
8352 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "combobox_max_dropdown_width", s->combobox_max_dropdown_width);
8353 cJSON_AddItemToObject(root, "style", sty);
8354
8355 /* write to file */
8356 char* json_str = cJSON_Print(root);
8357 cJSON_Delete(root);
8358 if (!json_str) return -1;
8359
8360 FILE* fp = fopen(filepath, "w");
8361 if (!fp) {
8362 cJSON_free(json_str);
8363 return -1;
8364 }
8365 fprintf(fp, "%s\n", json_str);
8366 fclose(fp);
8367 cJSON_free(json_str);
8368 return 0;
8369}
8370
8377int n_gui_load_theme_json(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, const char* filepath) {
8378 __n_assert(ctx, return -1);
8379 __n_assert(filepath, return -1);
8380
8381 FILE* fp = fopen(filepath, "r");
8382 if (!fp) return -1;
8383
8384 fseek(fp, 0, SEEK_END);
8385 long fsize = ftell(fp);
8386 fseek(fp, 0, SEEK_SET);
8387 if (fsize <= 0 || fsize > 1024 * 1024) { /* sanity: max 1 MB */
8388 fclose(fp);
8389 return -1;
8390 }
8391
8392 char* buf = NULL;
8393 Malloc(buf, char, (size_t)fsize + 1);
8394 if (!buf) {
8395 fclose(fp);
8396 return -1;
8397 }
8398 size_t nread = fread(buf, 1, (size_t)fsize, fp);
8399 fclose(fp);
8400 buf[nread] = '\0';
8401
8402 cJSON* root = cJSON_Parse(buf);
8403 FreeNoLog(buf);
8404 if (!root) return -1;
8405
8406 /* parse theme colours */
8407 cJSON* theme = cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive(root, "theme");
8408 if (theme) {
8409 N_GUI_THEME* t = &ctx->default_theme;
8410 t->bg_normal = _json_get_color(theme, "bg_normal", t->bg_normal);
8411 t->bg_hover = _json_get_color(theme, "bg_hover", t->bg_hover);
8412 t->bg_active = _json_get_color(theme, "bg_active", t->bg_active);
8413 t->border_normal = _json_get_color(theme, "border_normal", t->border_normal);
8414 t->border_hover = _json_get_color(theme, "border_hover", t->border_hover);
8415 t->border_active = _json_get_color(theme, "border_active", t->border_active);
8416 t->text_normal = _json_get_color(theme, "text_normal", t->text_normal);
8417 t->text_hover = _json_get_color(theme, "text_hover", t->text_hover);
8418 t->text_active = _json_get_color(theme, "text_active", t->text_active);
8419 t->selection_color = _json_get_color(theme, "selection_color", t->selection_color);
8420 t->border_thickness = _json_get_float(theme, "border_thickness", t->border_thickness);
8421 t->corner_rx = _json_get_float(theme, "corner_rx", t->corner_rx);
8422 t->corner_ry = _json_get_float(theme, "corner_ry", t->corner_ry);
8423
8424 /* apply to all existing windows and widgets */
8425 list_foreach(wnode, ctx->windows) {
8426 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
8427 win->theme = *t;
8428 list_foreach(wgn, win->widgets) {
8429 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = (N_GUI_WIDGET*)wgn->ptr;
8430 if (wgt) wgt->theme = *t;
8431 }
8432 }
8433 }
8434
8435 /* parse style values */
8436 cJSON* sty = cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive(root, "style");
8437 if (sty) {
8438 N_GUI_STYLE* s = &ctx->style;
8439 s->titlebar_h = _json_get_float(sty, "titlebar_h", s->titlebar_h);
8440 s->min_win_w = _json_get_float(sty, "min_win_w", s->min_win_w);
8441 s->min_win_h = _json_get_float(sty, "min_win_h", s->min_win_h);
8442 s->title_padding = _json_get_float(sty, "title_padding", s->title_padding);
8443 s->title_max_w_reserve = _json_get_float(sty, "title_max_w_reserve", s->title_max_w_reserve);
8444
8445 s->tb_btn_size = _json_get_float(sty, "tb_btn_size", s->tb_btn_size);
8446 s->tb_btn_spacing = _json_get_float(sty, "tb_btn_spacing", s->tb_btn_spacing);
8447 s->tb_btn_right_margin = _json_get_float(sty, "tb_btn_right_margin", s->tb_btn_right_margin);
8448 s->tb_btn_glyph_thickness = _json_get_float(sty, "tb_btn_glyph_thickness", s->tb_btn_glyph_thickness);
8449
8450 s->scrollbar_size = _json_get_float(sty, "scrollbar_size", s->scrollbar_size);
8451 s->scrollbar_thumb_min = _json_get_float(sty, "scrollbar_thumb_min", s->scrollbar_thumb_min);
8452 s->scrollbar_thumb_padding = _json_get_float(sty, "scrollbar_thumb_padding", s->scrollbar_thumb_padding);
8453 s->scrollbar_thumb_corner_r = _json_get_float(sty, "scrollbar_thumb_corner_r", s->scrollbar_thumb_corner_r);
8454 s->scrollbar_track_color = _json_get_color(sty, "scrollbar_track_color", s->scrollbar_track_color);
8455 s->scrollbar_thumb_color = _json_get_color(sty, "scrollbar_thumb_color", s->scrollbar_thumb_color);
8456
8457 s->global_scrollbar_size = _json_get_float(sty, "global_scrollbar_size", s->global_scrollbar_size);
8458 s->global_scrollbar_thumb_min = _json_get_float(sty, "global_scrollbar_thumb_min", s->global_scrollbar_thumb_min);
8459 s->global_scrollbar_thumb_padding = _json_get_float(sty, "global_scrollbar_thumb_padding", s->global_scrollbar_thumb_padding);
8460 s->global_scrollbar_thumb_corner_r = _json_get_float(sty, "global_scrollbar_thumb_corner_r", s->global_scrollbar_thumb_corner_r);
8461 s->global_scrollbar_border_thickness = _json_get_float(sty, "global_scrollbar_border_thickness", s->global_scrollbar_border_thickness);
8462 s->global_scrollbar_track_color = _json_get_color(sty, "global_scrollbar_track_color", s->global_scrollbar_track_color);
8463 s->global_scrollbar_thumb_color = _json_get_color(sty, "global_scrollbar_thumb_color", s->global_scrollbar_thumb_color);
8464 s->global_scrollbar_thumb_border_color = _json_get_color(sty, "global_scrollbar_thumb_border_color", s->global_scrollbar_thumb_border_color);
8465
8466 s->grip_size = _json_get_float(sty, "grip_size", s->grip_size);
8467 s->grip_line_thickness = _json_get_float(sty, "grip_line_thickness", s->grip_line_thickness);
8468 s->grip_color = _json_get_color(sty, "grip_color", s->grip_color);
8469
8470 s->slider_track_size = _json_get_float(sty, "slider_track_size", s->slider_track_size);
8471 s->slider_track_corner_r = _json_get_float(sty, "slider_track_corner_r", s->slider_track_corner_r);
8472 s->slider_track_border_thickness = _json_get_float(sty, "slider_track_border_thickness", s->slider_track_border_thickness);
8473 s->slider_handle_min_r = _json_get_float(sty, "slider_handle_min_r", s->slider_handle_min_r);
8474 s->slider_handle_edge_offset = _json_get_float(sty, "slider_handle_edge_offset", s->slider_handle_edge_offset);
8475 s->slider_handle_border_thickness = _json_get_float(sty, "slider_handle_border_thickness", s->slider_handle_border_thickness);
8476 s->slider_value_label_offset = _json_get_float(sty, "slider_value_label_offset", s->slider_value_label_offset);
8477
8478 s->textarea_padding = _json_get_float(sty, "textarea_padding", s->textarea_padding);
8479 s->textarea_cursor_width = _json_get_float(sty, "textarea_cursor_width", s->textarea_cursor_width);
8480 s->textarea_cursor_blink_period = _json_get_float(sty, "textarea_cursor_blink_period", s->textarea_cursor_blink_period);
8481
8482 s->checkbox_max_size = _json_get_float(sty, "checkbox_max_size", s->checkbox_max_size);
8483 s->checkbox_mark_margin = _json_get_float(sty, "checkbox_mark_margin", s->checkbox_mark_margin);
8484 s->checkbox_mark_thickness = _json_get_float(sty, "checkbox_mark_thickness", s->checkbox_mark_thickness);
8485 s->checkbox_label_gap = _json_get_float(sty, "checkbox_label_gap", s->checkbox_label_gap);
8486 s->checkbox_label_offset = _json_get_float(sty, "checkbox_label_offset", s->checkbox_label_offset);
8487
8488 s->radio_circle_min_r = _json_get_float(sty, "radio_circle_min_r", s->radio_circle_min_r);
8489 s->radio_circle_border_thickness = _json_get_float(sty, "radio_circle_border_thickness", s->radio_circle_border_thickness);
8490 s->radio_inner_offset = _json_get_float(sty, "radio_inner_offset", s->radio_inner_offset);
8491 s->radio_label_gap = _json_get_float(sty, "radio_label_gap", s->radio_label_gap);
8492
8493 s->listbox_default_item_height = _json_get_float(sty, "listbox_default_item_height", s->listbox_default_item_height);
8494 s->radiolist_default_item_height = _json_get_float(sty, "radiolist_default_item_height", s->radiolist_default_item_height);
8495 s->combobox_max_visible = _json_get_int(sty, "combobox_max_visible", s->combobox_max_visible);
8496 s->dropmenu_max_visible = _json_get_int(sty, "dropmenu_max_visible", s->dropmenu_max_visible);
8497 s->item_text_padding = _json_get_float(sty, "item_text_padding", s->item_text_padding);
8498 s->item_selection_inset = _json_get_float(sty, "item_selection_inset", s->item_selection_inset);
8499 s->item_height_pad = _json_get_float(sty, "item_height_pad", s->item_height_pad);
8500
8501 s->dropdown_arrow_reserve = _json_get_float(sty, "dropdown_arrow_reserve", s->dropdown_arrow_reserve);
8502 s->dropdown_arrow_thickness = _json_get_float(sty, "dropdown_arrow_thickness", s->dropdown_arrow_thickness);
8503 s->dropdown_arrow_half_h = _json_get_float(sty, "dropdown_arrow_half_h", s->dropdown_arrow_half_h);
8504 s->dropdown_arrow_half_w = _json_get_float(sty, "dropdown_arrow_half_w", s->dropdown_arrow_half_w);
8505 s->dropdown_border_thickness = _json_get_float(sty, "dropdown_border_thickness", s->dropdown_border_thickness);
8506
8507 s->label_padding = _json_get_float(sty, "label_padding", s->label_padding);
8508 s->link_underline_thickness = _json_get_float(sty, "link_underline_thickness", s->link_underline_thickness);
8509 s->link_color_normal = _json_get_color(sty, "link_color_normal", s->link_color_normal);
8510 s->link_color_hover = _json_get_color(sty, "link_color_hover", s->link_color_hover);
8511
8512 s->scroll_step = _json_get_float(sty, "scroll_step", s->scroll_step);
8513 s->global_scroll_step = _json_get_float(sty, "global_scroll_step", s->global_scroll_step);
8514 s->combobox_max_dropdown_width = _json_get_float(sty, "combobox_max_dropdown_width", s->combobox_max_dropdown_width);
8515 }
8516
8517 cJSON_Delete(root);
8518 return 0;
8519}
8520
8521/* persistent state bits, transient DRAGGING/RESIZING/SCROLL-DRAG are never serialised */
8522#define _N_GUI_WIN_STATE_PERSIST_MASK (N_GUI_WIN_OPEN | N_GUI_WIN_MINIMISED | N_GUI_WIN_MAXIMISED)
8523
8530int n_gui_save_layout_json(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, const char* filepath) {
8531 __n_assert(ctx, return -1);
8532 __n_assert(filepath, return -1);
8533
8534 cJSON* root = cJSON_CreateObject();
8535 if (!root) return -1;
8536
8537 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(root, "version", 1);
8538 /* Display size at save time, the loader scales saved (x,y,w,h) by
8539 * (current_display / saved_display) so a dragged HUD stays in its
8540 * relative spot when the user relaunches on a bigger / smaller
8541 * screen. Missing or zero saved dims disable the scaling (legacy
8542 * files and in-process tests behave as before). */
8543 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(root, "display_w", ctx->display_w);
8544 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(root, "display_h", ctx->display_h);
8545 cJSON* wins = cJSON_CreateArray();
8546 if (!wins) {
8547 cJSON_Delete(root);
8548 return -1;
8549 }
8550
8551 list_foreach(wnode, ctx->windows) {
8552 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
8553 if (!win) continue;
8554 /* Closed windows are persisted too: many UI modules treat
8555 * close/open as a visibility toggle (editor panels, mod tools,
8556 * NPC dialog popups). Without persisting their closed geometry,
8557 * the user's dragged position would be lost the moment the
8558 * window is hidden, and most modules close their windows
8559 * before logout. The destroy+recreate pattern (combat HUD on
8560 * target change, hotbar on assignment) is now safe because the
8561 * loader has a dedupe pre-pass that drops stale closed entries
8562 * when a same-title open entry follows in the list (see
8563 * test_load_stale_closed_dedupe).
8564 *
8565 * Multiple OPEN windows sharing a title still resolve via the
8566 * loader's per-context match counter (first-seen wins), so the
8567 * save order here just needs to be deterministic. */
8568 cJSON* wj = cJSON_CreateObject();
8569 if (!wj) continue;
8570 cJSON_AddStringToObject(wj, "title", win->title);
8571 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(wj, "x", win->x);
8572 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(wj, "y", win->y);
8573 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(wj, "w", win->w);
8574 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(wj, "h", win->h);
8575 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(wj, "state", win->state & _N_GUI_WIN_STATE_PERSIST_MASK);
8576 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(wj, "flags", win->flags);
8577 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(wj, "z_order", win->z_order);
8578 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(wj, "z_value", win->z_value);
8579 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(wj, "norm_x", win->norm_x);
8580 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(wj, "norm_y", win->norm_y);
8581 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(wj, "norm_w", win->norm_w);
8582 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(wj, "norm_h", win->norm_h);
8583 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(wj, "autofit_flags", win->autofit_flags);
8584 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(wj, "autofit_border", win->autofit_border);
8585 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(wj, "resize_policy", win->resize_policy);
8586 cJSON_AddItemToArray(wins, wj);
8587 }
8588 cJSON_AddItemToObject(root, "windows", wins);
8589
8590 char* json_str = cJSON_Print(root);
8591 cJSON_Delete(root);
8592 if (!json_str) return -1;
8593
8594 FILE* fp = fopen(filepath, "w");
8595 if (!fp) {
8596 cJSON_free(json_str);
8597 return -1;
8598 }
8599 fprintf(fp, "%s\n", json_str);
8600 fclose(fp);
8601 cJSON_free(json_str);
8602 return 0;
8603}
8604
8611int n_gui_load_layout_json(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, const char* filepath) {
8612 __n_assert(ctx, return -1);
8613 __n_assert(filepath, return -1);
8614
8615 FILE* fp = fopen(filepath, "r");
8616 if (!fp) {
8617 n_log(LOG_DEBUG, "n_gui_load_layout_json: %s not found (first run?)", filepath);
8618 return -1;
8619 }
8620
8621 fseek(fp, 0, SEEK_END);
8622 long fsize = ftell(fp);
8623 fseek(fp, 0, SEEK_SET);
8624 if (fsize <= 0 || fsize > 4 * 1024 * 1024) { /* sanity: max 4 MB */
8625 fclose(fp);
8626 return -1;
8627 }
8628
8629 char* buf = NULL;
8630 Malloc(buf, char, (size_t)fsize + 1);
8631 if (!buf) {
8632 fclose(fp);
8633 return -1;
8634 }
8635 size_t nread = fread(buf, 1, (size_t)fsize, fp);
8636 fclose(fp);
8637 buf[nread] = '\0';
8638
8639 cJSON* root = cJSON_Parse(buf);
8640 FreeNoLog(buf);
8641 if (!root) return -1;
8642
8643 cJSON* wins = cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive(root, "windows");
8644 if (!wins || !cJSON_IsArray(wins)) {
8645 cJSON_Delete(root);
8646 return -1;
8647 }
8648
8649 /* Cross-session proportional scaling: if the layout was saved with
8650 * a different display size than the current one, scale every loaded
8651 * (x,y,w,h) by the size ratio. Falls back to 1.0 (no scaling) when
8652 * the file was saved pre-scaling support (display_w/h absent or 0)
8653 * or when the current context display size is 0 (in-process tests). */
8654 float saved_w = _json_get_float(root, "display_w", 0.0f);
8655 float saved_h = _json_get_float(root, "display_h", 0.0f);
8656 float sx = 1.0f, sy = 1.0f;
8657 if (saved_w > 0.0f && ctx->display_w > 0.0f) sx = ctx->display_w / saved_w;
8658 if (saved_h > 0.0f && ctx->display_h > 0.0f) sy = ctx->display_h / saved_h;
8659
8660 /* Build a per-title match counter on the context side so duplicate titles
8661 * consume their JSON entries in creation order (first-seen-first-match). */
8662 int n_entries = cJSON_GetArraySize(wins);
8663 int* consumed = NULL;
8664 if (n_entries > 0) {
8665 Malloc(consumed, int, (size_t)n_entries);
8666 if (!consumed) {
8667 cJSON_Delete(root);
8668 return -1;
8669 }
8670 memset(consumed, 0, sizeof(int) * (size_t)n_entries);
8671 }
8672
8673 /* Dedupe pre-pass for stale closed windows. Old saves (from before
8674 * the save-side skip-closed-windows fix) accumulated one entry per
8675 * rebuild cycle: N-1 closed stragglers with state=0 plus the live
8676 * one with state=1, all sharing a title. The matcher assigns JSON
8677 * entries to context windows in list order, so the stale entries
8678 * would land on the live window and apply state=0, hiding the HUD
8679 * until the next rebuild re-opens it (the "text appears only after
8680 * resize" symptom).
8681 *
8682 * We ONLY mark a closed entry as consumed when a later same-title
8683 * entry is marked OPEN. That preserves legitimate cases where an
8684 * app creates multiple windows sharing a title (uncommon but valid). */
8685 for (int i = 0; i < n_entries; i++) {
8686 if (consumed[i]) continue;
8687 cJSON* wi = cJSON_GetArrayItem(wins, i);
8688 if (!wi) continue;
8689 cJSON* state_i = cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive(wi, "state");
8690 int is_open_i = state_i && cJSON_IsNumber(state_i) &&
8691 (((int)state_i->valuedouble) & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN);
8692 if (is_open_i) continue;
8693 cJSON* ti = cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive(wi, "title");
8694 if (!ti || !cJSON_IsString(ti) || !ti->valuestring) continue;
8695 for (int j = i + 1; j < n_entries; j++) {
8696 cJSON* wj = cJSON_GetArrayItem(wins, j);
8697 if (!wj) continue;
8698 cJSON* state_j = cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive(wj, "state");
8699 int is_open_j = state_j && cJSON_IsNumber(state_j) &&
8700 (((int)state_j->valuedouble) & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN);
8701 if (!is_open_j) continue;
8702 cJSON* tj = cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive(wj, "title");
8703 if (tj && cJSON_IsString(tj) && tj->valuestring &&
8704 strcmp(ti->valuestring, tj->valuestring) == 0) {
8705 consumed[i] = 1;
8706 break;
8707 }
8708 }
8709 }
8710
8711 list_foreach(wnode, ctx->windows) {
8712 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
8713 if (!win) continue;
8714 cJSON* match = NULL;
8715 int match_idx = -1;
8716 int idx = 0;
8717 cJSON* wj = NULL;
8718 cJSON_ArrayForEach(wj, wins) {
8719 if (!consumed || consumed[idx] == 0) {
8720 cJSON* t = cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive(wj, "title");
8721 if (t && cJSON_IsString(t) && t->valuestring &&
8722 strncmp(t->valuestring, win->title, N_GUI_ID_MAX) == 0) {
8723 match = wj;
8724 match_idx = idx;
8725 break;
8726 }
8727 }
8728 idx++;
8729 }
8730 if (!match) continue;
8731 if (consumed) consumed[match_idx] = 1;
8732
8733 /* Only (x,y) participate in cross-session scaling, they express
8734 * *placement* in screen coordinates and should track the display
8735 * proportionally. (w,h) are intrinsic to the widget layout (HUD
8736 * bar widths, editor panel sizes, etc.), so they are loaded
8737 * verbatim and clamped below. Scaling w/h across sessions caused
8738 * cascading corruption: repeated save/load at different display
8739 * sizes produced insane dimensions (HUD Player w=65 instead of
8740 * 220, Chat Input h=11 instead of 22). */
8741 win->x = _json_get_float(match, "x", win->x) * sx;
8742 win->y = _json_get_float(match, "y", win->y) * sy;
8743 win->w = _json_get_float(match, "w", win->w);
8744 win->h = _json_get_float(match, "h", win->h);
8745
8746 /* Sanity clamp: if the saved file was produced by an earlier
8747 * buggy build (or if the display shrank dramatically), the
8748 * values may be way out of range. Loaded geometry entirely
8749 * outside the current display is reset to (0, 0) so the window
8750 * stays reachable, the user can drag it from there or hit the
8751 * settings Reset button. Width/height clamped to the display so
8752 * giant bogus dimensions can't blow the layout. Minimums keep
8753 * the window clickable. */
8754 if (ctx->display_w > 0.0f) {
8755 if (win->x < 0.0f || win->x > ctx->display_w) win->x = 0.0f;
8756 if (win->w < 20.0f) win->w = 20.0f;
8757 if (win->w > ctx->display_w) win->w = ctx->display_w;
8758 }
8759 if (ctx->display_h > 0.0f) {
8760 if (win->y < 0.0f || win->y > ctx->display_h) win->y = 0.0f;
8761 if (win->h < 20.0f) win->h = 20.0f;
8762 if (win->h > ctx->display_h) win->h = ctx->display_h;
8763 }
8764 /* keep only persistent state bits from the file; preserve any
8765 * transient bits already on the window (there shouldn't be any at load time). */
8766 int saved_state = _json_get_int(match, "state", win->state & _N_GUI_WIN_STATE_PERSIST_MASK);
8767 win->state = (win->state & ~_N_GUI_WIN_STATE_PERSIST_MASK) |
8768 (saved_state & _N_GUI_WIN_STATE_PERSIST_MASK);
8769 win->flags = _json_get_int(match, "flags", win->flags);
8770 win->z_order = _json_get_int(match, "z_order", win->z_order);
8771 win->z_value = _json_get_int(match, "z_value", win->z_value);
8772 win->norm_x = _json_get_float(match, "norm_x", win->norm_x);
8773 win->norm_y = _json_get_float(match, "norm_y", win->norm_y);
8774 win->norm_w = _json_get_float(match, "norm_w", win->norm_w);
8775 win->norm_h = _json_get_float(match, "norm_h", win->norm_h);
8776 win->autofit_flags = _json_get_int(match, "autofit_flags", win->autofit_flags);
8777 win->autofit_border = _json_get_float(match, "autofit_border", win->autofit_border);
8778 win->resize_policy = _json_get_int(match, "resize_policy", win->resize_policy);
8779 }
8780
8781 /* Retain entries that matched NO live window (lazily-created panels not
8782 * yet built) so n_gui_add_window can apply their position when the
8783 * window is created later. Skip titles that DO have a live window (those
8784 * are eager windows already placed above; re-applying on a later rebuild
8785 * would fight the caller's preserve-position logic). */
8786 FreeNoLog(ctx->pending_layout);
8787 ctx->pending_layout = NULL;
8788 ctx->pending_layout_count = 0;
8789 if (n_entries > 0) {
8790 int npend = 0;
8791 for (int i = 0; i < n_entries; i++)
8792 if (consumed && !consumed[i]) npend++;
8793 if (npend > 0) {
8794 Malloc(ctx->pending_layout, N_GUI_PENDING_GEOM, (size_t)npend);
8795 if (ctx->pending_layout) {
8796 int k = 0;
8797 for (int i = 0; i < n_entries && k < npend; i++) {
8798 if (consumed && consumed[i]) continue;
8799 cJSON* wi = cJSON_GetArrayItem(wins, i);
8800 cJSON* t = wi ? cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive(wi, "title") : NULL;
8801 if (!t || !cJSON_IsString(t) || !t->valuestring || !t->valuestring[0])
8802 continue;
8803 /* Skip if a live window already owns this title. */
8804 int live = 0;
8805 list_foreach(lwn, ctx->windows) {
8806 const N_GUI_WINDOW* lw = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)lwn->ptr;
8807 if (lw && strncmp(lw->title, t->valuestring, N_GUI_ID_MAX) == 0) {
8808 live = 1;
8809 break;
8810 }
8811 }
8812 if (live) continue;
8813 strncpy(ctx->pending_layout[k].title, t->valuestring, N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1);
8814 ctx->pending_layout[k].title[N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1] = '\0';
8815 ctx->pending_layout[k].x = _json_get_float(wi, "x", 0.0f) * sx;
8816 ctx->pending_layout[k].y = _json_get_float(wi, "y", 0.0f) * sy;
8817 ctx->pending_layout[k].consumed = 0;
8818 k++;
8819 }
8820 ctx->pending_layout_count = k;
8821 }
8822 }
8823 }
8824
8825 FreeNoLog(consumed);
8826 cJSON_Delete(root);
8827 return 0;
8828}
8829
8830#else /* !HAVE_CJSON */
8831
8838int n_gui_save_theme_json(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, const char* filepath) {
8839 (void)ctx;
8840 (void)filepath;
8841 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_gui_save_theme_json: cJSON not available (compile with -DHAVE_CJSON)");
8842 return -1;
8843}
8844
8851int n_gui_load_theme_json(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, const char* filepath) {
8852 (void)ctx;
8853 (void)filepath;
8854 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_gui_load_theme_json: cJSON not available (compile with -DHAVE_CJSON)");
8855 return -1;
8856}
8857
8864int n_gui_save_layout_json(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, const char* filepath) {
8865 (void)ctx;
8866 (void)filepath;
8867 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_gui_save_layout_json: cJSON not available (compile with -DHAVE_CJSON)");
8868 return -1;
8869}
8870
8877int n_gui_load_layout_json(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, const char* filepath) {
8878 (void)ctx;
8879 (void)filepath;
8880 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_gui_load_layout_json: cJSON not available (compile with -DHAVE_CJSON)");
8881 return -1;
8882}
8883
8884#endif /* HAVE_CJSON */
8885
8886static void _n_gui_tab_button_clicked(int widget_id, void* user_data) {
8887 N_GUI_TAB_PANEL* panel = (N_GUI_TAB_PANEL*)user_data;
8888 if (!panel) return;
8889 int clicked = -1;
8890 for (int i = 0; i < panel->nb_tabs; i++) {
8891 if (panel->button_ids[i] == widget_id) {
8892 clicked = i;
8893 break;
8894 }
8895 }
8896 if (clicked < 0) return;
8897 n_gui_tab_set_active(panel, clicked);
8898 if (panel->on_tab_change) panel->on_tab_change(clicked, panel->user_data);
8899}
8900
8901N_GUI_TAB_PANEL* n_gui_tab_create(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, float x, float y, float button_w, float button_h, void (*on_tab_change)(int, void*), void* user_data) {
8902 if (!ctx) return NULL;
8903 N_GUI_TAB_PANEL* panel = NULL;
8904 Malloc(panel, N_GUI_TAB_PANEL, 1);
8905 if (!panel) return NULL;
8906 panel->ctx = ctx;
8907 panel->parent_window_id = window_id;
8908 panel->nb_tabs = 0;
8909 panel->active_tab = -1;
8910 panel->x = x;
8911 panel->y = y;
8912 panel->button_w = button_w;
8913 panel->button_h = button_h;
8914 panel->on_tab_change = on_tab_change;
8915 panel->user_data = user_data;
8916 for (int i = 0; i < N_GUI_TAB_MAX; i++) {
8917 panel->button_ids[i] = -1;
8918 panel->content_window_ids[i] = -1;
8919 }
8920 return panel;
8921}
8922
8923int n_gui_tab_add(N_GUI_TAB_PANEL* panel, const char* label) {
8924 if (!panel || !label || panel->nb_tabs >= N_GUI_TAB_MAX) return -1;
8925 int idx = panel->nb_tabs;
8926 float bx = panel->x + (float)idx * panel->button_w;
8927 int btn_id = n_gui_add_toggle_button(panel->ctx, panel->parent_window_id,
8928 label, bx, panel->y, panel->button_w, panel->button_h,
8929 N_GUI_SHAPE_RECT, (idx == 0) ? 1 : 0,
8930 _n_gui_tab_button_clicked, panel);
8931 if (btn_id < 0) return -1;
8932 panel->button_ids[idx] = btn_id;
8933 panel->nb_tabs++;
8934 if (idx == 0) panel->active_tab = 0;
8935 return idx;
8936}
8937
8938void n_gui_tab_set_content_window(N_GUI_TAB_PANEL* panel, int tab_index, int window_id) {
8939 if (!panel || tab_index < 0 || tab_index >= panel->nb_tabs) return;
8940 panel->content_window_ids[tab_index] = window_id;
8941}
8942
8943void n_gui_tab_set_active(N_GUI_TAB_PANEL* panel, int index) {
8944 if (!panel || index < 0 || index >= panel->nb_tabs) return;
8945 for (int i = 0; i < panel->nb_tabs; i++) {
8946 n_gui_button_set_toggled(panel->ctx, panel->button_ids[i], (i == index) ? 1 : 0);
8947 if (panel->content_window_ids[i] >= 0) {
8948 if (i == index)
8949 n_gui_open_window(panel->ctx, panel->content_window_ids[i]);
8950 else
8951 n_gui_close_window(panel->ctx, panel->content_window_ids[i]);
8952 }
8953 }
8954 panel->active_tab = index;
8955}
8956
8957int n_gui_tab_get_active(N_GUI_TAB_PANEL* panel) {
8958 return panel ? panel->active_tab : -1;
8959}
8960
8961void n_gui_tab_free(N_GUI_TAB_PANEL** panel) {
8962 if (!panel || !*panel) return;
8963 FreeNoLog(*panel);
8964 *panel = NULL;
8965}
8966
8967/* TREE VIEW */
8968
8969static void _n_gui_tree_listbox_selected(int widget_id, int index, int selected, void* user_data) {
8970 (void)widget_id;
8971 N_GUI_TREE* tree = (N_GUI_TREE*)user_data;
8972 if (!tree || !selected) return;
8973 if (index < 0 || index >= tree->nb_visible) return;
8974 int node_idx = tree->visible_map[index];
8975 if (node_idx < 0 || node_idx >= tree->nb_nodes) return;
8976 if (tree->nodes[node_idx].has_children) n_gui_tree_toggle_expand(tree, node_idx);
8977 if (tree->on_select) tree->on_select(node_idx, tree->user_data);
8978}
8979
8980N_GUI_TREE* n_gui_tree_create(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, float x, float y, float w, float h, void (*on_select)(int, void*), void* user_data) {
8981 if (!ctx) return NULL;
8982 N_GUI_TREE* tree = NULL;
8983 Malloc(tree, N_GUI_TREE, 1);
8984 if (!tree) return NULL;
8985 tree->ctx = ctx;
8986 tree->window_id = window_id;
8987 tree->nb_nodes = 0;
8988 tree->nb_visible = 0;
8989 tree->on_select = on_select;
8990 tree->user_data = user_data;
8991 tree->on_drop = NULL;
8992 tree->drop_user_data = NULL;
8993 tree->drag_source_node = -1;
8994 tree->drag_armed_node = -1;
8995 tree->drag_hover_node = -1;
8996 tree->drop_position = N_GUI_DROP_INTO;
8997 tree->drag_active = 0;
8998 tree->drag_press_x = 0.0f;
8999 tree->drag_press_y = 0.0f;
9000 tree->mouse_b1_prev = 0;
9001 tree->listbox_id = n_gui_add_listbox(ctx, window_id, x, y, w, h,
9002 N_GUI_SELECT_SINGLE, _n_gui_tree_listbox_selected, tree);
9003 if (tree->listbox_id < 0) {
9004 FreeNoLog(tree);
9005 return NULL;
9006 }
9007 return tree;
9008}
9009
9010static int _n_gui_tree_node_visible(N_GUI_TREE* tree, int node_index) {
9011 int pi = tree->nodes[node_index].parent_index;
9012 while (pi >= 0) {
9013 if (!tree->nodes[pi].expanded) return 0;
9014 pi = tree->nodes[pi].parent_index;
9015 }
9016 return 1;
9017}
9018
9019int n_gui_tree_add_node(N_GUI_TREE* tree, const char* label, int parent_index, void* user_data) {
9020 if (!tree || !label || tree->nb_nodes >= N_GUI_TREE_MAX) return -1;
9021 if (parent_index >= tree->nb_nodes) return -1;
9022 int idx = tree->nb_nodes;
9023 N_GUI_TREE_NODE* node = &tree->nodes[idx];
9024 snprintf(node->label, sizeof(node->label), "%s", label);
9025 node->parent_index = parent_index;
9026 node->expanded = 0;
9027 node->has_children = 0;
9028 node->user_data = user_data;
9029 if (parent_index < 0) {
9030 node->depth = 0;
9031 } else {
9032 node->depth = tree->nodes[parent_index].depth + 1;
9033 tree->nodes[parent_index].has_children = 1;
9034 }
9035 tree->nb_nodes++;
9036 n_gui_tree_rebuild(tree);
9037 return idx;
9038}
9039
9040void n_gui_tree_clear(N_GUI_TREE* tree) {
9041 if (!tree) return;
9042 tree->nb_nodes = 0;
9043 tree->nb_visible = 0;
9044 n_gui_listbox_clear(tree->ctx, tree->listbox_id);
9045}
9046
9047void n_gui_tree_remove_node(N_GUI_TREE* tree, int node_index) {
9048 if (!tree) return;
9049 if (node_index < 0 || node_index >= tree->nb_nodes) return;
9050
9051 /* Mark the target and every descendant for removal. Iterate until
9052 no new marks appear so children of already-marked parents are
9053 captured regardless of insertion order. */
9054 char removed[N_GUI_TREE_MAX];
9055 memset(removed, 0, (size_t)tree->nb_nodes);
9056 removed[node_index] = 1;
9057 int changed = 1;
9058 while (changed) {
9059 changed = 0;
9060 for (int i = 0; i < tree->nb_nodes; i++) {
9061 if (removed[i]) continue;
9062 int p = tree->nodes[i].parent_index;
9063 if (p >= 0 && removed[p]) {
9064 removed[i] = 1;
9065 changed = 1;
9066 }
9067 }
9068 }
9069
9070 /* Build old-index -> new-index map for surviving nodes. */
9071 int remap[N_GUI_TREE_MAX];
9072 int new_count = 0;
9073 for (int i = 0; i < tree->nb_nodes; i++) {
9074 remap[i] = removed[i] ? -1 : new_count++;
9075 }
9076
9077 /* Compact nodes in place, translating parent_index through remap. */
9078 for (int i = 0; i < tree->nb_nodes; i++) {
9079 if (removed[i]) continue;
9080 int dst = remap[i];
9081 if (dst != i) tree->nodes[dst] = tree->nodes[i];
9082 if (tree->nodes[dst].parent_index >= 0) {
9083 tree->nodes[dst].parent_index = remap[tree->nodes[dst].parent_index];
9084 }
9085 }
9086 tree->nb_nodes = new_count;
9087
9088 /* Recompute has_children flags from scratch, any node whose
9089 only children were removed must no longer show the marker. */
9090 for (int i = 0; i < tree->nb_nodes; i++) {
9091 tree->nodes[i].has_children = 0;
9092 }
9093 for (int i = 0; i < tree->nb_nodes; i++) {
9094 int p = tree->nodes[i].parent_index;
9095 if (p >= 0) tree->nodes[p].has_children = 1;
9096 }
9097
9098 n_gui_tree_rebuild(tree);
9099}
9100
9101void n_gui_tree_set_label(N_GUI_TREE* tree, int node_index, const char* new_label) {
9102 if (!tree || !new_label) return;
9103 if (node_index < 0 || node_index >= tree->nb_nodes) return;
9104 snprintf(tree->nodes[node_index].label,
9105 sizeof(tree->nodes[node_index].label), "%s", new_label);
9106 n_gui_tree_rebuild(tree);
9107}
9108
9109int n_gui_tree_get_selection(N_GUI_TREE* tree) {
9110 if (!tree) return -1;
9111 int row = n_gui_listbox_get_selected(tree->ctx, tree->listbox_id);
9112 if (row < 0 || row >= tree->nb_visible) return -1;
9113 return tree->visible_map[row];
9114}
9115
9116void n_gui_tree_set_selection(N_GUI_TREE* tree, int node_index) {
9117 if (!tree) return;
9118 if (node_index < 0 || node_index >= tree->nb_nodes) return;
9119
9120 /* Expand every ancestor so node_index will appear in visible_map. */
9121 int p = tree->nodes[node_index].parent_index;
9122 while (p >= 0) {
9123 tree->nodes[p].expanded = 1;
9124 p = tree->nodes[p].parent_index;
9125 }
9126 n_gui_tree_rebuild(tree);
9127
9128 /* Find the visible row for the node and mark it selected. */
9129 for (int row = 0; row < tree->nb_visible; row++) {
9130 if (tree->visible_map[row] == node_index) {
9131 n_gui_listbox_set_selected(tree->ctx, tree->listbox_id, row, 1);
9132 n_gui_listbox_set_scroll_offset(tree->ctx, tree->listbox_id, row);
9133 return;
9134 }
9135 }
9136}
9137
9138int n_gui_tree_find_by_user_data(const N_GUI_TREE* tree, const void* ptr) {
9139 if (!tree || !ptr) return -1;
9140 for (int i = 0; i < tree->nb_nodes; i++) {
9141 if (tree->nodes[i].user_data == ptr) return i;
9142 }
9143 return -1;
9144}
9145
9146void n_gui_tree_toggle_expand(N_GUI_TREE* tree, int node_index) {
9147 if (!tree || node_index < 0 || node_index >= tree->nb_nodes) return;
9148 if (!tree->nodes[node_index].has_children) return;
9149 tree->nodes[node_index].expanded = !tree->nodes[node_index].expanded;
9150 n_gui_tree_rebuild(tree);
9151}
9152
9153void n_gui_tree_rebuild(N_GUI_TREE* tree) {
9154 if (!tree) return;
9155 /* Remember the logical node that was selected before we rewrite
9156 the listbox. Without this, any rebuild triggered by user
9157 interaction (e.g. clicking a folder to expand it) drops the
9158 selection because n_gui_listbox_clear wipes per-row state, so
9159 folder nodes never appear visually selected. Requests weren't
9160 affected because clicking a leaf doesn't trigger a rebuild. */
9161 int saved_node = n_gui_tree_get_selection(tree);
9162 int saved_scroll = n_gui_listbox_get_scroll_offset(tree->ctx, tree->listbox_id);
9163 n_gui_listbox_clear(tree->ctx, tree->listbox_id);
9164 tree->nb_visible = 0;
9165 for (int i = 0; i < tree->nb_nodes; i++) {
9166 if (!_n_gui_tree_node_visible(tree, i)) continue;
9167 N_GUI_TREE_NODE* node = &tree->nodes[i];
9168 char display[256];
9169 char indent[64];
9170 int pad = node->depth * 2;
9171 if (pad >= (int)sizeof(indent) - 1) pad = (int)sizeof(indent) - 2;
9172 memset(indent, ' ', (size_t)pad);
9173 indent[pad] = '\0';
9174 const char* marker = node->has_children ? (node->expanded ? "v " : "> ") : " ";
9175 snprintf(display, sizeof(display), "%s%s%s", indent, marker, node->label);
9176 n_gui_listbox_add_item(tree->ctx, tree->listbox_id, display);
9177 if (tree->nb_visible < N_GUI_TREE_MAX) {
9178 tree->visible_map[tree->nb_visible] = i;
9179 tree->nb_visible++;
9180 }
9181 }
9182 /* Restore selection if the saved node is still visible. If the
9183 node was removed, collapsed-behind-an-ancestor or otherwise
9184 gone, leave the selection cleared, callers that need a
9185 specific new selection use n_gui_tree_set_selection. */
9186 if (saved_node >= 0) {
9187 for (int row = 0; row < tree->nb_visible; row++) {
9188 if (tree->visible_map[row] == saved_node) {
9189 n_gui_listbox_set_selected(tree->ctx, tree->listbox_id,
9190 row, 1);
9191 break;
9192 }
9193 }
9194 }
9195 /* Restore scroll position, clamped to valid range */
9196 if (saved_scroll > 0) {
9197 n_gui_listbox_set_scroll_offset(tree->ctx, tree->listbox_id, saved_scroll);
9198 }
9199}
9200
9201void n_gui_tree_free(N_GUI_TREE** tree) {
9202 if (!tree || !*tree) return;
9203 FreeNoLog(*tree);
9204 *tree = NULL;
9205}
9206
9207/* TREE DRAG-REORDER */
9208
9210#define _N_GUI_TREE_DRAG_THRESHOLD_PX 4.0f
9211
9212void n_gui_tree_set_on_drop(N_GUI_TREE* tree,
9213 n_gui_tree_on_drop_t on_drop,
9214 void* user_data) {
9215 if (!tree) return;
9216 tree->on_drop = on_drop;
9217 tree->drop_user_data = user_data;
9218 tree->drag_source_node = -1;
9219 tree->drag_armed_node = -1;
9220 tree->drag_hover_node = -1;
9221 tree->drag_active = 0;
9222}
9223
9231static int _n_gui_tree_listbox_bounds(N_GUI_TREE* tree,
9232 float* out_x,
9233 float* out_y,
9234 float* out_w,
9235 float* out_h,
9236 float* out_item_area_w,
9237 float* out_inset,
9238 float* out_item_h,
9239 int* out_scroll_off) {
9240 if (!tree) return 0;
9241 const N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(tree->ctx, tree->listbox_id);
9242 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX || !w->data) return 0;
9243 const N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(tree->ctx, tree->window_id);
9244 if (!win) return 0;
9245 const N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* ld = (const N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)w->data;
9246 const N_GUI_STYLE* style = &tree->ctx->style;
9247
9248 *out_x = win->x + w->x;
9249 *out_y = win->y + win->titlebar_h + w->y;
9250 *out_w = w->w;
9251 *out_h = w->h;
9252 *out_item_h = (ld->item_height > 0.0f) ? ld->item_height : 20.0f;
9253 *out_scroll_off = ld->scroll_offset;
9254
9255 /* Match _draw_listbox: the scrollbar column is reserved when the
9256 number of items overflows the visible area. Subtract it from
9257 the content-area width so hit-testing and overlay indicators
9258 stop exactly where row highlights stop. */
9259 int visible_count = (int)(w->h / *out_item_h);
9260 int need_scrollbar = ((int)ld->nb_items > visible_count) ? 1 : 0;
9261 float sb_w = need_scrollbar ? style->scrollbar_size : 0.0f;
9262 *out_item_area_w = w->w - sb_w;
9263 *out_inset = style->item_selection_inset;
9264 return 1;
9265}
9266
9271static int _n_gui_tree_hit_row(N_GUI_TREE* tree, float mx, float my, int* out_node_idx, int* out_drop_pos) {
9272 float lx, ly, lw, lh, iw, inset, ih;
9273 int scroll;
9274 if (!_n_gui_tree_listbox_bounds(tree, &lx, &ly, &lw, &lh,
9275 &iw, &inset, &ih, &scroll))
9276 return 0;
9277 (void)lw; /* scrollbar column is excluded via iw below */
9278 (void)inset;
9279 if (mx < lx || mx > lx + iw || my < ly || my > ly + lh) return 0;
9280
9281 int row_in_view = (int)((my - ly) / ih);
9282 int actual_row = row_in_view + scroll;
9283 if (actual_row < 0 || actual_row >= tree->nb_visible) return 0;
9284
9285 int node_idx = tree->visible_map[actual_row];
9286 if (node_idx < 0 || node_idx >= tree->nb_nodes) return 0;
9287
9288 /* Tighter INTO zone: top 40% -> BEFORE, middle 20% -> INTO,
9289 bottom 40% -> AFTER. Previously the middle 40% was INTO,
9290 which made it too easy to accidentally re-nest a folder
9291 when the user was trying to move it back out between
9292 siblings. */
9293 float y_in_row = (my - ly) - (float)row_in_view * ih;
9294 int pos;
9295 if (y_in_row < ih * 0.4f)
9296 pos = N_GUI_DROP_BEFORE;
9297 else if (y_in_row > ih * 0.6f)
9298 pos = N_GUI_DROP_AFTER;
9299 else
9300 pos = N_GUI_DROP_INTO;
9301
9302 *out_node_idx = node_idx;
9303 *out_drop_pos = pos;
9304 return 1;
9305}
9306
9307void n_gui_tree_tick(N_GUI_TREE* tree) {
9308 if (!tree || !tree->ctx) return;
9309 if (!tree->on_drop) return;
9310
9311 const N_GUI_CTX* ctx = tree->ctx;
9312 int b1 = ctx->mouse_b1;
9313 int b1_prev = tree->mouse_b1_prev;
9314 tree->mouse_b1_prev = b1;
9315
9316 float mx = (float)ctx->mouse_x;
9317 float my = (float)ctx->mouse_y;
9318
9319 int hit_node = -1;
9320 int pos = N_GUI_DROP_INTO;
9321 int hit = _n_gui_tree_hit_row(tree, mx, my, &hit_node, &pos);
9322
9323 /* Mouse press: arm the drag if we're over a row. */
9324 if (b1 && !b1_prev) {
9325 if (hit) {
9326 tree->drag_armed_node = hit_node;
9327 tree->drag_press_x = mx;
9328 tree->drag_press_y = my;
9329 } else {
9330 tree->drag_armed_node = -1;
9331 }
9332 tree->drag_active = 0;
9333 tree->drag_source_node = -1;
9334 tree->drag_hover_node = -1;
9335 }
9336
9337 /* While mouse is held: promote to active drag once past threshold. */
9338 if (b1 && tree->drag_armed_node >= 0) {
9339 if (!tree->drag_active) {
9340 float dx = mx - tree->drag_press_x;
9341 float dy = my - tree->drag_press_y;
9342 if (dx * dx + dy * dy >= _N_GUI_TREE_DRAG_THRESHOLD_PX *
9343 _N_GUI_TREE_DRAG_THRESHOLD_PX) {
9344 tree->drag_active = 1;
9345 tree->drag_source_node = tree->drag_armed_node;
9346 }
9347 }
9348 if (tree->drag_active) {
9349 tree->drag_hover_node = hit ? hit_node : -1;
9350 tree->drop_position = hit ? pos : N_GUI_DROP_INTO;
9351 }
9352 }
9353
9354 /* Mouse release: fire callback if we actually dragged. */
9355 if (!b1 && b1_prev) {
9356 if (tree->drag_active && tree->drag_source_node >= 0 && tree->drag_hover_node >= 0 && tree->drag_source_node != tree->drag_hover_node) {
9357 tree->on_drop(tree->drag_source_node,
9358 tree->drag_hover_node,
9359 tree->drop_position,
9360 tree->drop_user_data);
9361 }
9362 tree->drag_source_node = -1;
9363 tree->drag_armed_node = -1;
9364 tree->drag_hover_node = -1;
9365 tree->drag_active = 0;
9366 }
9367}
9368
9369void n_gui_tree_draw_overlay(N_GUI_TREE* tree) {
9370 if (!tree || !tree->ctx) return;
9371 if (!tree->drag_active || tree->drag_hover_node < 0) return;
9372
9373 float lx, ly, lw, lh, iw, inset, ih;
9374 int scroll;
9375 if (!_n_gui_tree_listbox_bounds(tree, &lx, &ly, &lw, &lh,
9376 &iw, &inset, &ih, &scroll))
9377 return;
9378 (void)lw; /* use iw (item area) so we stop at the scrollbar column */
9379
9380 /* Find the visible-row index of drag_hover_node, translate to
9381 absolute Y using the listbox's scroll offset. */
9382 int row_in_view = -1;
9383 for (int row = 0; row < tree->nb_visible; row++) {
9384 if (tree->visible_map[row] == tree->drag_hover_node) {
9385 row_in_view = row - scroll;
9386 break;
9387 }
9388 }
9389 if (row_in_view < 0) return;
9390
9391 float row_y = ly + (float)row_in_view * ih;
