9392 if (row_y < ly || row_y + ih > ly + lh) {
9393 /* Off-screen, don't draw. */
9394 return;
9395 }
9396
9397 /* Align horizontal span with the selection/hover highlights so
9398 the indicator looks exactly like part of the row, not a
9399 stripe floating over the scrollbar or past the text area. */
9400 float left = lx + inset;
9401 float right = lx + iw - inset;
9402
9403 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(tree->ctx, tree->listbox_id);
9404 ALLEGRO_COLOR colour = w ? w->theme.border_active
9405 : tree->ctx->default_theme.border_active;
9406 const float thickness = 2.0f;
9407 const float half = thickness * 0.5f;
9408
9409 if (tree->drop_position == N_GUI_DROP_INTO) {
9410 /* Inset by half the stroke so the OUTER edge of the outline
9411 coincides with (left, row_y) .. (right, row_y+ih), the
9412 same bounds the selection fill uses. Without this the
9413 outline straddles the boundary and looks wider than the
9414 selection rectangle. */
9415 al_draw_rectangle(left + half, row_y + half,
9416 right - half, row_y + ih - half,
9417 colour, thickness);
9418 } else {
9419 /* Line sits exactly on the row boundary (between rows N-1/N
9420 for BEFORE, N/N+1 for AFTER). The stroke straddles that
9421 boundary so the bar reads as "between two rows" rather
9422 than "inside one row". */
9423 float line_y = (tree->drop_position == N_GUI_DROP_BEFORE)
9424 ? row_y
9425 : row_y + ih;
9426 al_draw_line(left, line_y,
9427 right, line_y,
9428 colour, thickness);
9429 }
9430}
9431
9432/* KEY-VALUE TABLE */
9433
9434static void _n_gui_kv_add_clicked(int widget_id, void* user_data) {
9435 (void)widget_id;
9436 N_GUI_KVTABLE* table = (N_GUI_KVTABLE*)user_data;
9437 if (!table) return;
9438 n_gui_kvtable_add_row(table, "", "", "", 1);
9439}
9440
9441static void _n_gui_kv_remove_clicked(int widget_id, void* user_data) {
9442 N_GUI_KVTABLE* table = (N_GUI_KVTABLE*)user_data;
9443 if (!table) return;
9444 for (int i = 0; i < table->nb_rows; i++) {
9445 if (table->rows[i].remove_id == widget_id && table->rows[i].active) {
9446 n_gui_kvtable_remove_row(table, i);
9447 if (table->on_remove) table->on_remove(i, table->user_data);
9448 return;
9449 }
9450 }
9451}
9452
9453/* Apply full layout to all KV table widgets: positions, sizes, and norms.
9454 Scales every metric by the parent window's current size relative to the
9455 window size captured at create time, so the table tracks the window the
9456 same way other SCALE-policy widgets do. Updating norm_x/y/w/h after each
9457 call keeps n_gui_apply_adaptive_resize in sync on the next display
9458 resize. */
9459static void _n_gui_kv_apply_layout(N_GUI_KVTABLE* table) {
9460 if (!table) return;
9461 const N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(table->ctx, table->window_id);
9462 if (!win) return;
9463
9464 float sx = (table->init_win_w > 0.0f) ? (win->w / table->init_win_w) : 1.0f;
9465 float sy = (table->init_win_h > 0.0f) ? (win->h / table->init_win_h) : 1.0f;
9466
9467 float pad_x = table->padding * sx;
9468 float pad_y = table->padding * sy;
9469 float hdr_h_outer = table->header_height * sy;
9470 float row_h = table->row_height * sy;
9471 float gap = 6.0f * sx;
9472
9473 float total_w = win->w - pad_x * 2.0f;
9474 if (total_w < 0.0f) total_w = 0.0f;
9475 float col_w = total_w * 0.27f;
9476 if (col_w < 0.0f) col_w = 0.0f;
9477
9478 float rh_inner = row_h - 4.0f * sy;
9479 if (rh_inner < 1.0f) rh_inner = 1.0f;
9480 float rw_inner = table->row_height * sx - 4.0f * sx;
9481 if (rw_inner < 1.0f) rw_inner = 1.0f;
9482 float lbl_h = 18.0f * sy;
9483 if (lbl_h < 1.0f) lbl_h = 1.0f;
9484 float chk_w = rw_inner;
9485 float rem_w = rw_inner;
9486
9487 N_GUI_WIDGET* w;
9488
9489 /* Header labels. */
9490 w = n_gui_get_widget(table->ctx, table->lbl_key);
9491 if (w) {
9492 w->x = pad_x;
9493 w->y = pad_y;
9494 w->w = col_w;
9495 w->h = lbl_h;
9496 _n_gui_widget_capture_normalized(win, w);
9497 }
9498 w = n_gui_get_widget(table->ctx, table->lbl_value);
9499 if (w) {
9500 w->x = pad_x + col_w;
9501 w->y = pad_y;
9502 w->w = col_w;
9503 w->h = lbl_h;
9504 _n_gui_widget_capture_normalized(win, w);
9505 }
9506 w = n_gui_get_widget(table->ctx, table->lbl_desc);
9507 if (w) {
9508 w->x = pad_x + col_w * 2.0f;
9509 w->y = pad_y;
9510 w->w = col_w;
9511 w->h = lbl_h;
9512 _n_gui_widget_capture_normalized(win, w);
9513 }
9514 w = n_gui_get_widget(table->ctx, table->lbl_enabled);
9515 if (w) {
9516 w->x = pad_x + col_w * 3.0f + gap;
9517 w->y = pad_y;
9518 w->w = chk_w;
9519 w->h = lbl_h;
9520 _n_gui_widget_capture_normalized(win, w);
9521 }
9522
9523 /* Active rows below the header. */
9524 float cy = pad_y + hdr_h_outer;
9525 for (int i = 0; i < table->nb_rows; i++) {
9526 if (!table->rows[i].active) continue;
9527 const N_GUI_KV_ROW* row = &table->rows[i];
9528 float fx = pad_x;
9529 w = n_gui_get_widget(table->ctx, row->key_id);
9530 if (w) {
9531 w->x = fx;
9532 w->y = cy;
9533 w->w = col_w;
9534 w->h = rh_inner;
9535 _n_gui_widget_capture_normalized(win, w);
9536 }
9537 fx += col_w;
9538 w = n_gui_get_widget(table->ctx, row->value_id);
9539 if (w) {
9540 w->x = fx;
9541 w->y = cy;
9542 w->w = col_w;
9543 w->h = rh_inner;
9544 _n_gui_widget_capture_normalized(win, w);
9545 }
9546 fx += col_w;
9547 w = n_gui_get_widget(table->ctx, row->desc_id);
9548 if (w) {
9549 w->x = fx;
9550 w->y = cy;
9551 w->w = col_w;
9552 w->h = rh_inner;
9553 _n_gui_widget_capture_normalized(win, w);
9554 }
9555 fx += col_w + gap;
9556 w = n_gui_get_widget(table->ctx, row->enabled_id);
9557 if (w) {
9558 w->x = fx;
9559 w->y = cy;
9560 w->w = chk_w;
9561 w->h = rh_inner;
9562 _n_gui_widget_capture_normalized(win, w);
9563 }
9564 fx += chk_w + gap;
9565 w = n_gui_get_widget(table->ctx, row->remove_id);
9566 if (w) {
9567 w->x = fx;
9568 w->y = cy;
9569 w->w = rem_w;
9570 w->h = rh_inner;
9571 _n_gui_widget_capture_normalized(win, w);
9572 }
9573 cy += row_h;
9574 }
9575
9576 /* "+" add-row button anchored below the last active row. */
9577 w = n_gui_get_widget(table->ctx, table->btn_add);
9578 if (w) {
9579 float btn_w = 30.0f * sx;
9580 w->x = pad_x;
9581 w->y = cy;
9582 w->w = btn_w;
9583 w->h = rh_inner;
9584 _n_gui_widget_capture_normalized(win, w);
9585 }
9586}
9587
9588N_GUI_KVTABLE* n_gui_kvtable_create(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, float row_height, float padding, void (*on_remove)(int, void*), void* user_data) {
9589 if (!ctx) return NULL;
9590 N_GUI_KVTABLE* table = NULL;
9591 Malloc(table, N_GUI_KVTABLE, 1);
9592 if (!table) return NULL;
9593 memset(table, 0, sizeof(*table));
9594 table->ctx = ctx;
9595 table->window_id = window_id;
9596 table->nb_rows = 0;
9597 table->nb_active = 0;
9598 table->row_height = row_height;
9599 table->padding = padding;
9600 table->header_height = 18.0f + 2.0f;
9601 table->on_remove = on_remove;
9602 table->user_data = user_data;
9603
9604 /* Capture parent window dimensions for later scale ratios. */
9605 const N_GUI_WINDOW* wptr = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
9606 table->init_win_w = wptr ? wptr->w : 0.0f;
9607 table->init_win_h = wptr ? wptr->h : 0.0f;
9608
9609 /* Widgets are added at placeholder coords; _n_gui_kv_apply_layout
9610 sets final positions, sizes, and normalized coords below. */
9611 float rh_inner = row_height - 4.0f;
9612 if (rh_inner < 1.0f) rh_inner = 1.0f;
9613 float hdr_h_label = 18.0f;
9614 table->lbl_key = n_gui_add_label(ctx, window_id, "Key",
9615 padding, padding, 100.0f, hdr_h_label, N_GUI_ALIGN_LEFT);
9616 table->lbl_value = n_gui_add_label(ctx, window_id, "Value",
9617 padding, padding, 100.0f, hdr_h_label, N_GUI_ALIGN_LEFT);
9618 table->lbl_desc = n_gui_add_label(ctx, window_id, "Description",
9619 padding, padding, 100.0f, hdr_h_label, N_GUI_ALIGN_LEFT);
9620 table->lbl_enabled = n_gui_add_label(ctx, window_id, "On",
9621 padding, padding, rh_inner, hdr_h_label, N_GUI_ALIGN_LEFT);
9622
9623 table->btn_add = n_gui_add_button(ctx, window_id,
9624 "+", padding, padding, 30.0f, rh_inner,
9625 N_GUI_SHAPE_ROUNDED, _n_gui_kv_add_clicked, table);
9626
9627 _n_gui_kv_apply_layout(table);
9628 return table;
9629}
9630
9631int n_gui_kvtable_add_row(N_GUI_KVTABLE* table,
9632 const char* key,
9633 const char* value,
9634 const char* description,
9635 int enabled) {
9636 if (!table || table->nb_rows >= N_GUI_KV_MAX) return -1;
9637 int idx = table->nb_rows;
9638 N_GUI_CTX* ctx = table->ctx;
9639 int win = table->window_id;
9640 float pad = table->padding;
9641 float rh = table->row_height - 4.0f;
9642 if (rh < 1.0f) rh = 1.0f;
9643
9644 /* Placeholder coords; _n_gui_kv_apply_layout assigns the real
9645 positions, sizes, and norms below so the new widgets match the
9646 current scale of the parent window. */
9647 N_GUI_KV_ROW* row = &table->rows[idx];
9648 row->key_id = n_gui_add_textarea(ctx, win, pad, pad, 100.0f, rh, 0, 256, NULL, NULL);
9649 row->value_id = n_gui_add_textarea(ctx, win, pad, pad, 100.0f, rh, 0, 1024, NULL, NULL);
9650 row->desc_id = n_gui_add_textarea(ctx, win, pad, pad, 100.0f, rh, 0, 256, NULL, NULL);
9651 row->enabled_id = n_gui_add_checkbox(ctx, win, "", pad, pad, rh, rh, enabled, NULL, NULL);
9652 row->remove_id = n_gui_add_button(ctx, win, "x", pad, pad, rh, rh,
9653 N_GUI_SHAPE_RECT, _n_gui_kv_remove_clicked, table);
9654 row->active = 1;
9655 if (key) n_gui_textarea_set_text(ctx, row->key_id, key);
9656 if (value) n_gui_textarea_set_text(ctx, row->value_id, value);
9657 if (description) n_gui_textarea_set_text(ctx, row->desc_id, description);
9658 table->nb_rows++;
9659 table->nb_active++;
9660 _n_gui_kv_apply_layout(table);
9661 return idx;
9662}
9663
9664void n_gui_kvtable_remove_row(N_GUI_KVTABLE* table, int row_index) {
9665 if (!table || row_index < 0 || row_index >= table->nb_rows) return;
9666 if (!table->rows[row_index].active) return;
9667 N_GUI_KV_ROW* row = &table->rows[row_index];
9668 n_gui_set_widget_visible(table->ctx, row->key_id, 0);
9669 n_gui_set_widget_visible(table->ctx, row->value_id, 0);
9670 n_gui_set_widget_visible(table->ctx, row->desc_id, 0);
9671 n_gui_set_widget_visible(table->ctx, row->enabled_id, 0);
9672 n_gui_set_widget_visible(table->ctx, row->remove_id, 0);
9673 row->active = 0;
9674 table->nb_active--;
9675 _n_gui_kv_apply_layout(table);
9676}
9677
9678int n_gui_kvtable_get_count(N_GUI_KVTABLE* table) {
9679 return table ? table->nb_active : 0;
9680}
9681
9682void n_gui_kvtable_relayout(N_GUI_KVTABLE* table) {
9683 _n_gui_kv_apply_layout(table);
9684}
9685
9686void n_gui_kvtable_free(N_GUI_KVTABLE** table) {
9687 if (!table || !*table) return;
9688 FreeNoLog(*table);
9689 *table = NULL;
9690}
9691
9692/* SECTION LIST (foldable accordion).
9693 An app-level helper that owns widget ids and re-stacks them with a running
9694 cursor plus per-widget visibility, exactly like the kvtable above; the core
9695 window/widget engine is untouched, so N_GUI_WIN_AUTO_SCROLLBAR keeps working
9696 from the visible-widget bounding box (a folded section's hidden members do
9697 not count toward content height). Relayout only mutates existing widgets in
9698 place (visibility + position), so it is safe to call from a widget callback. */
9699
9700/* Rebuild a header's label with the ASCII fold glyph for its current state. */
9701static void _n_gui_sectionlist_set_header_label(N_GUI_SECTIONLIST* sl, int idx) {
9702 N_GUI_SECTION* s = &sl->sections[idx];
9703 char label[80];
9704 snprintf(label, sizeof(label), "%s %s", s->folded ? "+" : "-", s->title);
9705 n_gui_button_set_label(sl->ctx, s->header_id, label);
9706}
9707
9708/* Internal header on_click: flip the matching section's fold state, relayout,
9709 and notify the app via on_toggle (so it can persist + resize its window). */
9710static void _n_gui_sectionlist_header_clicked(int widget_id, void* user_data) {
9711 N_GUI_SECTIONLIST* sl = (N_GUI_SECTIONLIST*)user_data;
9712 if (!sl) return;
9713 for (int i = 0; i < sl->nb_sections; i++) {
9714 if (sl->sections[i].header_id == widget_id) {
9715 sl->sections[i].folded = !sl->sections[i].folded;
9716 n_gui_sectionlist_relayout(sl);
9717 if (sl->on_toggle) sl->on_toggle(i, sl->sections[i].folded, sl->user_data);
9718 return;
9719 }
9720 }
9721}
9722
9723N_GUI_SECTIONLIST* n_gui_sectionlist_create(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, float x, float y0, float width, float header_h, float gap, void (*on_toggle)(int, int, void*), void* user_data) {
9724 if (!ctx) return NULL;
9725 N_GUI_SECTIONLIST* sl = NULL;
9726 Malloc(sl, N_GUI_SECTIONLIST, 1);
9727 if (!sl) return NULL;
9728 memset(sl, 0, sizeof(*sl));
9729 sl->ctx = ctx;
9730 sl->window_id = window_id;
9731 sl->x = x;
9732 sl->y0 = y0;
9733 sl->width = width;
9734 sl->header_h = header_h;
9735 sl->gap = gap;
9736 sl->on_toggle = on_toggle;
9737 sl->user_data = user_data;
9738 sl->nb_sections = 0;
9739 return sl;
9740}
9741
9742int n_gui_sectionlist_add_section(N_GUI_SECTIONLIST* sl, const char* title, float header_y, int folded) {
9743 if (!sl || !title || sl->nb_sections >= N_GUI_SECTIONLIST_MAX) return -1;
9744 int idx = sl->nb_sections;
9745 N_GUI_SECTION* s = &sl->sections[idx];
9746 memset(s, 0, sizeof(*s));
9747 strncpy(s->title, title, sizeof(s->title) - 1);
9748 s->title[sizeof(s->title) - 1] = '\0';
9749 s->folded = folded ? 1 : 0;
9750 s->nb_widgets = 0;
9751 s->natural_h = 0.0f;
9752 char label[80];
9753 snprintf(label, sizeof(label), "%s %s", s->folded ? "+" : "-", s->title);
9754 s->header_id = n_gui_add_button(sl->ctx, sl->window_id, label, sl->x, header_y, sl->width, sl->header_h, N_GUI_SHAPE_ROUNDED, _n_gui_sectionlist_header_clicked, sl);
9755 sl->nb_sections++;
9756 return idx;
9757}
9758
9759void n_gui_sectionlist_add_widget(N_GUI_SECTIONLIST* sl, int section_index, int widget_id) {
9760 if (!sl || section_index < 0 || section_index >= sl->nb_sections) return;
9761 N_GUI_SECTION* s = &sl->sections[section_index];
9762 if (s->nb_widgets >= N_GUI_SECTION_WIDGETS_MAX) return;
9763 const N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(sl->ctx, widget_id);
9764 const N_GUI_WIDGET* hdr = n_gui_get_widget(sl->ctx, s->header_id);
9765 if (!w || !hdr) return;
9766 /* member offsets are captured relative to the section's build-time content
9767 top; relayout then translates the whole block to the live cursor */
9768 float content_top0 = hdr->y + sl->header_h + sl->gap;
9769 float dy = w->y - content_top0;
9770 s->widget_ids[s->nb_widgets] = widget_id;
9771 s->widget_dy[s->nb_widgets] = dy;
9772 s->nb_widgets++;
9773 float bottom = dy + w->h;
9774 if (bottom > s->natural_h) s->natural_h = bottom;
9775}
9776
9777void n_gui_sectionlist_set_first_inset(N_GUI_SECTIONLIST* sl, float inset) {
9778 if (!sl) return;
9779 sl->first_inset = (inset > 0.0f) ? inset : 0.0f;
9780}
9781
9782void n_gui_sectionlist_relayout(N_GUI_SECTIONLIST* sl) {
9783 if (!sl) return;
9784 const N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(sl->ctx, sl->window_id);
9785 float cur = sl->y0;
9786 for (int i = 0; i < sl->nb_sections; i++) {
9787 N_GUI_SECTION* s = &sl->sections[i];
9788 N_GUI_WIDGET* hdr = n_gui_get_widget(sl->ctx, s->header_id);
9789 if (hdr) {
9790 /* the first header may be inset from the left so a caller button can
9791 * sit before it on the same row */
9792 float inset = (i == 0) ? sl->first_inset : 0.0f;
9793 hdr->x = sl->x + inset;
9794 hdr->y = cur;
9795 hdr->w = sl->width - inset;
9796 if (win) _n_gui_widget_capture_normalized(win, hdr);
9797 }
9798 cur += sl->header_h + sl->gap;
9799 for (int k = 0; k < s->nb_widgets; k++) {
9800 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(sl->ctx, s->widget_ids[k]);
9801 if (!w) continue;
9802 if (s->folded) {
9803 n_gui_set_widget_visible(sl->ctx, s->widget_ids[k], 0);
9804 } else {
9805 n_gui_set_widget_visible(sl->ctx, s->widget_ids[k], 1);
9806 w->y = cur + s->widget_dy[k];
9807 if (win) _n_gui_widget_capture_normalized(win, w);
9808 }
9809 }
9810 if (!s->folded) cur += s->natural_h + sl->gap;
9811 _n_gui_sectionlist_set_header_label(sl, i);
9812 }
9813}
9814
9815void n_gui_sectionlist_set_folded(N_GUI_SECTIONLIST* sl, int section_index, int folded) {
9816 if (!sl || section_index < 0 || section_index >= sl->nb_sections) return;
9817 sl->sections[section_index].folded = folded ? 1 : 0;
9818 n_gui_sectionlist_relayout(sl);
9819}
9820
9821int n_gui_sectionlist_is_folded(const N_GUI_SECTIONLIST* sl, int section_index) {
9822 if (!sl || section_index < 0 || section_index >= sl->nb_sections) return 0;
9823 return sl->sections[section_index].folded;
9824}
9825
9826float n_gui_sectionlist_content_height(const N_GUI_SECTIONLIST* sl) {
9827 if (!sl) return 0.0f;
9828 float cur = sl->y0;
9829 for (int i = 0; i < sl->nb_sections; i++) {
9830 cur += sl->header_h + sl->gap;
9831 if (!sl->sections[i].folded) cur += sl->sections[i].natural_h + sl->gap;
9832 }
9833 return cur;
9834}
9835
9836int n_gui_sectionlist_get_count(const N_GUI_SECTIONLIST* sl) {
9837 return sl ? sl->nb_sections : 0;
9838}
9839
9840void n_gui_sectionlist_free(N_GUI_SECTIONLIST** sl) {
9841 if (!sl || !*sl) return;
9842 FreeNoLog(*sl);
9843 *sl = NULL;
9844}
